title: অনলাইন লেনদেনৰ জৰিয়তে ধন আত্মসাৎঃ ৰঙিয়াত আটক এজন যুৱক
description:
ডিজিটেল সংবাদ, হাজোঃ ৰাজ্যত বৃদ্ধি পোৱা চাইবাৰ অপৰাধজনিত ঘটনাৰ মাজতে ৰঙিয়াৰ দিহিনা অঞ্চলত পোহৰলৈ আহিছে এক চাঞ্চল্যকৰ ঘটনা।
অভিযোগ অনুসৰি, জুমন দাস নামৰ এজন যুৱকে দীৰ্ঘদিন ধৰি ভুৱা অনলাইন পেমেণ্টৰ জৰিয়তে বিভিন্ন দোকানীৰ পৰা সামগ্ৰী ক্ৰয় কৰি হাজাৰ হাজাৰ টকা আত্মসাৎ কৰি আহিছিল। দিহিনা অঞ্চলৰ লগতে হাজোৰ বিভিন্ন স্থানৰ ব্যৱসায়ীক লক্ষ্য কৰি অভিযুক্ত যুৱকজনে এই কৌশল প্ৰয়োগ কৰিছিল।
মঙলবাৰে দিহিনাৰ বালাচৰ অঞ্চলত স্থানীয় ৰাইজে সন্দেহবশতঃ যুৱকজনক আৱদ্ধ কৰি সোধ-পোছ চলায়। সেই সময়ত তেওঁ ভুৱা অনলাইন লেনদেনৰ জৰিয়তে ধন আত্মসাৎ কৰাৰ কথা স্বীকাৰ কৰা বুলি স্থানীয় লোকে দাবী কৰিছে।
উল্লেখ্য যে, অভিযুক্ত জুমন দাস বিজ্ঞান শাখাৰ স্নাতক বৰ্ষৰ ছাত্ৰ আৰু তেওঁৰ ঘৰো দিহিনা অঞ্চলতে। ঘটনাটোৰ পিছতে অঞ্চলজুৰি তীব্ৰ প্ৰতিক্ৰিয়াৰ সৃষ্টি হৈছে। ইফালে, যুৱকজন বৰ্তমান হাজো আৰক্ষীৰ জিম্মাত থকা বুলি জানিব পৰা গৈছে। আৰক্ষীয়ে যুৱকজনক সোধপোছ অব্যাহত ৰখাৰ লগতে এই চক্ৰটোৰ লগত জড়িত আন সকলো দিশৰ ওপৰত অনুসন্ধান চলাই আছে৷

title: వాట్సాప్ కు కేంద్రం నోటీసులు
description: Username Feature : ప్రముఖ మెసేజింగ్ యాప్ వాట్సాప్‌లో త్వరలో రాబోతున్న ‘యూజర్‌నేమ్’ (Username) ఫీచర్‌పై కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం తీవ్రంగా స్పందించింది. ఫోన్ నెంబర్ కనిపించకుండా కేవలం...
content:
Username Feature : ప్రముఖ మెసేజింగ్ యాప్ వాట్సాప్‌లో త్వరలో రాబోతున్న ‘యూజర్‌నేమ్’ (Username) ఫీచర్‌పై కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం తీవ్రంగా స్పందించింది. ఫోన్ నెంబర్ కనిపించకుండా కేవలం యూజర్‌నేమ్ ఆధారంగా చాట్ చేసుకునేందుకు వీలు కల్పించే ఈ కొత్త ఫీచర్‌ను ప్రస్తుతానికి నిలిపివేయాలని కేంద్రం ఆదేశించింది. ఈ ఫీచర్‌కు సంబంధించి ప్రైవసీ, సెక్యూరిటీ అంశాలపై పూర్తి వివరణను 3 రోజుల్లోగా సమర్పించాలని వాట్సాప్ మాతృసంస్థ మెటాకు నోటీసులు జారీ చేసింది. కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వంతో చర్చలు మరియు సంప్రదింపులు పూర్తిగా ముగిసే అంతవరకు ఈ సరికొత్త ఫీచర్‌ను వినియోగదారులకు అందుబాటులోకి తీసుకురావద్దని ప్రభుత్వ వర్గాలు స్పష్టం చేశాయి.



Read Also : ఇళయరాజాకు ఢిల్లీ హైకోర్టులో షాక్.. కోర్టు కీలక ఆదేశాలు











పెరిగిపోతున్న ఆన్‌లైన్ మోసాలు – భద్రతా కారణాలతోనే ప్రభుత్వం నిర్ణయం



ఈ నిర్ణయం వెనుక ఆన్‌లైన్ సైబర్ మోసాలు (Online Scams) పెరిగే ప్రమాదం ఉందనే ఆందోళనలు వ్యక్తమవుతున్నాయి. ప్రస్తుతం వాట్సాప్‌లో ఎవరైనా మెసేజ్ చేయాలంటే ఫోన్ నెంబర్ తప్పనిసరి, దీనివల్ల అవతలి వ్యక్తిని గుర్తించడం సులువవుతుంది. అయితే కేవలం యూజర్‌నేమ్‌లతోనే అకౌంట్లు క్రియేట్ చేసుకునే అవకాశం ఇస్తే, సైబర్ నేరగాళ్లు నకిలీ గుర్తింపులతో సులభంగా అమాయకులను మోసం చేసే అవకాశం ఉందని నిపుణులు హెచ్చరిస్తున్నారు. దేశ ప్రజల వ్యక్తిగత డేటా భద్రత (Privacy), అలాగే సైబర్ సెక్యూరిటీ పరంగా ఎలాంటి లోపాలు తలెత్తకూడదనే ఉద్దేశంతోనే కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ముందస్తుగా ఈ కఠిన చర్యలు తీసుకున్నట్లు తెలుస్తోంది.

title: Kolkata:ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗ ରାଜନୀତିରେ ହଇଚଇ: ଟିଏସ୍‌ସିର ତିନି ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ପାଇଁ ସଙ୍କଟ ବଢ଼ିଲା
description:
କୋଲକାତା: ପଶ୍ଚିମବଙ୍ଗରେ କ୍ଷମତା ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ପରେ ରାଜନୈତିକ ବାତାବରଣ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ସରଗରମ ହେବାରେ ଲାଗିଛି। ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶୁଭେନ୍ଦୁ ଅଧିକାରୀଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ବାଧୀନ ବିଜେପି ସରକାର ପୂର୍ବତନ ଶାସକ ଦଳ ତୃଣମୂଳ କଂଗ୍ରେସ (ଟିଏମ୍‌ସି)ର ତିନୋଟି ଯାକ ପ୍ରମୁଖ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ଉପରେ ଶକ୍ତ ଆଭିମୁଖ୍ୟ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ମମତା ବାନାର୍ଜୀ, ଋତବ୍ରତ ବାନାର୍ଜୀ ଏବଂ ହୁମାୟୁନ କବୀରଙ୍କ ଶିବିର ଏବେ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ସିଧାସଳଖ ଟାର୍ଗେଟ୍‌କୁ ଚାଲିଆସିଛନ୍ତି, ଯାହାଫଳରେ ସେମାନଙ୍କର ରାଜନୀତିକ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତକୁ ନେଇ ସଙ୍କଟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି ହୋଇଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Odisha Cabinet decisions ରାଜ୍ୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରିମଣ୍ଡଳର ୧୨ ଫୈସଲା: କେଜିରୁ ପିଜି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଦେୟ ମୁକ୍ତ, ୧୦ମ ଶ୍ରେଣୀ ଯାଏଁ ମଧ୍ୟାହ୍‌ଣ ଭୋଜନ
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ବିଧାନସଭା ନିର୍ବାଚନ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ହିଁ ଟିଏମ୍‌ସି ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଆଭ୍ୟନ୍ତରୀଣ କନ୍ଦଳ ଏବଂ ବିଭାଜନ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟା ତେଜିଥିଲା। ପ୍ରଭାବଶାଳୀ ନେତା ହୁମାୟୁନ କବୀର ନିଜର ଏକ ସ୍ବାଧୀନ ଦଳ ଗଠନ କରି ଦୁଇଟି ଆସନରେ ବିଜୟୀ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ଅନ୍ୟତମ ବରିଷ୍ଠ ନେତା ଋତବ୍ରତ ବାନାର୍ଜୀ ପ୍ରାୟ ୬୦ ଜଣ ବିଧାୟକଙ୍କୁ ନିଜ ସପକ୍ଷକୁ ନେଇ ନିଜ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀକୁ ପ୍ରକୃତ ଟିଏମସି ଭାବେ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିଲେ। ଅପରପକ୍ଷରେ, ଦଳର ସୁପ୍ରିମୋ ମମତା ବାନାର୍ଜୀ କେବଳ ନିଜର କିଛି ସୀମିତ ଅନୁଗତଙ୍କୁ ନେଇ ଏବେ ରାଜନୀତିକ ଲଢ଼େଇ ଜାରି ରଖିଛନ୍ତି। ନିର୍ବାଚନରେ ଦଳର ଶୋଚନୀୟ ପରାଜୟ ଏବଂ ସାଂଗଠନିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ବଡ଼ ଫାଟ ଯୋଗୁଁ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ସ୍ଥିତି ଏବେ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଦୋହଲି ଯାଇଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tamil Nadu goverment:ଗୋହତ୍ୟା ନିଷେଧ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ: ମାଡ୍ରାସ ହାଇକୋର୍ଟଙ୍କ ରାୟକୁ ସୁପ୍ରିମ୍‌କୋର୍ଟରେ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ କଲେ ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ସରକାର
ଟିଏମସିର ସାଂଗଠନିକ ଶକ୍ତିର ପରିଚୟ ପାଲଟିଥିବା ପାରମ୍ପରିକ ‘ସହିଦ ଦିବସ’ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ଚଳିତ ବର୍ଷ ତିନୋଟି ଯାକ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ପ୍ରତିବନ୍ଧକ ସାଜିଛି। ଆଇନ ଶୃଙ୍ଖଳା ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ଦର୍ଶାଇ ରାଜ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଶାସନ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ବଡ଼ ସମାବେଶ ପାଇଁ ଅନୁମତି ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯାଇ ନାହିଁ। ଫଳରେ ମମତା ବାନାର୍ଜୀ ଏବଂ ଋତବ୍ରତ ବାନାର୍ଜୀଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ହେବାକୁ ଥିବା ଶକ୍ତି ପ୍ରଦର୍ଶନର ସମସ୍ତ ଯୋଜନା ଫେଲ୍ ମାରିଛି। ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶୁଭେନ୍ଦୁ ଅଧିକାରୀ କୌଣସି ବି ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀକୁ ଆଉ ବେଆଇନ ରାଜନୀତିକ ମଞ୍ଚ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରାଯିବ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ ସଂକେତ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ବିଜେପି ସରକାରର ରଣନୀତି ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ମମତା ବାନାର୍ଜୀ ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀର ଶୀର୍ଷ ନେତାମାନଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଥିବା ଦୁର୍ନୀତି ମାମଲାର ଯାଞ୍ଚ ପ୍ରକ୍ରିୟାକୁ ଅଧିକ ତ୍ବାରାନ୍ବିତ କରାଯାଇଛି। ଉତ୍ତେଜନାମୂଳକ ବୟାନ ପାଇଁ ହୁମାୟୁନ କବୀରଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଗମ୍ଭୀର ଆପରାଧିକ ମାମଲା ରୁଜୁ କରାଯାଇଛି।

title: മമ്മൂട്ടി- പ്രകാശ് വർമ ചിത്രം; രഞ്ജിത്തിന്റെ 'ലോ ആന്‍ഡ് ഓര്‍ഡർ' റിലീസ് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു
description: എട്ട് വർഷത്തെ ഇടവേളയ്ക്ക് ശേഷം രഞ്ജിത്ത് സംവിധാനം ചെയ്യുന്ന 'ലോ ആൻഡ് ഓർഡർ' റിലീസിന്. 2004-ലെ 'ബ്ലാക്ക്' എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിലെ കാരിക്കാമുറി ഷണ്മുഖൻ എന്ന കൾട്ട് കഥാപാത്രമായി മമ്മൂട്ടി വീണ്ടും എത്തുന്നു എന്നതാണ് ചിത്രത്തിന്റെ പ്രധാന ആകർഷണം.
content: <p><strong>എ</strong>ട്ട് വർഷത്തിന് ശേഷം രഞ്ജിത്ത് സംവിധാനം ചെയ്ത 'ലോ ആന്‍ഡ് ഓര്‍ഡർ' എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിന്റെ റിലീസ് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ചു. ചിത്രം 2026 ജൂലൈ 24ന് തിയറ്ററുകളിൽ എത്തും. റിലീസ് പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ച് കൊണ്ടുള്ള പുതിയ പോസ്റ്റർ അണിയറപ്രവർത്തകർ പുറത്തുവിട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്. 'തുടരും' ഫെയിം പ്രകാശ് വർമ്മയാണ് ചിത്രത്തിൽ കേന്ദ്രകഥാപാത്രമായി എത്തുന്നത്.</p><p>മമ്മൂട്ടി കൂട്ടുകെട്ടിൽ 2004 ൽ പുറത്തിറങ്ങിയ ബ്ലാക്ക് എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിലെ കൾട്ട് കഥാപാത്രം കാരിക്കാമുറി ഷണ്മുഖനായി മമ്മൂട്ടി വീണ്ടും എത്തുന്നു എന്നുള്ളതാണ് ലോ ആൻഡ് ഓർഡറിന്റെ യുഎസ്പി. അഭിരാമി, ഋതുദേവ് അയ്യപ്പൻ, ഷനൂദ് ഇബ്രാഹിം, ഡോൺ മൈക്കിൾ, സജൽ സുദർശനൻ, നിജാദ് ബാബു തോമസ്, ഷേർഷ ഷെരീഫ്, റിനോഷ് ജോർജ്ജ്, അമൽ ജോസ് ആന്റണി, ബോബി കുര്യൻ, വി കെ പ്രകാശ്, ദേവൻ, സുരേഷ് കൃഷ്ണ, ആനന്ദ് മന്മഥൻ, ജോയ് മാത്യു, ഭീമൻ രഘു, ജെയ്സ്, അസീം ജമാൽ, ജോണി ആന്റണി, അജയ് വാസുദേവ്, അക്ഷയ് രാധാകൃഷ്ണൻ, ശങ്കർ രാമകൃഷ്ണൻ, നന്ദൻ ഉണ്ണി, മോഹൻ ജോസ്, മാധുരി, സാബുമോൻ. ഗുണ്ട്കാട് സാബു, നന്ദു, മുരുകൻ, സന്ധ്യ രാജേന്ദ്രൻ, വൈഷ്ണവി, രമാദേവി, അംബിക നായർ തുടങ്ങിയവരാണ് ഈ ചിത്രത്തിലെ പ്രമുഖ താരങ്ങൾ.</p><p>സത്യം സിനിമാസ്, മഹാ സുബൈർ മൂവീക്ഷേത്ര എന്നി ബാനറുകളില്‍ പ്രേമചന്ദ്രൻ എ ജി, മഹാസുബൈർ എന്നിവർ ചേർന്ന് നിർമ്മിക്കുന്ന ഈ ചിത്രത്തിൻ്റെ ഛായാഗ്രഹണം പ്രശാന്ത് രവീന്ദ്രൻ നിർവ്വഹിക്കുന്നു. കഥ, തിരക്കഥ, സംഭാഷണം ഉദയ് കൃഷ്ണ എഴുതുന്നു. ഷിബു ചക്രവർത്തിയുടെ വരികൾക്ക് ജോ ഡാനിയൽ സംഗീതം പകരുന്നു. കപിൽ കപിലൻ, റ്റോജൻ റ്റോബി, അനില രാജീവ് എന്നിവരാണ് ഗായകർ.&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>പശ്ചാത്തല സംഗീതം ബിജിബാൽ, എഡിറ്റർ മനോജ് കണ്ണോത്ത്, ലൈൻ പ്രൊഡ്യൂസർ സുനിൽ സിംഗ്, എക്സിക്യൂട്ടീവ് പ്രൊഡ്യൂസർ അതുൽ പ്രേം, സൈനുദ്ദീൻ, പ്രൊഡക്ഷൻ കൺട്രോളർ പ്രശാന്ത് നാരായണൻ, പ്രൊഡക്ഷൻ ഡിസൈൻ സാബുറാം, വസ്ത്രാലങ്കാരം സമീറ സനീഷ്, മേക്കപ്പ് റോഷൻ എൻ ജി, സ്റ്റിൽസ് പ്രേംലാൽ പട്ടാഴി, പോസ്റ്റർ ഡിസൈൻ ആന്റണി സ്റ്റീഫൻ, അസോസിയേറ്റ് ഡയറക്ടർ ബോസ് വി, കാസ്റ്റിംഗ് ഡയറക്ടർ ശാലിനി, ശബ്ദമിശ്രണം വിഷ്ണു സുജാതൻ, സൗണ്ട് ഡിസൈനർ കിഷൻ സപ്താ, നൃത്ത സംവിധാനം ഷെരീഫ്, അർച്ചന, സംഘട്ടനം കലൈ കിങ്സ്റ്റൺ, ഫീനിക്സ് പ്രഭു, മാഫിയ ശശി, പി സി സ്റ്റണ്ട്സ്, പി ആർ ഒ- വാഴൂര്‍ ജോസ്, ഡിജിറ്റൽ മാർക്കറ്റിംഗ് ഒബ്സ്ക്യൂറ എന്‍റര്‍ടെയ്ന്‍‍മെന്‍റ്.</p><p></p>

title: Top prospects Hernandez, Florentino to represent Pirates at futures game
description: The Pirates top two prospects will represent the organization at the Futures Game during All-Star weekend.
content: This article originally appeared on PGHBaseballNOW.com.The Pirates top two prospects will represent the organization at the Futures Game during All-Star weekend. Right-handed pitcher Seth Hernandez and outfielder Edward Florentino — both considered top 100 prospects — will be at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia on July 12 for the game.The Pirates promoted Hernandez to High-A Greensboro on May 12, where he’s gone 3-1 with a 2.88 ERA, 21 hits, 21 walks and 50 strikeouts in 34.1 innings across eight starts. Pittsburgh’s top prospect was the first minor-league pitcher this season to notch 100 strikeouts.Florentino, meanwhile, has totaled 53 games between Bradenton (nine) and Greensboro (53) this season. Between the two levels, the 19-year-old has a .230/.372/.435 batting line with seven doubles, one triple, 10 home runs, 38 RBI and five stolen bases. title: കുംഭമേള വൈറൽ താരത്തിന്റെ വിവാഹം: ഭർത്താവിന്റെ മുൻകൂർ ജാമ്യാപേക്ഷ തള്ളി മധ്യപ്രദേശ് കോടതി, കേരള ഹൈക്കോടതിയെ സമീപിച്ച് ഫർമാൻ
description: അറസ്റ്റ് തടഞ്ഞുള്ള ഉത്തരവ് നീട്ടണമെന്ന് ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ട്, ജാമ്യത്തിനായി മധ്യപ്രദേശ് കോടതിയെ സമീപിക്കാൻ ഫർമാന് ഒരു മാസത്തെ സാവകാശം കേരള ഹൈകോടതി നൽകിയിരുന്നു.
content: <p><strong>ഭോപ്പാൽ</strong>: കൊച്ചി കുംഭമേള വൈറൽ താരത്തിന്റെ വിവാഹവുമായി ബന്ധപ്പെട്ട കേസിൽ ഭർത്താവ് ഫർമാന്റെ മുൻകൂർ ജാമ്യഹർജി മധ്യപ്രദേശ് കോടതി തള്ളി. മഹേശ്വറിലെ പ്രത്യേക പോക്സോ കോടതിയാണ് മുൻകൂർ ജാമ്യാപേക്ഷ തള്ളിയത്. കൊച്ചിയിൽ തുടരുന്ന ഫർമാനും പെൺകുട്ടിയും പൊലീസ് സംരക്ഷണം നീട്ടണമെന്നാവശ്യപ്പെട്ട് ഇന്ന് ഹൈക്കോടതിയെ സമീപിച്ചിരുന്നു. മധ്യപ്രദേശ് കോടതി മുൻകൂർ ജാമ്യം തള്ളിയത് ഹൈക്കോടതിയെ അറിയിച്ചിട്ടില്ല.&nbsp;</p><p>അറസ്റ്റ് തടഞ്ഞുള്ള ഉത്തരവ് നീട്ടണമെന്ന് ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ട്, ജാമ്യത്തിനായി മധ്യപ്രദേശ് കോടതിയെ സമീപിക്കാൻ ഫർമാന് ഒരു മാസത്തെ സാവകാശം കേരള ഹൈകോടതി നൽകിയിരുന്നു. മധ്യപ്രദേശ് പ്രത്യേക കോടതി ജാമ്യഹർജി തള്ളിയ സാഹചര്യത്തിലാണ് വീണ്ടും കേരള ഹൈകോടതിയെ സമീപിച്ചത്. ഹർജി നാളെ ഹൈകോടതി പരിഗണിക്കും.</p>

title: OnePlus का सस्ता 5G फोन लॉन्च, 8,000mAh बैटरी, 3 दिन का बैकअप और 3,000 तक की छूट, मिडिल क्लास हो जाएगा खुश
description: OnePlus N6 Price: एक दमदार बैटरी और भरोसेमंद परफॉर्मेंस वाला नया स्मार्टफोन खरीदना चाहते हैं तो OnePlus ने आपके लिए बड़ी खुशखबरी लाई है। कंपनी ने भारत में अपना नया बजट 5G स्मार्टफोन लॉन्च किया है।
content:
OnePlus N6 Battery Capacity: आपका भी बजट कम है लोकिन उसमें आप एक दमदार बैटरी और भरोसेमंद परफॉर्मेंस वाला नया स्मार्टफोन खरीदना चाहते हैं तो OnePlus ने आपके लिए बड़ी खुशखबरी लाई है। बता दें कि कंपनी ने भारत में अपना नया बजट 5G स्मार्टफोन OnePlus N6 लॉन्च कर दिया है। यह N सीरीज का लेटेस्ट स्मार्टफोन है जिसमें 8,000mAh की बड़ी बैटरी, MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex प्रोसेसर और 120Hz डिस्प्ले जैसे फीचर्स दिए गए हैं। वहीं खास बात यह है कि लॉन्च ऑफर्स के तहत ग्राहकों को हजारों रुपये की बचत का मौका भी मिलेगा।
कीमत और पहली सेल की पूरी जानकारी
जानकारी के लिए बता दें कि OnePlus N6 को दो स्टोरेज वेरिएंट में लॉन्च किया गया है। जिसमें पहला 4GB RAM + 128GB स्टोरेज मॉडल 22,999 रुपये में उपलब्ध होगा। वहीं दूसरा 6GB RAM + 128GB वेरिएंट की कीमत 24,999 रुपये रखी गई है।
इसके अलावा फोन की पहली बिक्री 4 जुलाई से Amazon Prime Day Sale के दौरान शुरू की जाएगी। जहां ग्राहक इस फोन को Fresh Mint और Midnight Green कलर ऑप्शन में खरीद सकते है। इतना ही नहीं लॉन्च ऑफर के तहत कंपनी 1,000 रुपये का इंस्टेंट डिस्काउंट भी दे रही है। वहीं Axis Bank और SBI क्रेडिट कार्ड से भुगतान करने पर 2,000 रुपये तक की अतिरिक्त छूट भी मिलने वाली है। इसके अलावा 6 महीने की नो-कॉस्ट EMI का विकल्प भी ग्राहकों को दिया जाएगा।
डिस्प्ले और परफॉर्मेंस में नहीं होगा समझौता
आपने फोन को खास बनाने के लिए OnePlus N6 में 6.75 इंच का HD LCD डिस्प्ले दिया गया है जो 120Hz रिफ्रेश रेट और 1,200 निट्स पीक ब्राइटनेस के साथ आता है। फोन Android 16 आधारित OxygenOS 16 पर चलता है और कंपनी इसमें 2 साल के OS अपडेट तथा 3 साल तक सिक्योरिटी अपडेट देने का वादा कर रही है। वहीं स्मार्टफोन MediaTek Dimensity 6360 Apex चिपसेट से लैस है। जिसने AnTuTu बेंचमार्क पर 6,15,800 से ज्यादा स्कोर हासिल किया है। इसके अलावा बेहतर गेमिंग और हीट कंट्रोल के लिए इसमें बड़ा Vapor Chamber Cooling System भी शामिल किए गए है।
ये भी पढ़े:  Google का नया AI मॉडल मचाएगा तहलका, सिर्फ 4 सेकंड में तैयार होगी फोटो, कीमत भी रहेगी कम
50MP कैमरा और 3 दिन तक चलने वाली बैटरी
इस फोन में फोटोग्राफी के लिए फोन में 50MP का रियर कैमरा और 8MP का फ्रंट कैमरा दिया जा रहा है। इसके साथ आप 1080p/60fps वीडियो रिकॉर्डिंग और Dual-View Video Mode को भी इस्तेमाल कर पाएगे।
वहीं हर एक फोन के लिए सबसे जरूरी फीचर उसकी बैटरी होती है जो इस फोन में 8,000mAh वाली मिल रही है। इसको लेकर कंपनी का दावा है कि सामान्य उपयोग में यह एक बार चार्ज करने पर 3 दिन तक चल सकती है। जिसके साथ 45W फास्ट चार्जिंग और 6.5W रिवर्स वायर्ड चार्जिंग का सपोर्ट भी दिया गया है। जो सभी फीचर्स को मिलाकर इस फोन को शानदार विकल्प बनाता है।

title: I've subscribed to Netflix and Peacock for years - but only one service is worth resubscribing to
description: Netflix has award-winning originals and a smart algorithm, but Peacock counters with live sports and a lower price.

title: গুৱাহাটীৰ বিৰুবাৰীত তিনিদিনীয়া গ্ৰীষ্মকালীন শিবিৰ...
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ অসম তথা উত্তৰ-পূব ভাৰতৰ শিশু আৰু বাধাগ্রস্ত ব্যক্তিৰ বাবে ১৯৮৭ চনৰ পৰা কাম কৰি থকা পঞ্জীয়নভুক্ত বেচৰকাৰী সংস্থা শিশু সাৰথিয়ে সকলোৰে বাবে সমতাপূৰ্ণ শিক্ষা প্ৰকল্পৰ অধীনত ২০২৬ চনৰ ১ জুলাইৰ পৰা ৩ জুলাইলৈ গুৱাহাটীৰ বিৰুবাৰী চৌহদত তিনিদিনীয়া গ্ৰীষ্মকালীন শিবিৰৰ আয়োজন কৰিছে। এই শিবিৰৰ লক্ষ্য হ'ল- বিভিন্ন আকৰ্ষণীয় কাৰ্য্যকলাপৰ জৰিয়তে ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীৰ আত্মবিশ্বাস, যোগাযোগ, সামাজিকৰণ, সৃষ্টিশীলতা, আৰু সামগ্ৰিক বিকাশ বৃদ্ধি কৰা।
প্ৰথম দিনটোত প্ৰায় সংখ্যক ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীয়ে শাৰীৰিক যোগ্যতা, দলীয় কাম, সৃষ্টিশীলতা, আৰু আত্মপ্ৰকাশৰ প্ৰসাৰ ঘটাই এক সজীৱ নৃত্যত অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰে। ইয়াৰোপৰি ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্রীসকলে কলা আৰু কিছু শিল্প কাৰ্য্যকলাপত অংশগ্ৰহণ কৰে। লগতে এই শিবিৰত ৰং কৰা, কাগজ ভাঁজ কৰা, আঙুলিৰ ছাপ দিয়া আৰু আঠা লগোৱা কাৰ্য্যকলাপৰ জৰিয়তে সুক্ষ্মভাৱে হাতেৰে কৰিব পৰা কামৰ দক্ষতা বিকাশৰ ওপৰতো গুৰুত্ব আৰোপ কৰা হৈছে। 
দ্বিতীয় দিনা ফল-মূলেৰে চালাদ বনোৱা শিকোৱা হ'ব, য'ত জুই নোহোৱাকৈ খাদ্য প্ৰস্তুত কৰিব আৰু ছাত্ৰ-ছাত্ৰীক স্বাস্থ্যসন্মত খাদ্যাভ্যাস গঢ়ি তুলিবলৈ উৎসাহিত কৰা হ'ব। এনে কাৰ্যসূচীৰে সুস্থ অভ্যাস, সহযোগিতা আৰু সক্ৰিয় অংশগ্ৰহণক উৎসাহিত কৰিব পাৰি। তৃতীয় দিনা মনোৰঞ্জনমূলক আৰু শিক্ষামূলক পুতলা নাচ প্ৰদৰ্শনেৰে শিবিৰৰ সামৰণি পৰিব।
প্ৰতি বছৰৰ দৰেই গ্ৰীষ্মকালীন শিবিৰে এক আনন্দময় আৰু অন্তৰ্ভুক্ত শিক্ষণ পৰিৱেশ প্ৰদান কৰে, যাৰ ফলত সকলো বাধা নেওচি শিশুসকলে সমাজৰ এক অংশ হোৱাৰ অনুভূতি লাভ কৰাৰ লগতে সম-অধিকাৰেৰে যে এক সুস্থ আৰু ধনাত্মক যোগাযোগ সক্ষম হৈ উঠে, তাৰ অভিজ্ঞতা আহৰণ কৰে।

title: 15-year-old prodigy Sooryavanshi left out again by India for 1st T20 against England
description: CHESTER-LE-STREET, England (AP) — India left out 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again for the start of its five-match T20 series against England.  The tourists kept faith with openers Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma for the first T20 at Chester-le-Street on Wednesday as they looked to bounce back from a shocking 2-0 series loss to Ireland in the same format last week.  India won the toss and opted to bat first.
content: CHESTER-LE-STREET, England (AP) — India left out 15-year-old prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi once again for the start of its five-match T20 series against England.The tourists kept faith with openers Sanju Samson and Abhishek Sharma for the first T20 at Chester-le-Street on Wednesday as they looked to bounce back from a shocking 2-0 series loss to Ireland in the same format last week.India won the toss and opted to bat first.Sooryavanshi was a compelling option at the top of the order, though. He was picked in the squad for the tour of Ireland and England after scoring 776 runs in 16 innings in the 2026 Indian Premier League and being voted as the competition's MVP.If he makes his debut later in the series, Sooryavanshi — who is aged 15 years and 96 days — will become the youngest player to feature in a top-tier men’s T20. Ireland’s Joshua Little holds the record — he was 16 years and 309 days in his debut in the format.Sooryavanshi would become the youngest-ever player in India’s senior men’s team. The great Sachin Tendulkar was 16 years and 205 days when he made his test debut in 1989, then made his ODI debut 33 days later.The youngest-ever player in men’s international cricket remains Hasan Raza, who was 14 years and 227 days when he made his test debut for Pakistan in 1996.___AP cricket: https://apnews.com/hub/cricket

title: England Vs DR Congo, FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 Live Score: Cipenga Gives Shock Early Lead To Congo | ENG 0-1 COD
description: England Vs DR Congo, FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 32 Live Score: England are all set to take on DR Congo in a crucial FIFA World Cup 2026 Round Of 32 Match at the Atlanta StadiumEngland won its group, but Thomas Tuchel still has one big decision to make and one injury-induced adjustment to make. Should he continue with Marcus Rashford on the left wing instead of Gordon? And who does he replace at right back, as first James and then Quansah have been injured? The likely replacement is Djed Spence. Whoever gets the nod, England has looked most dangerous when the wide players attack defenders and free up space for Jude Bellingham and Harry Kane in the middle.DR Congo has become one of the surprise packages of the FIFA World Cup. They've defended with discipline, stayed compact and made life uncomfortable for every opponent. Wissa, who is very familiar with the England team given his long Premier League experience at Brentford and Newcastle, has been their biggest attacking threat, while Mbemba has marshalled a back line that has rarely been pulled out of shape. Aaron Wan-Bissaka has been immense at right back and will relish matching up with his old Manchester United teammate Marcus Rashford.

title: Israel:ଆମେରିକା-ଇରାନ ଚୁକ୍ତିକୁ ମାନିବନି ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ହେଲେ ଇରାନ ଉପରେ ପୁଣି ଆକ୍ରମଣ
description:
ତେଲ୍ ଅଭିଭ୍: ଆମେରିକା-ଇରାନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଆଞ୍ଚଳିକ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ହ୍ରାସ ପାଇଁ କୂଟନୈତିକ ସ୍ତରରେ ଆଲୋଚନା ଜାରି ରହିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବେଞ୍ଜାମିନ ନେତନ୍ୟାହୁ ଏକ ବଡ଼ ବୟାନ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଇରାନକୁ ପରମାଣୁ ଅସ୍ତ୍ର ହାସଲ କରିବାରୁ ରୋକିବା ପାଇଁ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଆବଶ୍ୟକ ପଡ଼ିଲେ ପୁଣି ଥରେ ସାମରିକ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ବୋଲି ସେ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଏକ ସାକ୍ଷାତକାରରେ ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ପୂର୍ବରୁ ନିଜକୁ ପରମାଣୁ ବୋମା ଆକ୍ରମଣରୁ ରକ୍ଷା କରିଛି ଏବଂ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତି ବିପଦ ଦେଖାଦେଲେ ତୃତୀୟ ଥର ପାଇଁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିବାକୁ ପଛାଇବ ନାହିଁ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tiger Skin Seized ଓଡ଼ିଶା-ଛତିଶଗଡ଼ ସୀମାନ୍ତ  ମହାବଳ ବାଘ ଛାଲ ଜବତ, ୨ ଗିରଫ
ଆମେରିକା ଓ ଇରାନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ କତର ମଧ୍ୟସ୍ଥତାରେ ଏକ ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ ହେବାକୁ ଯାଉଥିବା ସମୟରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲର ଏହି ଆଭିମୁଖ୍ୟ ପରିସ୍ଥିତିକୁ ଜଟିଳ କରିଦେଇଛି। ପ୍ରସ୍ତାବିତ ଆମେରିକା-ଇରାନ ଚୁକ୍ତି ଅନୁଯାୟୀ, ଉଭୟ ପକ୍ଷ ସାମରିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ବନ୍ଦ କରିବା, ହର୍ମୁଜ ପ୍ରଣାଳୀକୁ ପୁନଃ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ଷମ କରିବା ଏବଂ କଟକଣା କୋହଳ କରିବା ସହ ଇରାନର ପରମାଣୁ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକ୍ରମ ଉପରେ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣ ରଖିବାକୁ ସହମତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ମାତ୍ର ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ଏହି ଚୁକ୍ତିନାମା ଦ୍ବାରା ବନ୍ଧା ନୁହେଁ। ଯଦି ଇରାନର ସାମରିକ କିମ୍ବା ପରମାଣୁ କ୍ଷମତା ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ଭାବେ ନଷ୍ଟ ନହୁଏ, ତେବେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ନିଜ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ଏକପାଖିଆ ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ନେବ। ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ଆମେରିକା ରାଷ୍ଟ୍ରପତିଡୋନାଲ୍ଡ ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଏହି ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗରେ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲକୁ ସଂଯମତା ରକ୍ଷା କରିବାକୁ ପରାମର୍ଶ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଟ୍ରମ୍ପ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ଯଦି ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ପୁଣି ଥରେ ବଡ଼ ଧରଣର ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରେ, ତେବେ ଏହା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସ୍ତରରେ ଏକଘରିକିଆ ହୋଇଯାଇପାରେ ଏବଂ ଆମେରିକା ମଧ୍ୟ ତାର ସାମରିକ ସହାୟତା ବନ୍ଦ କରିପାରେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Odisha textbook errors ଓଡ଼ିଶା ପାଠ୍ୟପୁସ୍ତକ ତ୍ରୁଟି ବିବାଦ: ଅନ୍‌ଲାଇନ୍‌ରେ ମିଳିବ ସଂଶୋଧିତ ପୁସ୍ତକ
ଏହି ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ନେତାନ୍ୟାହୁ ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଲେବାନନର ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ନିୟନ୍ତ୍ରଣରେ ଥିବା ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ପରିଦର୍ଶନ କରି ସେନା ବାହିନୀକୁ ଉଦ୍‌ବୋଧନ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ପରିସ୍ଥିତି ସ୍ବାଭାବିକ ନହେବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଏବଂ ହେବଜବୁଲ୍ଲାର ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ମୂଳପୋଛ ନହେବା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଇସ୍ରାଏଲ ସେନା ଦକ୍ଷିଣ ଲେବାନନ ଛାଡ଼ିବ ନାହିଁ।

title: Healthy Habits: बारिश के मौसम में बढ़ जाता है संक्रमण का खतरा, स्वस्थ रहने के लिए अपनाएं ये 5 जरूरी आदतें
description: Healthy Habits Rainy: बारिश के मौसम में संक्रमण और मौसमी बीमारियों का खतरा बढ़ जाता है। ऐसे में ये 5 आसान और जरूरी आदतें अपनाकर आप अपनी इम्यूनिटी मजबूत रख सकते हैं और पूरे मौसम स्वस्थ रह सकते है।
content:
Healthy Habits During Monsoon : बारिश का मौसम अपने साथ ठंडक और सुकून जरूर लेकर आता है, लेकिन यही मौसम कई तरह की संक्रामक बीमारियों को भी बढ़ावा देता है। नमी बढ़ने और जगह-जगह पानी जमा होने की वजह से डेंगू, मलेरिया, वायरल फीवर, सर्दी-जुकाम, फंगल इंफेक्शन और पेट से जुड़ी समस्याओं का खतरा काफी बढ़ जाता है।
ऐसे में थोड़ी-सी सावधानी और सही दिनचर्या अपनाकर इन बीमारियों से काफी हद तक बचा जा सकता है। साफ-सफाई, संतुलित खानपान और कुछ जरूरी स्वास्थ्य नियम मानसून में आपको फिट और सुरक्षित रखने में मदद करते हैं।आइए जानते हैं बारिश के मौसम में स्वस्थ रहने के लिए किन बातों का विशेष ध्यान रखना चाहिए।
1. हमेशा शुद्ध और सुरक्षित पानी का ही सेवन करें
मानसून के दौरान पानी के दूषित होने की संभावना बढ़ जाती है। बारिश के कारण पाइपलाइन या जल स्रोतों में बैक्टीरिया, वायरस और अन्य हानिकारक जीवाणु मिल सकते हैं। ऐसे पानी के सेवन से डायरिया, टाइफाइड, हैजा और पेट के संक्रमण जैसी समस्याएं हो सकती हैं।
इसलिए हमेशा उबला हुआ, फिल्टर किया हुआ या अच्छी गुणवत्ता वाला पैक्ड पानी ही पिएं। यदि बाहर यात्रा कर रहे हैं, तो पानी की स्वच्छता का विशेष ध्यान रखें।
2. व्यक्तिगत साफ-सफाई को बिल्कुल नजरअंदाज न करें
बारिश के मौसम में त्वचा लंबे समय तक नमी के संपर्क में रहती है, जिससे फंगल और बैक्टीरियल संक्रमण का खतरा बढ़ जाता है। इसलिए रोजाना स्नान करें, भीगने के बाद तुरंत सूखे कपड़े पहनें और हाथों को समय-समय पर साबुन से धोते रहें।खासतौर पर बगल, पैर की उंगलियों और त्वचा की सिलवटों को अच्छी तरह साफ और सूखा रखना जरूरी है।
3. खानपान ऐसा रखें जो शरीर की रोग प्रतिरोधक क्षमता बढ़ाए
मानसून में संक्रमण तेजी से फैलता है, इसलिए मजबूत इम्यूनिटी बेहद जरूरी है। अपनी डाइट में विटामिन C से भरपूर फल, मौसमी हरी सब्जियां और ताजा व हल्का भोजन शामिल करें।इसके अलावा अदरक, हल्दी और तुलसी जैसे प्राकृतिक खाद्य पदार्थ भी शरीर की रोग प्रतिरोधक क्षमता को मजबूत बनाने में मददगार माने जाते हैं।
ये भी पढ़ें&#8211;30 के बाद किडनी और लिवर को अंदर से साफ रखने का ‘देसी राज’! डॉक्टर ने बताए 5 फूड्स के बारें में
4. मच्छरों से बचाव के लिए पहले से करें तैयारी
बारिश के बाद जमा हुआ पानी मच्छरों के पनपने की सबसे बड़ी वजह बनता है। यही मच्छर डेंगू और मलेरिया जैसी गंभीर बीमारियां फैलाते हैं।
इसलिए घर और आसपास कहीं भी पानी जमा न होने दें। सोते समय मच्छरदानी का इस्तेमाल करें, जरूरत पड़ने पर मच्छर भगाने वाले रिपेलेंट लगाएं और घर के आसपास नियमित साफ-सफाई बनाए रखें।
30 के बाद किडनी और लिवर को अंदर से साफ रखने का ‘देसी राज’! डॉक्टर ने बताए 5 फूड्स के बारें में
5. बारिश में बाहर का खाना खाने से करें परहेज
मानसून में खुले में मिलने वाला खाना जल्दी दूषित हो सकता है। सड़क किनारे बिकने वाले खाद्य पदार्थों पर मक्खियां, धूल और नमी का असर अधिक होता है, जिससे फूड पॉइजनिंग, उल्टी, दस्त और पेट दर्द जैसी समस्याएं हो सकती हैं। इस मौसम में हमेशा घर का ताजा, गर्म और साफ-सुथरा भोजन ही खाना सबसे सुरक्षित माना जाता है।
मानसून में रखें सेहत का खास ख्याल
बारिश का आनंद तभी लिया जा सकता है, जब आपकी सेहत अच्छी रहे। अगर आप शुद्ध पानी पीने, साफ-सफाई रखने, पौष्टिक भोजन खाने, मच्छरों से बचाव करने और बाहर के खाने से परहेज जैसी आदतों को अपनाते हैं, तो मानसून में होने वाली कई मौसमी बीमारियों से खुद और अपने परिवार को सुरक्षित रख सकते हैं।

title: Bilawal Bhutto:ଭାରତକୁ ବିଲାୱଲ ଭୁଟ୍ଟୋଙ୍କ ଚେତାବନୀ: ସିନ୍ଧୁ ନଦୀ ଜଳ ରୋକିଲେ ପରମାଣୁ ମହାଯୁଦ୍ଧ
description:
ଇସଲାମାବାଦ: ଭାରତ-ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଚାଲିଥିବା ସିନ୍ଧୁ ଜଳ ଚୁକ୍ତି ବିବାଦ ଏବେ ଗମ୍ଭୀର ମୋଡ଼ ନେଇଛି। ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ପିପୁଲ୍ସ ପାର୍ଟି (ପିପିପି)ର ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ବିଲାୱଲ ଭୁଟ୍ଟୋ ଏହି ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗରେ ସିଧାସଳଖ ପରମାଣୁ ଯୁଦ୍ଧର ଆଶଙ୍କା ପ୍ରକଟ କରି ଭାରତକୁ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ସିନ୍ଧୁ ନଦୀ ଜଳକୁ ରୋକିବା ପାଇଁ କରାଯାଉଥିବା ଯେକୌଣସି ପ୍ରୟାସକୁ ଦେଶର ଜାତୀୟ ସୁରକ୍ଷା ଏବଂ ଅସ୍ତିତ୍ୱ ପ୍ରତି ଏକ ବଡ଼ ବିପଦ ଭାବେ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି। ଏଭଳି ସ୍ଥିତିରେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ନିଜର ଜଳ ଅଧିକାର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ପରମାଣୁ ଆକ୍ରମଣ ଭଳି ଚରମ ପଦକ୍ଷେପ ନେବାକୁ ପଛାଇବ ନାହିଁ ବୋଲି ବିଲାୱଲ ସ୍ପଷ୍ଟ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tamil Nadu goverment:ଗୋହତ୍ୟା ନିଷେଧ ପ୍ରସଙ୍ଗ: ମାଡ୍ରାସ ହାଇକୋର୍ଟଙ୍କ ରାୟକୁ ସୁପ୍ରିମ୍‌କୋର୍ଟରେ ଚ୍ୟାଲେଞ୍ଜ କଲେ ତାମିଲନାଡୁ ସରକାର
ସଲାମାବାଦରେ ଆୟୋଜିତ ଏକ ଅନ୍ତର୍ଜାତୀୟ ସେମିନାରରେ ଉଦ୍‌ବୋଧନ ଦେଇ ପିପିପି ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଏହି ବିବାଦକୁ କେବଳ ପରିବେଶ କିମ୍ବା କୂଟନୈତିକ ଦୃଷ୍ଟିକୋଣରୁ ଦେଖାଯିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। ଏହା ସିଧାସଳଖ ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ବଞ୍ଚିବା ଏବଂ ଅର୍ଥନୀତି ସହ ଜଡ଼ିତ। ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ପରମାଣୁ ନୀତିର ଉଦାହରଣ ଦେଇ ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ, ଯଦି କୌଣସି ପରିସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଦେଶର ଅର୍ଥନୀତିକୁ ସ୍ଥାଣୁ କରିବାକୁ ଚେଷ୍ଟା କରାଯାଏ କିମ୍ବା ଜଳପଥ ଅବରୋଧ କରାଯାଏ, ତେବେ ତାହା ପରମାଣୁ ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟାକୁ ଆମନ୍ତ୍ରଣ କରିବ। ଭାରତର ‘ନୋ ଫାଷ୍ଟ ୟୁଜ୍‌’ (ପ୍ରଥମେ ପରମାଣୁ ଅସ୍ତ୍ର ବ୍ୟବହାର ନକରିବା) ନୀତି ଥିବାବେଳେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଏଭଳି କୌଣସି ପ୍ରତିବଦ୍ଧତା ନାହିଁ। ଦେଶର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପ୍ରତି ବଡ଼ ବିପଦ ଦେଖାଦେଲେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ପୂର୍ଣ-କ୍ଷମତା ବିଶିଷ୍ଟ ପରମାଣୁପ୍ରତିରୋଧକ ବ୍ୟବସ୍ଥା ଆଧାରରେ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଆକ୍ରମଣ କରିବାର ବିକଳ୍ପ ରଖିଛି ବୋଲି ସେ ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଛନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tiger Skin Seized ଓଡ଼ିଶା-ଛତିଶଗଡ଼ ସୀମାନ୍ତ  ମହାବଳ ବାଘ ଛାଲ ଜବତ, ୨ ଗିରଫ
ଉଲ୍ଲେଖଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ପହଲଗାମରେ ହୋଇଥିବା ଆତଙ୍କବାଦୀ ଆକ୍ରମଣର ଜବାବରେ ଗତ ବର୍ଷ ଭାରତ ୧୯୬୦ ମସିହାର ସିନ୍ଧୁ ଜଳଚୁକ୍ତିକୁ ସ୍ଥଗିତ ରଖିଥିଲା। ଭାରତର ଏହି ନିଷ୍ପତ୍ତି ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ପାଇଁ ଘାତକ ହୋଇଛି, କାରଣ ଦେଶର ପ୍ରାୟ ୮୦ ପ୍ରତିଶତ ଚାଷ ଜମି ସିନ୍ଧୁ ନଦୀ ଜଳ ଉପରେ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ ନିର୍ଭର କରିଥାଏ। ଏହି କାରଣରୁ ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ଏବେ ବିଶ୍ୱ ସମୁଦାୟର ଦୃଷ୍ଟି ଆକର୍ଷଣ କରିବାକୁ ଏହି ସେମିନାର ଆୟୋଜନ କରିଥିଲା, ଯେଉଁଠାରେ ଭୁଟ୍ଟୋ ଭାରତ ଉପରେ ଜଳକୁ ଏକ ଚାପ ପ୍ରୟୋଗର ଅସ୍ତ୍ର ଭାବେ ବ୍ୟବହାର କରୁଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଆଣିଛନ୍ତି। ଭୁଟ୍ଟୋ ନିଜ ଭାଷଣରେ କହିଛନ୍ତି ଯେ ସିନ୍ଧୁ ନଦୀ କୌଣସି ବୁଝାମଣାର ମାଧ୍ୟମ ନୁହେଁ, ବରଂ ଏହା ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଜୀବନରେଖା।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tiger Skin Seized ଓଡ଼ିଶା-ଛତିଶଗଡ଼ ସୀମାନ୍ତ  ମହାବଳ ବାଘ ଛାଲ ଜବତ, ୨ ଗିରଫ
 ସେ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଯଦି କେହି ଭାବୁଥାନ୍ତି ଯେ ପାକିସ୍ତାନନିଜର ଜଳ ଅଧିକାର ସମର୍ପଣ କରିଦେବ, ତେବେ ସେମାନେ ସିନ୍ଧ, ପଞ୍ଜାବ, ବଲୁଚିସ୍ତାନ, ଖାଇବର ପାଖ୍‌ତୁନଖ୍ୱା, କାଶ୍ମୀର କିମ୍ବା ଗିଲ୍‌ଗିଟ୍ ବାଲ୍‌ଟିସ୍ତାନର ଜନତାଙ୍କୁ ଚିହ୍ନିନାହାନ୍ତି। ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ନିଜର ଜଳ, ସାର୍ବଭୌମତ୍ୱ ଏବଂ ଭବିଷ୍ୟତର ସୁରକ୍ଷା ପାଇଁ ମିଳିତ ସୈନ୍ୟ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟାନୁଷ୍ଠାନ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିବାକୁ ପ୍ରସ୍ତୁତ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି। ସିନ୍ଧୁ ଜଳକୁ ନେଇ ପାକିସ୍ତାନର ଏଭଳି ପରମାଣୁ ଧମକ ପରେ ଭାରତ-ପାକିସ୍ତାନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ସାମରିକ ତଥା କୂଟନୈତିକ ଉତ୍ତେଜନା ବୃଦ୍ଧି ପାଇବା ଆଶଙ୍କା ରହିଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tamil Nadu:୩୫ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ପ୍ରଲୋଭନ ଦେଇ ବିଜୟ ସରକାରକୁ ଭାଙ୍ଗିବାକୁ ଷଡ଼୍‌ଯନ୍ତ୍ର ଅଭିଯୋଗ, ୩ ଗିରଫ
ସୂଚନାଯୋଗ୍ୟ, ଏହା ପୂର୍ବରୁ ୨୦୨୫ ଏପ୍ରିଲ ମାସରେ ଯେତେବେଳେ ଭାରତ ସିନ୍ଧୁ ଜଳ ଚୁକ୍ତିକୁ ସାମୟିକ ଭାବେ ସ୍ଥଗିତ ରଖିଥିଲା, ସେତେବେଳେ ମଧ୍ୟ ଭୁଟ୍ଟୋ ଭାରତକୁ ଚେତାବନୀ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ସେହି ସମୟରେ ସେ ଅତ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆପତ୍ତିଜନକ ବୟାନ ଦେଇ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ’ସିନ୍ଧୁ ନଦୀ ଆମର ଏବଂ ଆମର ହୋଇ ରହିବ; ଏଥିରେ ଆମ ପାଣି ବହିବ ନଚେତ୍ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ରକ୍ତ।’

title: ପାରିବାରିକ କଳହ ହେଲା କାଳ, ଦିଅରର ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଚାଲିଗଲା ଭାଉଜଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ
description:
ବେଲଗୁଣ୍ଠା,୧ା୭( କୃଷ୍ଣ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): ଘରୋଇ ଅଶାନ୍ତିରୁ ଚାଲିଗଲା ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ। ଏହିଭଳି ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି ବେଲଗୁଣ୍ଠା ବ୍ଳକ୍ ତଥା ଗାଙ୍ଗପୁର ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ପାଲକଷଣ୍ଢା ଗ୍ରାମରେ। ଦୁଇ ପରିବାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହଣାକଟା ଘଟି ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ତାଙ୍କ ପୁଅ ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି। ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ମହିଳା ଜଣଙ୍କ ହେଲେ ପାଲକଷଣ୍ଢା ଗ୍ରାମର ଭାସି ପ୍ରଧାନ (୪୫)। ସେ ଗ୍ରାମରେ ଛେଳି ଚରାଇ […]
The post ପାରିବାରିକ କଳହ ହେଲା କାଳ, ଦିଅରର ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଚାଲିଗଲା ଭାଉଜଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ବେଲଗୁଣ୍ଠା,୧ା୭( କୃଷ୍ଣ ଚନ୍ଦ୍ର ପଟ୍ଟନାୟକ): ଘରୋଇ ଅଶାନ୍ତିରୁ ଚାଲିଗଲା ମହିଳାଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ। ଏହିଭଳି ଅଭାବନୀୟ ଘଟଣା ଦେଖିବାକୁ ମିଳିଛି ବେଲଗୁଣ୍ଠା ବ୍ଳକ୍ ତଥା ଗାଙ୍ଗପୁର ଥାନା ଅନ୍ତର୍ଗତ ପାଲକଷଣ୍ଢା ଗ୍ରାମରେ। ଦୁଇ ପରିବାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହଣାକଟା ଘଟି ଜଣେ ମହିଳା ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ବେଳେ ତାଙ୍କ ପୁଅ ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଥିବା ସୂଚନା ମିଳିଛି। ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ମହିଳା ଜଣଙ୍କ ହେଲେ ପାଲକଷଣ୍ଢା ଗ୍ରାମର ଭାସି ପ୍ରଧାନ (୪୫)। ସେ ଗ୍ରାମରେ ଛେଳି ଚରାଇ ନିଜ ପରିବାରର ଜୀବିକା ନିର୍ବାହ କରୁଥିଲେ।
ମିଳିଥିବା ଖବର ପ୍ରକାରେ କିଛି ଦିନ ହେବ ଭାସିଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ଦିଅର ମୁରଲୀ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଅଶାନ୍ତି ଲାଗି ରହିଥିଲା। ଗ୍ରାମର କିଛି ପ୍ରତ୍ୟକ୍ଷଦର୍ଶୀଙ୍କ ଠାରୁ ମିଳିଥିବା ସୂଚନା ପ୍ରକାରେ ଗତକାଲି ଅର୍ଥାତ୍ ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ଦିନ ଭାସି ପ୍ରଧାନ ଏବଂ ମୁରଲୀ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ବଚସା ହୋଇଥିଲା। ଆଜି ଅପରାହ୍ନ ଚାରି ଘଣ୍ଟା ସମୟରେ ଭାସି ପ୍ରଧାନ ପାଲକଷଣ୍ଢା ଗ୍ରାମର ମନ୍ଦିର ନିକଟରେ ଥିବା ଜମିରେ ଛେଳି ଚରାଉ ଥିବା ବେଳେ ଛେଳି ପଲ ମୁରଲୀଙ୍କ ରାଶି କ୍ଷେତରେ ପଶିଯାଇଥିଲେ। ଏହାକୁ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କରି ମୁରଲୀଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ଏବଂ ଭାସି ମଧ୍ୟରେ ପୁଣି ବଚସା ହେବା ସହିତ ଏହା ହଣାକଟାର ସୂତ୍ରପାତ ହୋଇଥିଲା।
ଉଭୟ ପରିବାର ମଧ୍ୟରେ ହୋଇଥିଲା ହଣାକଟା। ଭାସିଙ୍କ ଟାଙ୍ଗିଆ ଚୋଟରେ ମୁରଲୀ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ଲୋକେ ସାମାନ୍ୟ ଆହତ ହୋଇଥିବା ବେଳେ ମୁରଲୀ ପ୍ରଧାନ, ତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ବିନି ଏବଂ ପୁଅ ର ମିଳିତ ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଭାସି ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିବା ସହ ତାଙ୍କ ପୁଅ ନାରାୟଣ (୨୨) ଗୁରୁତର ଆହତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଭାସି ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ମୁରଲୀ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ଲୁଚାଇ ସେମାନେ ଗାଙ୍ଗପୁର ଥାନାକୁ ଭାସିଙ୍କ ନାମରେ ଅଭିଯୋଗ କରିବାକୁ ଆସିଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ କୌଣସି ସୂତ୍ରରୁ ମୁରଲୀଙ୍କ ପରିବାର ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଭାସି ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ବରଣ କରିଥିବା ଖବର ପୋଲିସ ଖବର ପାଇଯାଇଥିବାରୁ ପୋଲିସ୍ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ମୁରଲୀ,ତାଙ୍କ ସ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଏବଂ ପୁଅକୁ ଥାନାରେ ଅଟକ ରଖିଥିବା ଜଣା ପଡ଼ିଛି।
ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ଭାସିଙ୍କ ମୃତ ଦେହ ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥଳରେ ପଡ଼ି ରହିଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗୁରୁତର ନାରାୟଣଙ୍କୁ ସ୍ଥାନୀୟ ଲୋକେ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ମେଡ଼ିକାଲକୁ ପଠାଇଥିବା ଜଣା ପଡ଼ିଛି। ଘଟଣା ସ୍ଥଳକୁ ଗାଙ୍ଗପୁର ଥାନା ଅଧିକାରୀ ବନ ବିହାରୀ ପ୍ରଧାନଙ୍କ ସମେତ ଗାଙ୍ଗପୁର ପୋଲିସ ବାହିନୀ ଉପସ୍ଥିତ ରହି ଘଟଣାର ତଦନ୍ତ କରୁଛନ୍ତି।
 

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ପାରିବାରିକ କଳହ ହେଲା କାଳ, ଦିଅରର ଆକ୍ରମଣରେ ଚାଲିଗଲା ଭାଉଜଙ୍କ ଜୀବନ appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: Overpricing Fed Rate Hikes Amid Potential Cuts
description: The segment discusses the current market sentiment that appears to be overestimating the likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate hikes. Reference is made to the '12th blue dot,' a hypothetical addition to the Fed's dot plot that would represent a signal for rate cuts this year, attributed to former Fed official Warsh. This suggests that despite market expectations, JPMorgan analysts anticipate the Federal Reserve will keep rates on hold throughout the year. The discussion highlights the impact of these expectations on stock market performance, with stocks falling as investor focus shifts toward the possibility of policy changes signaled by Warsh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Doctor accused of rape attempt | পরিচারিকাকে ধর্ষণের চেষ্টা! অভিযুক্ত রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজের চিকিৎসক, পলাতক
description:
রায়গঞ্জ: রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজ ও হাসপাতালের এক চিকিৎসকের বিরুদ্ধে পরিচারিকাকে ধর্ষণ চেষ্টার মতো ভয়াবহ অভিযোগ উঠল (Doctor accused of rape attempt)। অভিযুক্ত চিকিৎসকের নাম মহম্মদ আবরার আলম। ঘটনার পর থেকেই তিনি পলাতক বলে পুলিশ সূত্রে খবর। এই ঘটনায় এলাকায় ব্যাপক চাঞ্চল্য ছড়িয়েছে। নির্যাতিতা যুবতীর বয়স ২৫ বছর। তিনি শিক্ষিত পরিবারের সদস্য হলেও অভাবের তাড়নায় পাঁচ […]
The post Doctor accused of rape attempt | পরিচারিকাকে ধর্ষণের চেষ্টা! অভিযুক্ত রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজের চিকিৎসক, পলাতক appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
রায়গঞ্জ: রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজ ও হাসপাতালের এক চিকিৎসকের বিরুদ্ধে পরিচারিকাকে ধর্ষণ চেষ্টার মতো ভয়াবহ অভিযোগ উঠল (Doctor accused of rape attempt)। অভিযুক্ত চিকিৎসকের নাম মহম্মদ আবরার আলম। ঘটনার পর থেকেই তিনি পলাতক বলে পুলিশ সূত্রে খবর। এই ঘটনায় এলাকায় ব্যাপক চাঞ্চল্য ছড়িয়েছে।
নির্যাতিতা যুবতীর বয়স ২৫ বছর। তিনি শিক্ষিত পরিবারের সদস্য হলেও অভাবের তাড়নায় পাঁচ মাস ধরে উকিলপাড়ার বাসিন্দা ওই চিকিৎসক দম্পতির ফ্ল্যাটে পরিচারিকার কাজ করতেন। অভিযোগ, ওই চিকিৎসকের স্ত্রী বাড়িতে না থাকার সুযোগ নিয়ে তিনি পরিচারিকাকে জোরপূর্বক ধর্ষণের চেষ্টা করেন। যুবতী চিৎকার করলে অভিযুক্ত চিকিৎসক ভয় পেয়ে যান। মানসিকভাবে ভেঙে পড়ে নির্যাতিতা মঙ্গলবার আত্মহত্যার চেষ্টাও করেছিলেন, কিন্তু তাঁর ভাই দেখে ফেলায় কোনোক্রমে প্রাণে বেঁচে যান তিনি।
নির্যাতিতা জানিয়েছেন, কাজ করার সময় থেকেই ওই চিকিৎসক তাঁর সঙ্গে নোংরা অঙ্গভঙ্গি করতেন এবং হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ মেসেজের মাধ্যমে কুপ্রস্তাব দিতেন। যুবতীর কথায়, “আমি শিক্ষিত পরিবারের মেয়ে, অভাবের কারণেই এই কাজ করতাম। অভিযুক্তের দৃষ্টান্তমূলক শাস্তি চাই।”
যুবতীর লিখিত অভিযোগের ভিত্তিতে অভিযুক্তের বিরুদ্ধে ভারতীয় ন্যায় সংহিতার নির্দিষ্ট ধারায় মামলা রুজু করেছে রায়গঞ্জ থানা। রায়গঞ্জ পুলিশ জেলার সুপার ডঃ সোনাওয়ানে কুলদীপ সুরেশ জানিয়েছেন, অভিযুক্তের খোঁজে তল্লাশি চলছে। যুবতী তথ্য-প্রমাণ হিসেবে একাধিক নথি পুলিশের কাছে জমা দিয়েছেন। বর্তমানে ভুক্তভোগী সে রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজের গাইনি ওয়ার্ডে চিকিৎসাধীন। ঘটনাটি প্রকাশ্যে আসতেই চিকিৎসকদের একাংশের এহেন আচরণের বিরুদ্ধে তীব্র ক্ষোভ সৃষ্টি হয়েছে জনমানসে।
The post Doctor accused of rape attempt | পরিচারিকাকে ধর্ষণের চেষ্টা! অভিযুক্ত রায়গঞ্জ মেডিকেল কলেজের চিকিৎসক, পলাতক appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.

title: Shilpa Shirodkar Reveals: सिर्फ दो मेकअप रूम थे, करिश्मा कपूर के फैसले ने जीत लिया था शिल्पा शिरोडकर का दिल
description: Shilpa Shirodkar Interview: शिल्पा शिरोडकर ने गोपी किशन की शूटिंग का एक दिलचस्प किस्सा साझा किया। उन्होंने कहा कि सिर्फ दो मेकअप रूम होने पर करिश्मा कपूर ने खुद उनके साथ कमरा शेयर करने का फैसला किया।
content:
Shilpa Shirodkar Throwback Story: बॉलीवुड अभिनेत्री शिल्पा शिरोडकर ने हाल ही में 1994 की सुपरहिट फिल्म ‘गोपी किशन’ की शूटिंग से जुड़ा एक दिलचस्प और अनसुना किस्सा साझा किया। उन्होंने बताया कि उस दौर में कलाकारों के लिए आज की तरह वैनिटी वैन की सुविधा नहीं होती थी। शूटिंग के दौरान सीमित संसाधनों में पूरी टीम को काम करना पड़ता था।
रियलिटी शो ‘इंडियाज बेस्ट डांसर सीजन 5’ में स्पेशल गेस्ट बनकर पहुंचीं शिल्पा शिरोडकर ने बताया कि ‘गोपी किशन’ की शूटिंग भल्ला बंगले में चल रही थी, जहां पूरी यूनिट के लिए केवल दो मेकअप रूम उपलब्ध थे। उन्होंने कहा कि उस दिन उनका और सुनील शेट्टी का सीन था, इसलिए दोनों के लिए अलग-अलग कमरे तय किए गए थे। लेकिन जब अगले दिन करिश्मा कपूर के शूट पर आने की जानकारी मिली, तो प्रोडक्शन टीम इस बात को लेकर परेशान हो गई कि तीन कलाकारों के लिए सिर्फ दो कमरे कैसे पर्याप्त होंगे।
शिल्पा ने खुद दिया था समाधान
शिल्पा ने बताया कि प्रोडक्शन टीम ने उनसे मदद मांगी। उन्होंने बिना किसी झिझक के सुझाव दिया कि वह और सुनील शेट्टी एक ही मेकअप रूम इस्तेमाल कर लेंगे और बड़ा कमरा करिश्मा कपूर को दे दिया जाए, क्योंकि वह पहली बार उस सेट पर शूटिंग करने आ रही थीं। उनके मुताबिक, उन्हें इस व्यवस्था से कोई परेशानी नहीं थी क्योंकि दोनों कलाकारों को सिर्फ तैयार होना और कॉस्ट्यूम बदलना था।
करिश्मा कपूर ने बदल दी पूरी व्यवस्था
अगले दिन जब करिश्मा कपूर सेट पर पहुंचीं तो उन्होंने पूरी यूनिट से मुलाकात की। कुछ देर बाद उन्हें मेकअप रूम की व्यवस्था के बारे में पता चला। यह जानकर उन्होंने तुरंत सवाल किया कि अगर दो ही कमरे हैं तो सुनील शेट्टी कहां तैयार हो रहे हैं। जब शिल्पा ने पूरी स्थिति बताई, तो करिश्मा ने इस व्यवस्था पर आपत्ति जताई और कहा कि वह खुद शिल्पा के साथ मेकअप रूम शेयर कर लेंगी, जबकि दूसरा कमरा सुनील शेट्टी को दे दिया जाए।
ये भी पढ़ें- Urfi Javed Visit: उर्फी जावेद ने किए मां कमाख्या के दर्शन, माथे पर तिलक और सिर पर दुपट्टा लिए नजर आईं एक्ट्रेस
करिश्मा कपूर के बारे में बनी धारणा सही नहीं
शिल्पा शिरोडकर ने कहा कि कई लोग कहते थे कि करिश्मा कपूर सेट पर नखरे करती हैं, लेकिन उन्होंने कभी ऐसा व्यवहार नहीं देखा। साल 1994 में रिलीज हुई ‘गोपी किशन’ का निर्देशन मुकेश दुग्गल ने किया था। फिल्म में सुनील शेट्टी डबल रोल में नजर आए थे, जबकि शिल्पा शिरोडकर और करिश्मा कपूर ने मुख्य भूमिकाएं निभाई थीं।

title: తెలంగాణ కు మూడు ఎయిర్‌పోర్టులు.. ఎక్కడెక్కడంటే?
description: Telangana New Airports: తెలంగాణలో విమానయాన రంగాన్ని విస్తరించేందుకు మరియు జిల్లాల ప్రజలకు ప్రయాణ సౌకర్యాలను మెరుగుపరిచేందుకు రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం కీలక అడుగులు వేస్తోంది. ప్రస్తుతం రాష్ట్రంలో...
content:
Telangana New Airports: తెలంగాణలో విమానయాన రంగాన్ని విస్తరించేందుకు మరియు జిల్లాల ప్రజలకు ప్రయాణ సౌకర్యాలను మెరుగుపరిచేందుకు రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం కీలక అడుగులు వేస్తోంది. ప్రస్తుతం రాష్ట్రంలో శంషాబాద్ (రాజీవ్ గాంధీ అంతర్జాతీయ విమానాశ్రయం) మాత్రమే పూర్తిస్థాయిలో అందుబాటులో ఉండటంతో, జిల్లాల ప్రజలు విమాన ప్రయాణం కోసం హైదరాబాద్ రావాల్సి వస్తోంది. ఈ ఇబ్బందులను తొలగించడానికి ప్రభుత్వం మరో మూడు కొత్త ఎయిర్‌పోర్టుల నిర్మాణాన్ని వేగవంతం చేసింది. ఇందులో భాగంగా వరంగల్ మామునూరు ఎయిర్‌పోర్టు పనులకు వచ్చే నెలలోనే శంకుస్థాపన చేయనున్నట్లు ప్రభుత్వం అధికారికంగా ప్రకటించింది.







Read also: Jaggareddy: అయోధ్య నిధులపై వివాదం.. మోదీ, అమిత్ షాలపై జగ్గారెడ్డి ఫైర్







ఆదిలాబాద్, కొత్తగూడెం ఎయిర్‌పోర్టులపై కేంద్రంతో సంప్రదింపులు



వరంగల్‌తో పాటు ఆదిలాబాద్, భద్రాద్రి కొత్తగూడెం జిల్లాల్లో కూడా విమానాశ్రయాల ఏర్పాటుకు పనులు శరవేగంగా సాగుతున్నాయి.




ఆదిలాబాద్ ఎయిర్‌పోర్ట్: ఇక్కడ విమానాశ్రయ నిర్మాణానికి కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వం ఇప్పటికే గ్రీన్ సిగ్నల్ ఇచ్చింది. ఇక్కడ గతంలో వాయుసేన (IAF) కు చెందిన రన్‌వే ఉండేది. ఇప్పుడు దానికి అదనపు భూమిని సేకరించి, అటు మిలిటరీ అవసరాలకు, ఇటు సామాన్య పౌరుల ప్రయాణాలకు (సివిల్ ఏవియేషన్) ఉపయోగపడేలా హైబ్రిడ్ మోడల్‌లో దీనిని నిర్మించనున్నారు.



కొత్తగూడెం ఎయిర్‌పోర్ట్: ఇక్కడ కొత్త ఎయిర్‌పోర్ట్ ఏర్పాటుకు సంబంధించి కేంద్ర ప్రభుత్వంతో రాష్ట్ర ప్రభుత్వం నిరంతరం సంప్రదింపులు జరుపుతోంది. త్వరలోనే దీనికి కూడా తుది అనుమతులు లభిస్తాయని అధికార యంత్రాంగం ఆశాభావం వ్యక్తం చేస్తోంది.




Telangana New Airports: ‘ఏరోమార్ట్ 2026’ సదస్సులో మంత్రి ఉత్తమ్ కుమార్ రెడ్డి కీలక వ్యాఖ్యలు



హైదరాబాద్‌లో వైభవంగా ప్రారంభమైన ‘ఏరోమార్ట్ 2026’ సదస్సుకు రాష్ట్ర పౌరసరఫరాలు, రక్షణ ప్రాజెక్టుల సమన్వయ మంత్రి ఉత్తమ్ కుమార్ రెడ్డి ముఖ్య అతిథిగా హాజరయ్యారు. ఈ సందర్భంగా ఆయన మాట్లాడుతూ.. వరంగల్ మామునూరు ఎయిర్‌పోర్టుకు వచ్చే నెలలోనే భూమిపూజ చేస్తామని స్పష్టం చేశారు. ఆదిలాబాద్ ఎయిర్‌పోర్టుకు సంబంధించి డీపీఆర్ (DPR) కూడా సిద్ధమైందని తెలిపారు.



తెలంగాణలో ఏరోస్పేస్, డిఫెన్స్ రంగాలు అద్భుతంగా రాణిస్తున్నాయని.. ఈ రంగాలకు అవసరమైన విడిభాగాలు తయారుచేసే 1500 కి పైగా ఎంఎస్ఎంఈ (MSME) లు రాష్ట్రంలో సేవలందిస్తున్నాయని ఆయన కొనియాడారు. ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా తయారయ్యే పలు యుద్ధ విమానాలు, హెలికాప్టర్లలో ‘మేడ్ ఇన్ తెలంగాణ’ విడిభాగాలు ఉండటం మన పారిశ్రామిక ప్రగతికి దక్కిన అంతర్జాతీయ గుర్తింపు అని మంత్రి ఉత్తమ్ కుమార్ రెడ్డి గర్వంగా ప్రకటించారు.

పాలనపై చర్చకు సిద్ధం.. రేవంత్ సవాల్‌పై కేటీఆర్ రియాక్షన్

title: Shahid Kapoor REFUSED Outdoor Shoot In Delhi For Cocktail 2 Without Air Purifiers Amid Poor AQI, Claims Crew
description: Shahid Kapoor and the team of Cocktail 2 shot for key sequences in Gurugram's Cyber City. The actor, however, refused to shoot outdoors due to poor AQI and demanded air purifiers, which were not serving any purpose.
content: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna shot for their recently released romantic comedy, Cocktail 2, at real locations. Sicily being the main destination, they filmed key sequences in Delhi as well. The team of the film faced various obstacles, including unhealthy AQI in the capital of India. A line producer on Cocktail 2, named Sumit Tyagi, spoke about Shahid not being willing to shoot outdoors in Delhi without air purifiers. In a recent interview with a YouTuber, he called Kapoor ‘manmauji’ (free-spirited) while narrating an incident that created such a perception about him. Shahid Kapoor refused to step outdoors for shoot amid poor AQI in DelhiOn the YouTube channel, The Shivam Podcast, Sumit recalled being told that Shahid would not shoot outdoors, considering the AQI was poor. The production team had to get five to six air purifiers for him, which were best suited for indoors, but the shoot was outdoors. The shoot location was Cyber City, Gurugram.   Sumit said air purifiers were one of those useless things that were bought at the last minute. “This was for Shahid, so we can’t call them useless. Because Shahid had said that I won’t get out of the van. He would just take off the mask before the shot; otherwise, he had a mask on the entire time,” he shared before adding, “We were shooting in Cyber City. How can an air purifier help there? It is all open.”Tyagi said while Shahid wasn’t wrong in demanding air purifiers, it was never going to be a solution during outdoor shoots. “So you don’t get hurt that your demands have not been met and production has tried its best,” he said. Shahid Kapoor is 'temperamental', says crewHighlighting Shahid’s ‘temperamental’ behaviour, Sumit claimed that the actor is the ‘kind of person who believes ‘I won’t think much about you, and you don’t think much about me. Even if you are thinking, I won’t think about you’. Even in the past, Shahid’s on-set demands came under the spotlight when Kiara Advani, his co-star in Kabir Singh, shared on Koffee With Karan that she had to wait for eight hours because the actor was deciding what shoes to wear in the next scene.   About Cocktail 2Cocktail 2 is the spiritual sequel to Deepika Padukone, Saif Ali Khan and Diana Penty’s Cocktail. The film is about college sweethearts Kunal and Diya. They are happy in a live-in relationship and are avoiding marriage. However, before planning their wedding, Diya and Kunal go on a vacation to Sicily, where she meets her long-lost best friend, Ally. Diya wants to test Kunal’s loyalty towards her, especially when marriage is a topic he has been dodging for a while. Amid the drama, Ally falls in love with Kunal and attempts to stop him from marrying Diya. In the end, Kunal marries Diya as he has been loyal to her since the beginning.

title: Wisconsin Badgers officially hire Shawn Eichorst as next athletic director
description: Wisconsin has filled its athletic director vacancy with someone who is familiar with being a power-conference AD – and familiar with the Badgers, too.
content: MADISON − The University of Wisconsin has filled its athletic director vacancy with someone who is familiar with being a power-conference AD – and familiar with the Badgers, too.Wisconsin has tabbed Shawn Eichorst – the former AD at Miami and Nebraska and current deputy AD at Texas – to be the Badgers’ next athletic director, the university announced July 1.It brings Eichorst back to the athletic department where he worked from 2006-11. He was ultimately promoted to deputy AD under Barry Alvarez before getting his power-conference AD opportunities at Miami and Nebraska.His brief tenure at Miami included the hiring of Jim Larranaga, who eventually became the Hurricanes' all-time winningest coach. But his firing of Nebraska football coach Bo Pelini and hiring of Mike Riley garnered significant criticism. The Huskers still have not put together a 10-win season since Pelini's firing.Eichorst's Wisconsin roots extend well beyond his time in Alvarez's athletic department. He also is Lone Rock native, UW-Whitewater alum, Marquette Law School alum and former UW-Whitewater athletic director.With Eichorst, the Badgers continued their trend of hiring athletic directors with local ties. Chris McIntosh was Alvarez's deputy AD before getting the job in 2021. Alvarez was more than a decade into his coaching tenure at UW when he became AD in 2004. Pat Richter was across town at Oscar Mayer before taking the AD job in 1989.The July 1 hire puts an end to a search that was relatively expedient. Predecessor McIntosh resigned in April to take a job at the Big Ten Conference office as deputy commissioner, with Marcus Sedberry serving as interim AD for the nearly three months since then.UW announced a search committee in May that included alumni who work in NFL, NBA and NHL front offices. Lauren Bishop, a social work professor and one of UW's faculty athletics representatives, chaired the committee.UW hired CSA Search and Consulting to help with the search. A public records request submitted by the Journal Sentinel in May for UW’s contract with the search firm remains pending.This article originally appeared on Milwaukee Journal Sentinel: Wisconsin Badgers officially hire Shawn Eichorst as next athletic director

title: बालाघाट में बारिश में ढही कच्चे मकान की दीवार, मलबे में दबे तीन मजदूर; स्थानीय लोगों और पुलिस ने किया रेस्क्यू
description: Wall Collapse In Balaghat: बालाघाट में बड़ा हादसा, निर्माणाधीन भवन का बेसमेंट धंसने से 3 मजदूर मलबे में दबे, मयंक तिवारी की कमान में सुरक्षित रेस्क्यू, 1 गंभीर घायल गोंदिया रेफर।
content:
3 Labour Stuck After Wall Collapse In Balaghat: मध्य प्रदेश के बालाघाट में लगातार हो रही बारिश के बीच बुधवार शाम एक बड़ा हादसा हो गया। कोतवाली थाना क्षेत्र के राम मंदिर गली, कालीपुतली चौक के पास स्थित एक निर्माणाधीन भवन के बेसमेंट में काम कर रहे तीन मजदूर अचानक मलबे में दब गए।
जानकारी के अनुसार, हर्षित पगाड़िया के निर्माणाधीन भवन में बेसमेंट का निर्माण कार्य चल रहा था। शाम करीब 5:30 बजे लगातार बारिश के कारण पास स्थित एक कच्चे मकान की दीवार अचानक भरभराकर गिर गई, जिससे बेसमेंट में काम कर रहे मजदूर उसकी चपेट में आ गए। घटना के बाद पूरे इलाके में अफरा-तफरी मच गई और स्थानीय लोगों ने तुरंत पुलिस को सूचना दी।
पुलिस और स्थानीय लोगों ने चलाया राहत अभियान
सूचना मिलते ही कोतवाली थाना पुलिस मौके पर पहुंची और स्थानीय नागरिकों की मदद से तत्काल राहत एवं बचाव अभियान शुरू किया गया। काफी मशक्कत के बाद मलबे में दबे तीनों मजदूरों को सुरक्षित बाहर निकाला गया। हादसे में घायल मजदूरों की पहचान नीलेश नगपुरे (23) निवासी नवेगांव, चैतराम सौलखे (35) निवासी नैतरा और मानिक मचाड़े (48) निवासी तिलपेवाड़ा के रूप में हुई है। सभी घायलों को तत्काल जिला अस्पताल पहुंचाया गया, जहां डॉक्टरों ने उनका प्राथमिक उपचार शुरू किया।
एक मजदूर की हालत गंभीर, गोंदिया किया गया रेफर
जिला अस्पताल में प्राथमिक उपचार के दौरान डॉक्टरों ने मानिक मचाड़े की हालत गंभीर पाई। गंभीर चोटों को देखते हुए उन्हें बेहतर इलाज के लिए महाराष्ट्र के गोंदिया स्थित अस्पताल रेफर कर दिया गया। वहीं अन्य दो घायल मजदूरों का उपचार जिला अस्पताल में जारी है। चिकित्सकों के अनुसार दोनों की हालत फिलहाल स्थिर बताई जा रही है। हादसे के बाद मजदूरों के परिजनों में चिंता का माहौल है और प्रशासन लगातार स्थिति पर नजर बनाए हुए है।
बारिश को माना जा रहा हादसे की मुख्य वजह, जांच शुरू
सीएसपी मयंक तिवारी ने बताया कि लगातार बारिश के कारण कच्चे मकान की दीवार कमजोर होकर गिर गई, जिससे यह हादसा हुआ। उन्होंने कहा कि पुलिस ने समय पर पहुंचकर स्थानीय लोगों के सहयोग से सभी मजदूरों को सुरक्षित बाहर निकाल लिया।
यह भी पढ़ें: रीवा में नशे के खिलाफ बड़ी कार्रवाई, पानी के जार में छिपाकर बेच रहा था नशीली कफ सिरप; पुलिस ने आरोपी को दबोचा
गंभीर रूप से घायल मजदूर को बेहतर इलाज के लिए गोंदिया भेजा गया है। पुलिस पूरे मामले की जांच कर रही है और यह भी पता लगाया जा रहा है कि निर्माण स्थल पर सुरक्षा मानकों का पालन किया जा रहा था या नहीं। प्रशासन ने लोगों से लगातार बारिश के दौरान निर्माण स्थलों और जर्जर भवनों के आसपास विशेष सावधानी बरतने की अपील की है।

title: Maharashtra:ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ବିଧାନ ପରିଷଦ ଉପାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହେଲେ ସଚିନ ଅହିର
description:
ମୁମ୍ବାଇ: ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ରାଜନୀତିରେ ବଡ଼ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଶିବସେନା (ଉଦ୍ଧବ ବାଲାସାହେବ ଠାକରେ)ର ପୂର୍ବତନ ବିଧାନ ପରିଷଦ ସଦସ୍ୟ ସଚିନ ଅହିର ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ବିଧାନ ପରିଷଦର ଉପାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଉଦ୍ଧବ ଠାକରେଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱାଧୀନ ଶିବସେନା ଛାଡ଼ି ଏକନାଥ ସିନ୍ଦେଙ୍କ ନେତୃତ୍ୱାଧୀନ ଶିବସେନାରେ ଯୋଗଦେବାର ମାତ୍ର ଦିନକ ପରେ ସେ ମହାୟୁତି ମେଣ୍ଟର ପ୍ରାର୍ଥୀ ଭାବେ ଏହି ପଦକୁ ବିନା ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱିତାରେ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Odisha Cabinet decisions ରାଜ୍ୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରିମଣ୍ଡଳର ୧୨ ଫୈସଲା: କେଜିରୁ ପିଜି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଦେୟ ମୁକ୍ତ, ୧୦ମ ଶ୍ରେଣୀ ଯାଏଁ ମଧ୍ୟାହ୍‌ଣ ଭୋଜନ
ମଙ୍ଗଳବାର ସଚିନ ଅହିର ହଠାତ୍ ଉଦ୍ଧବ ଠାକରେଙ୍କ ଶିବିର ଛାଡ଼ି ଉପମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଏକନାଥ ସିନ୍ଦେଙ୍କ ଉପସ୍ଥିତିରେ ଶିବସେନାରେ ଯୋଗ ଦେଇଥିଲେ। ସେହି ଦିନ ସେ ମହାରାଷ୍ଟ୍ର ବିଧାନ ପରିଷଦର ଉପାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ପଦ ପାଇଁ ମନୋନୟନପତ୍ର ଦାଖଲ କରିଥିଲେ। ମହାୟୁତି ମେଣ୍ଟର ସମର୍ଥନ ଥିବାରୁ ଅନ୍ୟ କୌଣସି ପ୍ରାର୍ଥୀ ମନୋନୟନପତ୍ର ଦାଖଲ କରିନଥିଲେ। ଫଳରେ ବୁଧବାର ସେ ବିନା ପ୍ରତିଦ୍ୱନ୍ଦ୍ୱିତାରେ ଉପାଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷ ଭାବେ ନିର୍ବାଚିତ ହୋଇଥିଲେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Tamil Nadu:୩୫ କୋଟି ଟଙ୍କାର ପ୍ରଲୋଭନ ଦେଇ ବିଜୟ ସରକାରକୁ ଭାଙ୍ଗିବାକୁ ଷଡ଼୍‌ଯନ୍ତ୍ର ଅଭିଯୋଗ, ୩ ଗିରଫ
ସଚିନ ଅହିରଙ୍କ ଦଳବଦଳକୁ ଉଦ୍ଧବ ଠାକରେଙ୍କ ଦଳ ପାଇଁ ବଡ଼ ଝଟକା ବୋଲି ରାଜନୈତିକ ମହଲରେ ଚର୍ଚ୍ଚା ହେଉଛି। ସେ ଆଦିତ୍ୟ ଠାକରେଙ୍କ ଘନିଷ୍ଠ ସହଯୋଗୀ ଭାବେ ପରିଚିତ ଥିଲେ ଏବଂ ଦଳର ସାଙ୍ଗଠନିକ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟରେ ସକ୍ରିୟ ଭୂମିକା ନିଭାଉଥିଲେ। ତାଙ୍କର ଅଚାନକ ଦଳ ପରିବର୍ତ୍ତନ ମୁମ୍ବାଇ ସମେତ ରାଜ୍ୟର ରାଜନୈତିକ ସମୀକରଣ ଉପରେ ପ୍ରଭାବ ପକାଇବ ବୋଲି ବିଶ୍ଳେଷକମାନେ ମତ ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ନିର୍ବାଚନ ପରେ ଏକନାଥ ସିନ୍ଦେ ସଚିନଙ୍କୁ ଅଭିନନ୍ଦନ ଜଣାଇ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ, ସେ ଜଣେ ତୃଣମୂଳ ସ୍ତରର କର୍ମୀ ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କର ଦୀର୍ଘ ରାଜନୈତିକ ଅଭିଜ୍ଞତା ବିଧାନ ପରିଷଦର କାର୍ଯ୍ୟକୁ ଆହୁରି ସୁଚାରୁ ଭାବେ ପରିଚାଳନା କରିବାରେ ସହାୟକ ହେବ। ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ଉଦ୍ଧବ ଠାକରେଙ୍କ ଦଳ ସଚିନଙ୍କ ଦଳବଦଳକୁ ନେଇ ଆଇନଗତ ପଦକ୍ଷେପର ସମ୍ଭାବନା ଉପରେ ବିଚାର କରୁଛି।

title: హీరో నానికి గాయం!
description: Nani Injury : టాలీవుడ్ నేచురల్ స్టార్ నాని గాయపడినట్లు సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా వెలుగులోకి వచ్చిన వార్త ఇప్పుడు అభిమానుల్లో తీవ్ర ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తోంది. తన...
content:
Nani Injury : టాలీవుడ్ నేచురల్ స్టార్ నాని గాయపడినట్లు సోషల్ మీడియా వేదికగా వెలుగులోకి వచ్చిన వార్త ఇప్పుడు అభిమానుల్లో తీవ్ర ఆందోళన కలిగిస్తోంది. తన చేతికి కట్టు (బ్యాండేజ్) ఉన్న ఫోటోలను నాని స్వయంగా తన ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్ ఖాతాలో షేర్ చేశారు. అయితే, ఈ గాయం ఎలా అయింది, దీని తీవ్రత ఎంత అనే విషయాలపై ఆయన నేరుగా ఎలాంటి క్లారిటీ ఇవ్వలేదు. కానీ, ఆ పోస్టులో కెమెరా ఎమోజీని జోడించడంతో.. ప్రస్తుతం జరుగుతున్న సినిమా షూటింగ్ యాక్షన్ సీక్వెన్స్ లేదా ఏదైనా సీన్ చిత్రీకరణ సమయంలోనే ఈ ప్రమాదం జరిగి ఉంటుందని టాలీవుడ్ వర్గాలు గట్టిగా భావిస్తున్నాయి.



Read Also : బేబీ బంప్ ఫొటో షేర్ చేసిన సమంత







‘ధురంధర్’ డైలాగ్‌తో పోస్ట్.. ‘పారడైజ్’ అప్‌డేట్!



నాని ఈ ఫోటోను షేర్ చేస్తూ.. తన రాబోయే హిందీ/పాన్-ఇండియా ప్రాజెక్ట్ ‘ధురంధర్’ (Dhurandhar) చిత్రంలోని ప్రముఖ డైలాగ్ అయిన “గాయల్ హూ… ఇస్లియే ఘాతక్ హూ” (గాయపడ్డాను.. అందుకే మరింత ప్రమాదకరంగా మారాను) అనే పవర్‌ఫుల్ క్యాప్షన్‌ను జోడించారు. ఇదిలా ఉంటే, నాని నటిస్తున్న మోస్ట్ అవైటెడ్ మూవీ ‘పారడైజ్’ (Paradise) విడుదల తేదీపై ఇప్పటికే ప్రేక్షకుల్లో మరియు పరిశ్రమలో తీవ్రమైన సస్పెన్స్ కొనసాగుతోంది. ఈ తరుణంలో నానికి గాయం కావడం ‘పారడైజ్’ చిత్ర ప్రమోషన్స్ లేదా తదుపరి షూటింగ్ షెడ్యూల్స్‌పై ఏమైనా ప్రభావం చూపుతుందా అనే చర్చ కూడా నెట్టింట మొదలైంది.

ఓటీటీలో వణుకు పుట్టిస్తోన్న ‘తవ్వై’!

title: Maple Leafs free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NHL offseason
description: Toronto has a chance to make a lot of moves.
content:
Maple Leafs free agency tracker: Live signings, trades, news, updates and more in 2026 NHL offseason originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.This is a pivotal offseason for the Toronto Maple Leafs.Coming off a brutal 2025-26 campaign, they earned the No. 1 pick (Gavin McKenna), hired a new GM and head coach (John Chayka, Jim Hiller) and have already made a fascinating sign-and-trade for Darren Raddysh.The opening of NHL free agency on July 1 provides more opportunities for the Leafs to turn this thing back in the right direction.Last summer's biggest storyline was the loss of Mitch Marner.This time around, Toronto will hope to generate some headlines for the right reasons.Below, we'll be keeping track of what the Maple Leafs get up to.MORE: What the Gavin McKenna pick means for the Maple LeafsMaple Leafs free agency rumors, news, live updatesRefresh for the latest. All times in ET.WEDNESDAY12:15 p.m.: Colton Sissons is reportedly signing from the Vegas Golden Knights.11:05 a.m.: The Maple Leafs are trading Nick Robertson (who was an RFA) to the Penguins for a fourth-round pick.10:30 a.m.: The latest Zach Werenski trade rumors are favorable for Toronto.8:20 a.m.: We know it would cost about $21 million for the Maple Leafs to get Sergei Bobrovsky.8 a.m.: NHL free agency will open at 12 noon ET today.Maple Leafs free agent signingsColton Sissons, a bottom-six center, is signing with Toronto.Maple Leafs free agent lossesThis section will be updated as players leave to sign elsewhere.Maple Leafs tradesThe Maple Leafs traded RFA Nicholas Robertson to the Penguins.When does NHL free agency start?The free agent window opens on Wednesday, July 1 at 12 noon ET.More NHL news:Jack Eichel turned into Ben SimmonsFrederik Andersen heading toward an unceremonious exitCale Makar is about to become a lot more expensiveSidney Crosby trade plans did a 180 for the PenguinsIt's time to ask a serious Matthew Knies question

title: India:ହାଜତରେ ଥିବା କଏଦୀ, ମତ୍ସ୍ୟଜୀବୀଙ୍କ ତାଲିକା ଆଦାନ ପ୍ରଦାନ କଲେ ଭାରତ-ପାକିସ୍ତାନ
Bengaluru: FIR against crèche staff over claims of physical abuse and cruelty towards children
Heavy rains:ମୁମ୍ବାଇରେ ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା, ‌ରେଡ ଆଲର୍ଟ ଜାରି କଲା ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଡି
description:
ବେଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁ  :ମୁମ୍ବାଇ ଏବଂ ଏହାର ପଡ଼ୋଶୀ ଜିଲ୍ଲାରେ ଆଜି ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା ହୋଇଛି। ଦିନ ତମାମ ସହରରେ ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା ଲାଗି ରହିଥିବାବେଳେ ଭାରତୀୟ ପାଣିପାଗ ବିଭାଗ (ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଡି) ପୁଣି ଅଧିକ ବର୍ଷା ହେବା ନେଇ ଏକ ସଦ୍ୟ ସତର୍କତା ଜାରି କରିଛି। ଆଇଏମ୍‌ଡି ମୁମ୍ବାଇ, ଥାଣେ ଏବଂ ପଲଘର ପାଇଁ ରେଡ ଆଲର୍ଟ ଜାରି କରିଛି। ଇତି ମଧ୍ୟରେ ନିକଟସ୍ଥ ଅଞ୍ଚଳରେ ପ୍ରବଳରୁ ଅତି ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା, ପବନ ହେବାନେଇ ଅରେଞ୍ଜ ଆଲର୍ଟ ଜାରି ହୋଇଛି। ଆସନ୍ତା ଜୁଲାଇ ୪ ତାରିଖ ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ମୁମ୍ବାଇରେ ବର୍ଷା ଲାଗି ରହିବ। ଉଲ୍ଲେଖଯୋଗ୍ୟ ଯେ ଗତ ୨୪ ଘଣ୍ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ମୁମ୍ବାଇର ସହର ୧୦୦ ମିମିରୁ ଅଧିକ ବର୍ଷାଜଳ ଗ୍ରହଣ କରିଛି। ଏଥିଯୋଗୁ ଅନ୍ଧେରି ସବ୍‌ୱେ ଏବଂ ନଭି ମୁମ୍ବାଇର କିଛି ଅଂଶରେ ଜଳବନ୍ଦୀ ସମସ୍ୟା ଉପୁଜିିଛି । ଏଥିପାଇଁ ଟ୍ରେନ୍‌ ଚଳାଚଳରେ ବାଧା ଉପୁଜିଥିବା ଜଣାପଡ଼ିଛି।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Weather:୧୦୦ ବର୍ଷରେ ତୃତୀୟ ଶୁଖିଲା ଜୁନ୍ ୪ ପ୍ରମୁଖ କାରଣରୁ ୪୦ ପ୍ରତିଶତ କମ୍ ବର୍ଷା
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷେ ଆଜି ମାଙ୍ଗାଲୁରୁର ନାଗୋରିରେ ଏକ କାନ୍ଥ ଭୁଶୁଡ଼ି ପଡ଼ିବା ଫଳରେ ୨ ବାଳିକାଙ୍କ ସମେତ ୩ ଜଣଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଆଜି ଭୋର୍‌ ୪.୪୫ରୁ ୫ଟା ମଧ୍ୟରେ ଏହି ଘଟଣା ଘଟିଛି। ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା ଯୋଗୁ ଆଜି ଗରୋଦିର ମରିଆଲ ହାଉସ୍‌ରେ ଏକ ପାଚେରୀ କାନ୍ଥ ଭୁଶୁଡ଼ି ପଡ଼ିବା ଫଳରେ ଏହା ସିଧା ୪ଟି ଟାଇଲ ଛାତ ଥିବା ଘର ଉପରେ ପଡ଼ିଥିଲା। ଏହା ଫଳରେ ୪ଟି ଯାକ ଘରର କାନ୍ଥ ଭୁଶୁଡ଼ି ପଡ଼ିଲା। ପୁଲିସ କମିସନର ସୁଧୀର କୁମାର ରେଡ୍ଡି ସିଏଚ୍‌ କହିଛନ୍ତି, ଭଗ୍ନାବଶେଷ ତଳେ ୬ ଜଣ ଫସି ଯାଇଥିଲେ। ଉଦ୍ଧାରକାରୀ ଦଳ ପ୍ରଥମେ ଲାଲ୍‌ବାବୁ (୩୭)ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ପତ୍ନୀ ଇନ୍ଦୁ (୩୪) ଏବଂ ସେମାନଙ୍କ ୨ ଝିଅଙ୍କୁ ଭଗ୍ନାବଶେଷ ତଳୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରି ହସ୍ପିଟାଲ ପଠାଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ହସ୍ପିଟାଲରେ ୨ ପିଳାଙ୍କର ମୃତ୍ୟୁ ହୋଇଗଲା। ସେମାନଙ୍କ ମଧ୍ୟରୁ ଜଣେ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ଅନାମିକା (୭) ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟ ଜଣେ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି ପରି (୪)। ଅନ୍ୟ ଏକ ଘରୁ ବାଲ୍‌କ୍ରୀଷ୍ଣ (୪୦) ଏବଂ ତାଙ୍କ ପତ୍ନୀ ଶାନ୍ତା (୩୫)ଙ୍କୁ ଉଦ୍ଧାର କରାଯାଇଛି। କିନ୍ତୁ ପରେ ଶାନ୍ତାଙ୍କୁ ଡାକ୍ତରମାନେ ମୃତ ଘୋଷଣା କରିଥିଲେ।
ଆହୁରି ପଢନ୍ତୁ :Odisha Cabinet decisions ରାଜ୍ୟ ମନ୍ତ୍ରିମଣ୍ଡଳର ୧୨ ଫୈସଲା: କେଜିରୁ ପିଜି ଶିକ୍ଷା ଦେୟ ମୁକ୍ତ, ୧୦ମ ଶ୍ରେଣୀ ଯାଏଁ ମଧ୍ୟାହ୍‌ଣ ଭୋଜନ
ସେହିପରି ଆସାମ, ଅରୁଣାଚଳ ପ୍ରଦେଶରେ ପ୍ରବଳ ବର୍ଷା ଏବଂ ଅଚାନକ ବନ୍ୟାବଡ଼ ବିପର୍ଯ୍ୟୟ ସୃଷ୍ଟି କରିଛି। କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ସରକାର ବନ୍ୟା ପ୍ରବଣ ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ରିଲିଫ୍‌ ,ଉଦ୍ଧାର ଏବଂ ପୁନଃନିର୍ମାଣ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟ ପାଇଁ ସମସ୍ତ ପ୍ରକାର ସହଯୋଗ କରିବେ ବୋଲି ପ୍ରତିଶ୍ରୁତି ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆଜି କେନ୍ଦ୍ର କୃଷି ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶିବରାଜ ସିଂହ ‌ଚୌହାନ ଏବଂ କେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ କିରଣ ରିଜିଜୁ ଅରୁଣାଚଳରେ ବନ୍ୟା ପ୍ରବଣ ଅଞ୍ଚଳ ବୁଲିି ସ୍ଥିତି ସମୀକ୍ଷା କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଉଭୟ ରାଜ୍ୟରେ ସମୀକ୍ଷା ପରେ ବିସ୍ତୃତ ରିପୋର୍ଟ ପ୍ରଧାନମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ନରେନ୍ଦ୍ର ମୋଦୀଙ୍କ ନିକଟରେ ଦାଖଲ କରାଯିବ ବୋଲି ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଚୌହାନ କହିଛନ୍ତି। ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଶିବରାଜ ପରେ ଏକ ସାମ୍ବାଦିକ ସମ୍ମିଳନୀରେ କହିଥିଲେ ଯେ ଅରୁଣାଚଳ ପ୍ରଦେଶ ଏବଂ ଆସାମର ଲୋକମାନେ ବନ୍ୟା ଯୋଗୁ ବ୍ୟାପକ ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି। ଅରୁଣାଚଳରେ ଉଦ୍ଧାର ଅପରେସନ୍‌ ଜାରି ରହିଛି। ତେବେ ବ୍ୟାପକ କ୍ଷୟକ୍ଷତି ହୋଇଛି ଏବଂ ସରକାର ପ୍ରଭାବିତ ଲୋକଙ୍କୁ ସବୁ ପ୍ରକାର ସମ୍ଭାବ୍ୟ ସହଯୋଗ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିବେ ବୋଲି ସେ କହିଛନ୍ତି।

title: പുലര്‍ച്ചെ കോഴിക്കോടെത്തുന്ന സ്ലീപ്പർ ബസുകളില്‍ മാത്രം യാത്ര, പിന്നെ ഓട്ടോയിൽ, ഇടക്കിടെ നാട്ടിൽ പോയി വരും; 11 കിലോ കഞ്ചാവുമായി പ്രതി പിടിയില്‍
description: പെയിന്റിങ് തൊഴിലാളിയായ പ്രതി ഒഡീഷയിൽ നിന്ന് വൻതോതിൽ കഞ്ചാവ് വാങ്ങി കോഴിക്കോട്ടെത്തിച്ച് ചില്ലറ വിൽപ്പന നടത്തിവരികയായിരുന്നു. രാമനാട്ടുകരയിൽ ബസിറങ്ങിയ ഇയാളെ പൊലീസ് തന്ത്രപൂർവ്വം പിടികൂടുകയായിരുന്നു.
content: <p>കോഴിക്കോട്: നാട്ടില്‍ നിന്നും വന്‍തോതില്‍ കഞ്ചാവ് കോഴിക്കോട്ടെത്തിച്ച് ജില്ലയുടെ വിവിധയിടങ്ങളില്‍ വില്‍പന നടത്തിയിരുന്ന ഒഡീഷ സ്വദേശി പിടിയില്‍. കോഴിക്കോട് ജില്ലയിൽ വിവിധ സ്ഥലങ്ങളിൽ പെയിന്‍റിംഗ് ജോലികള്‍ ചെയ്തുവന്നിരുന്ന പ്രസല്‍ പ്രഥാന്‍(47) ആണ് അറസ്റ്റിലായത്. ഇയാളുടെ പക്കല്‍ നിന്നും 11 കിലോഗ്രാം കഞ്ചാവ് പിടിച്ചെടുത്തു. കോഴിക്കോട് സിറ്റി പൊലീസ് കമ്മീഷണര്‍ എ.പി ഷൗക്കത്തലി ഐ.പി.എസിന് ലഭിച്ച രഹസ്യ വിവരത്തിന്റെ അടിസ്ഥാനത്തില്‍ ഫറോക്ക് അസിസ്റ്റന്റ് കമ്മീഷണര്‍ എ. പ്രേംജിത്തിന്റെ നേതൃത്വത്തിലുള്ള എ.സി.പി സ്‌ക്വാഡും ഫറോക്ക് പൊലീസും ചേര്‍ന്നാണ് ഇയാളെ പിടികൂടിയത്.</p><p>കോഴിക്കോട് കൊമ്മേരിയില്‍ വാടകയ്ക്ക് താമസിച്ചിരുന്ന ഇയാള്‍ ഭുവനേശ്വറില്‍ നിന്ന് മൊത്തമായി കഞ്ചാവ് വാങ്ങി കോഴിക്കോട് നഗരത്തിലും ഫറോക്ക് മേഖലയിലെ വിവിധ ഭാഗങ്ങളിലുമായി ചില്ലറ വില്‍പ്പന നടത്തി വരികയായിരുന്നു. പെയിന്റിങ് തൊഴിലാളിയായ ഇയാള്‍ ഇടയ്ക്കിടെ നാട്ടില്‍ പോയി വരാറുണ്ടെന്നും കഞ്ചാവുമായി തിരികെ വരുമ്പോള്‍ പരിശോധന ഒഴിവാക്കുന്നതിനായി പുലര്‍ച്ചെ കോഴിക്കോട് എത്തുന്ന സ്ലീപ്പര്‍ ബസുകള്‍ ഉപയോഗിച്ച് രാമനാട്ടുകരയില്‍ ഇറങ്ങി ഓട്ടോറിക്ഷയില്‍ താമസസ്ഥലത്തേക്ക് പോകുന്നതാണ് രീതിയെന്നും പൊലീസ് മനസ്സിലാക്കിയിരുന്നു. പ്രസല്‍ പ്രഥാന്റെ നീക്കങ്ങള്‍ നിരീക്ഷിച്ച പൊലീസ് രാമനാട്ടുകരയില്‍ കാത്തുനിന്ന ശേഷമാണ് ബസില്‍ നിന്ന് ട്രോളി ബാഗുമായി ഇറങ്ങിയ ഇയാളെ കസ്റ്റഡിയിലെടുത്തത്. ബാഗ് പരിശോധിച്ചപ്പോള്‍ 11 കിലോഗ്രാം കഞ്ചാവ് കണ്ടെത്തുകയായിരുന്നു.</p>

title: Lakers signing 146-game starting veteran guard to $60 million contract
description: The Los Angeles Lakers are finalizing a $60 million contract with a veteran guard who has spent the last two seasons with the Philadelphia 76ers.
content:
Lakers signing 146-game starting veteran guard to $60 million contract originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.The Los Angeles Lakers are having an active Day 2 of NBA free agency.After striking an agreement with the Utah Jazzon a sign-and-trade for center Walker Kessler, the Lakers are also signing Philadelphia 76ers free agent guard Quentin Grimes to a four-year deal worth $60 million.The news comes from ESPN's Shams Charania."Free agent guard Quentin Grimes has agreed to a four-year, $60 million to join the Los Angeles Lakers, with a player option, sources tell ESPN," Charania reported.Why Lakers are signing Quentin GrimesUPDATE: Los Angeles has also signed Sandro Mamukelashvili and guard Colin Sexton. Rob Pelinka is making moves today.Grimes is a fantastic 3-and-D player who fits what the Lakers need in a role player next to Luka Doncic.Though he isn't an elite three-point shooter, Grimes can knock down open shots and has a career three-point percentage of 36.6%. The 26-year-old has also been very durable over the last two seasons, which goes a long way in this league.And of course, Grimes' perimeter defense is what makes this signing a great one for Los Angeles. The Houston native is tenacious and incredibly savvy on that end, and his versatile defensive skill set is much needed in the Lakers' backcourt.Overall, getting Grimes on a $15 million-per-season deal is tremendous value. The Kansas product should immediately step in as a key piece to JJ Redick's rotation and add quality depth in the backcourt behind Doncic and Austin Reaves.

title: Dehradun district tourism officer suspended for demanding bribe
सिर्फ 2 घंटे की बारिश में सड़कें बनीं दरिया, संभाजीनगर मनपा मुख्यालय भी डूबा; यही थी प्री-मानसून तैयारी?
description: Sambhajinagar Heavy Rain: छत्रपति संभाजीनगर में सिर्फ 2 घंटे की बारिश से खुली प्री-मानसून तैयारियों की पोल। सड़कें बनीं दरिया, मनपा मुख्यालय, कॉलोनियों और अस्पतालों के बेसमेंट में घुसा पानी।
content:
Sambhajinagar Heavy Rain Municipal Corporation Headquarter Flooded: छत्रपति संभाजीनगर में जून के अंतिम सप्ताह तक अच्छी बारिश का इंतजार कर रहे शहर को बुधवार को आखिरकार झमाझम बारिश का तोहफा मिला, लेकिन महज दो घंटे की बारिश ने शहर व्यवस्था की तैयारियों की वास्तविक तस्वीर भी सामने ला दी। दोपहर दो बजे से चार बजे के बीच हुई 36 मिलीमीटर बारिश के कारण शहर के प्रमुख मार्ग, चौराहे और निचले इलाके पानी में डूब गए। कई आवासीय कॉलोनियों, निजी अस्पतालों और आवासीय परिसरों के बेसमेंट में पानी भर गया। इतना ही नहीं, मनपा मुख्यालय के निचले हिस्से में भी पानी पहुंच गया, जिससे प्रशासन की बारिश पूर्व तैयारियों पर गंभीर सवाल खड़े कर दिए ।
मूसलाधार बारिश शुरू होते ही कई प्रमुख मार्गों पर पानी भरने लगा। कुछ स्थानों पर घुटनों तक तो कई इलाकों में कमर तक पानी जमा हो गया। जलभराव के कारण वाहन चालकों को भारी परेशानी का सामना करना पड़ा। कई दोपहिया और चारपहिया वाहनों के इंजन पानी में बंद हो गए, जिससे लंबा यातायात जाम लग गया और लोगों को वैकल्पिक मार्गों का सहारा लेना पड़ा।
मनपा मुख्यालय भी नहीं बचा
बारिश का सबसे चौंकाने वाला असर मनपा मुख्यालय में देखने को मिला। मुख्यालय के निचले हिस्से में पानी भर जाने से कर्मचारियों को कठिनाइयों का सामना करना पड़ा। प्रशासन ने बारिश के पूर्व नालों की सफाई और जल निकासी व्यवस्था दुरुस्त होने का दावा किया था, उसी के कार्यालय में पानी घुसने से उन दावों की विश्वसनीयता पर सवाल उठने लगे।
कॉलोनियों और अस्पतालों में घुसा पानी
गारखेडा क्षेत्र के विजय नगर स्थित जय दुर्गा सोसायटी के बेसमेंट में बड़ी मात्रा में पानी भर गया। न्यू हनुमान नगर में अष्टविनायक मंदिर के पास एक मकान में वर्षा का पानी घुस गया। उल्कानगरी स्थित अगस्ती होम के सामने सड़क पूरी तरह जलमग्न हो गई, जिससे यातायात कुछ समय के लिए बाधित रहा। वहीं सिडको एन-3 क्षेत्र के एक निजी अस्पताल के बेसमेंट में भी पानी भर जाने से कर्मचारियों और मरीजों के परिजनों में अफरा-तफरी मच गई।
अग्निशमन दल ने संभाला मोर्चा
जलभराव की लगातार मिल रही शिकायतों के बाद अग्निशमन विभाग की टीमों ने विभिन्न क्षेत्रों में पहुंचकर राहत कार्य शुरू किया। मोटर पंपों की सहायता से बेसमेंट और भवनों में भरा पानी बाहर निकाला गया। कई स्थानों पर नागरिकों को सुरक्षित स्थानों तक पहुंचाने और जल निकासी सुनिश्चित करने का कार्य देर शाम तक जारी रहा।
पेड़ गिरने से यातायात प्रभावित
समर्थनगर स्थित विवेकानंद महाविद्यालय के पीछे तेज बारिश के दौरान एक विशाल पेड़ सड़क पर गिर गया। इससे कुछ समय के लिए यातायात प्रभावित हुआ। सूचना मिलते ही संबंधित दल मौके पर पहुंचा और पेड़ हटाकर मार्ग को फिर से चालू कराया। इस घटना में किसी प्रकार की जनहानि नहीं हुई।
नालों की सफाई पर फिर उठे सवाल
मनपा ने बारिश से पहले करोड़ों रुपये खर्च कर नालों की सफाई पूरी करने का दावा किया था, लेकिन पहली ही तेज बारिश में कई नाले उफान पर आ गए और पानी सड़कों व रिहायशी इलाकों में भर गया। कॉलोनियों, अस्पतालों और यहां तक कि छत्रपति संभाजीनगर महानगरपालिका मुख्यालय तक पानी पहुंचने के बाद नागरिकों ने जल निकासी व्यवस्था और नाला सफाई कार्यों की गुणवत्ता पर सवाल उठाए हैं। लोगों का कहना है कि यदि मात्र दो घंटे की बारिश में यह स्थिति बन सकती है, तो आगामी दिनों में भारी वर्षा होने पर हालात और गंभीर हो सकते हैं।
यह भी पढ़ें:  संभाजीनगर मनपा का बड़ा एक्शन, अक्टूबर से हटेगा अतिक्रमण, सड़क चौड़ीकरण की जद में आएंगी 1,040 संपत्तियां 
आगे भी सतर्क रहने की सलाह
मौसम विभाग द्वारा आगामी दिनों में भी बारिश की संभावना जताई गई है। इसे देखते हुए प्रशासन ने संबंधित विभागों को सतर्क रहने के निर्देश दिए हैं, जबकि नागरिकों से भी जलभराव वाले क्षेत्रों से दूर रहने और आवश्यकता पड़ने पर प्रशासन की हेल्पलाइन से संपर्क करने की अपील की गई है।
– नवभारत लाइव के लिए छत्रपति संभाजीनगर से शफीउल्ला हुसैनी की रिपोर्ट

title: WTA Finals moves to Indian Wells after Saudi deal ended early
description: The Women's Tennis Association is ending its partnership with Saudi Arabia to host the season-ending Finals a year early, with the tournament to move to Indian Wells.
content: Elena Rybakina defeated Aryna Sabalenka to win the singles title at the 2025 WTA Finals [Getty Images]The Women's Tennis Association (WTA) is ending its partnership with Saudi Arabia to host the season-ending Finals a year early, with the tournament to move to Indian Wells in California.The tournament has been held in Riyadh for the past two years after the WTA signed a three-year agreement with the Saudi Tennis Federation (STF) in April 2024, a deal that included record prize money.But the final year of the agreement has been terminated by mutual consent after the STF accepted the WTA's request to stage this year's finals elsewhere.BBC Sport understands that the ongoing tension between Iran and the United States has made planning for the Finals more challenging, and is one reason why the contract has ended one year early.The event, featuring the top eight singles players and doubles teams of the year, will now take place in Indian Wells from 8-15 November.Valerie Camillo, chair of the WTA, said this year's event at the Indian Wells Tennis Garden allows the organisation to "continue building one of the premier championships in global sport"."The Indian Wells Tennis Garden provides an exceptional stage for the WTA Finals," Camillo added."From its world-class facilities and passionate fan base to its proven ability to deliver premier tennis events, the venue offers everything needed to showcase the very best of women's tennis."Indian Wells already hosts WTA events at the BNP Paribas Open in March.When the WTA decided to take the Finals to Saudi Arabia in 2024, the decision was met with significant backlash.Saudi Arabia had been accused of using events to 'sportswash' its reputation amid accusations of violating human rights and restricting women's lives and freedom of speech.However, WTA chief executive Steve Simon defended the decision, saying that by choosing Riyadh, women's tennis would be "supporting significant change being made within the region"."The WTA has been breaking down barriers for more than 50 years," Simon told BBC Sport."We want to create more opportunities for women to play tennis at the elite level, and I think by doing this, we believe that we can inspire more women and girls to get involved with the sport."We are a global sport. The WTA now has all of these events and people from around the world that do reflect different cultures and systems."Saudi Arabia won the rights to host the event the WTA assessed "multiple bids from different regions" and evaluated potential hosts on three criteria, including support for the organisation's ambition to achieve equal prize money for women.Live scores, results and order of playGet tennis news sent straight to your phone

title: ഖത്തർ സമ്മാനിച്ച പുതിയ എയർഫോഴ്‌സ് വണ്ണിൽ ആദ്യ യാത്ര നടത്തി യുഎസ് പ്രസിഡന്റ് ട്രംപ്
Tigers place reliever Will Vest on 15-day IL with elbow inflammation
description: The Detroit Tigers placed righty Will Vest on the 15-day IL with elbow inflammation retroactive to June 28.
content: The Detroit Tigersplaced reliever Will Vest on the 15-day injured list with posterior right elbow inflammation, as announced on Wednesday, July 1. The team recalled reliever Beau Brieske from Triple-A Toledo to take his place on the active roster.Vest's placement on the injured list is retroactive to June 28. This is the second time he has landed on the IL in 2026, after making a 15-day IL stint in early May with right forearm inflammation.Vest last pitched in an 8-6 Tigers loss to the Houston Astros on June 27, with Vest allowing three runs (two earned) on four hits over one inning in that game. Vest was one of Detroit's high-leverage relievers over the last two seasons, sporting a 2.91 ERA over 71⅓ innings pitched form 2024-25. His ERA has ballooned to 6.08 over 26 ⅔ innings pitched in 2026, however, with only two saves after saving a team-high 23 games for the Tigers in 2025.Vest has also experienced a slight decrease in fastball velocity form 2025 to 2026, running an average of 96.5 mph in 2025 (84th percentile per Statcast) down to 95.7 in 2026 (71st percentile).Need to catch up on the news during your lunch break? Sign up for our Sports Briefing newsletter to get daily summaries of Detroit sports! You can reach Christian at cromo@freepress.com.This article originally appeared on Detroit Free Press: Tigers place reliever Will Vest on 15-day IL with elbow inflammation

title: Fever's Stephanie White comes to Alyssa Thomas' defense amid 'unacceptable toxicity' after Caitlin Clark incident
description: White's comments underscore the tension in fan-player relationships.
content:
Fever's Stephanie White comes to Alyssa Thomas' defense amid 'unacceptable toxicity' after Caitlin Clark incident originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.Indiana Fever head coach Stephanie White has lashed out at the "unacceptable" social media posts that have threatened Alyssa Thomas after the Phoenix Mercury forward -- inadvertently or otherwise -- drove her fist into Caitlin Clark's throat in last week's game at Gainbridge Fieldhouse.Thomas, a six-time All-Star and a three-time All-Defense selection, was retroactively suspended one game by the WNBA following the incident. Upon returning to team activities on Tuesday, Thomas criticized commissioner Cathy Engelbert's response to the death threats and racial slurs she has received online, saying that the league continues to risk player safety as its business continues to expand.MORE: WNBA's Cathy Engelbert - Alyssa Thomas drama overshadows Commissioner's Cup classicWhite, who had referred to Thomas' incident with Clark as "egregious," came to the defense of her former player when she met with the media on Wednesday."I think as a league, as a whole, there's been so much more toxicity, racism, homophobia, straight out nonsense, hate nonsense," White, who coached Thomas with the Connecticut Sun, told reporters. "It is absolutely unacceptable. Most of this coming from the online community."Fever head coach Stephanie White addresses Alyssa Thomas’ comments and “unacceptable” fan behavior: pic.twitter.com/55KB1zIX5z— Tony East (@TonyREast) July 1, 2026White insisted that much of the hate speech was coming from online fans who are seeking to use Clark as a cudgel in bad-faith debates that invariably invoke racist tropes against the Fever star's opponents. White called those people "jerks" and told them to stop calling themselves WNBA fans."Our league is about elevating, elevating women, elevating marginalized communities and being inclusive of all different walks of life. That is what our league has always been about from day one. That is what our league will continue to be about. And we will continue to compete at a high level, hold ourselves to a higher standard, continue to be on the forefront of social norms, and we will continue to support one another collectively as a league," White said. "Players, coaches, staff, support staff, everyone. We're about elevating. We are not about demeaning, demanding, We are not about continuing this narrative. And it's just absolutely unacceptable." More WNBA news:Indiana Fever make coaching staff move before showdown with AcesSophie Cunningham has one big request after watching the FIFA World CupHow long A'ja Wilson will be out for Aces with ankle injuryCaitlin Clark injury update: Fever star begins individual workouts as Stephanie White shares encouraging news

title: Sacramento Kings say hello again to Jalen Duren
description: Duren might have one option left.
content:
Sacramento Kings say hello again to Jalen Duren originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.The options are going away for Jalen Duren as trade rumors swirl around the Detroit Pistons center.The Sacramento Kings have popped their head around the corner and said hello again.Duren may have preferred the Los Angeles Lakers, but they're off the table. They just swung a big deal for Walker Kessler from the Utah Jazz.He may have wanted the Boston Celtics, but they're gone, too. Mitchell Robinson has signed with them.Does that just leave the Kings?MORE: Bronny James' best future doesn't involve a trade from LakersThey're the main team that was involved in the initial Duren rumors, and they haven't yet added a different center.The problem with Sacramento is that they'd probably have to pull off a sign-and-trade to make it happen. The most likely player to go the other way would be Domantas Sabonis.And would the Pistons have any interest in Sabonis? You wouldn't think so, unless they really got backed into a corner.It will be an interesting philosophical experiment, though.MORE: Why the Warriors are a terrible fit for LeBron JamesDoes Duren want all the money he can get? Then he should consider Sacramento.Does Duren want to win? He should probably stay in Detroit.Multiple teams that had the option to go after Duren went in other directions. That's probably not a good sign for him.More NBA news:Why the Hornets traded LaMelo Ball to the TimberwolvesWarriors want Kawhi Leonard, but there's a problemHow Heat can unite Giannis with his brothersKnicks had a superstar opportunity but didn't go for itGiannis legacy with the Bucks remains intact

title: Mavericks’ make shocking jersey number decisions for two key players as franchise enters new era
description: Mavericks star Max Christie is reportedly moving from No. 00 to No. 0, while Naji Marshall transitions from No. 13 to No. 3.
content:
Mavericks’ make shocking jersey number decisions for two key players as franchise enters new era originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.Since the controversial trade involving Luka Doncic, the Dallas Mavericks have undergone a dramatic organizational transformation. The franchise parted ways with general manager Nico Harrison and brought in Masai Ujiri to lead the front office. Head coach Jason Kidd also exited the organization, with Michigan coach Dusty May later agreeing to take over as the new head coach.Beyond leadership changes, the Mavericks also reshaped their roster significantly. However, that turbulent transition period now appears to be over and the franchise is officially stepping into a new era. Dallas is currently focused on stability and player satisfaction, even accommodating personal preferences such as jersey numbers.NBA reporter Mike Curtis detailed recent updates regarding jersey number changes within the roster. According to Curtis, both Max Christie and Naji Marshall will be switching numbers heading into the new season.“Max Christie and Naji Marshall are changing their jersey numbers, per a #Mavs spokesperson: Christie will switch from No. 00 to No. 0, previously worn by Dante Exum in 2025-26. Marshall is changing his number from No. 13 to No. 3, previously worn by Anthony Davis in 2025-26,” Curtis wrote.These numbers became available following major roster turnover, as both Dante Exum and Anthony Davis are no longer part of the Mavericks organization. Both were moved to the Washington Wizards in a previous trade. With those departures, new opportunities emerged for remaining players.Meanwhile, both Christie and Marshall are heading into their third season with the Mavericks. Each of them has played an important part in helping Dallas navigate a major period of transition and roster restructuring.While Marshall has solidified himself as a dependable starter, Christie has been utilized as an important developmental asset within the team’s backcourt rotation. As a result, Dallas had no hesitation in granting them the jersey numbers they preferred.More NBA news:Mavericks made an offer Dusty May couldn't refuse and he finally explains whyKevin Durant throws cold water on Knicks' championship hype – here's whySpurs had a bigger plan all along for Julian Champagnie and it’s interestingMavericks' new era begins with Dusty May's boldest prediction yetMavericks receive tough update on Daniel Gafford's trade value – and it's challenging

title: Official: Bayern Munich announce signing of Ismael Saibari from PSV
description: FC Bayern Munich has completed the signing of Ismael Saibari from PSV Eindhoven, the Bundesliga champions have confirmed.The versatile forward is currently on international team duty for Morocco at th...
content: Official: Bayern Munich announce signing of Ismael Saibari from PSVFC Bayern Munich has completed the signing of Ismael Saibari from PSV Eindhoven, the Bundesliga champions have confirmed.The versatile forward is currently on international team duty for Morocco at the World Cup in the USA, Mexico and Canada.He will move from the Dutch champions to Munich after the tournament. Saibari has been handed a contract until 30 June 2031.“We’re delighted to have secured the services of Ismael Saibari, one of the most exciting forwards at the World Cup."Transfers like this don’t happen on the spur of the moment but are the result of long-term planning."The key factor was that we made our position clear to him early on because we were aware of Ismael’s skills and were able to show him a clear future with us from the start.“Ismael Saibari will bring extra quality and unpredictability to our attacking play,” said Max Eberl, FC Bayern's board member for sport.As for the 25-year-old, who will wear the number 34 jersey for the Bavarians, he was delighted to join such a prestigious side:"As a child, you dream of signing a contract with a club like FC Bayern – everybody knows it’s one of the world’s biggest clubs."FC Bayern compete for the biggest titles like the Champions League every year, and I want to win as many trophies as possible here."FC Bayern’s play suits me, I can play my own style of football here, and I’ll work hard every day to help the team."Coach Vincent Kompany played a key role in my decision – I’m looking forward to working with him.”

title: रीवा में नशे के खिलाफ बड़ी कार्रवाई, पानी के जार में छिपाकर बेच रहा था नशीला कफ सिरप; पुलिस ने आरोपी को दबोचा
description: Operation Prahar 2.0: रीवा में ऑपरेशन प्रहार 2.0, पानी के जार में नशीला कफ सिरप छिपाकर बेचता तस्कर मयंक मिश्रा गिरफ्तार, अमहिया पुलिस कमान ने कूट घेराबंदी कर दबोचा।
content:
Rewa Illegal Cough Syrup Seized: रीवा शहर में नशीले पदार्थों की अवैध बिक्री पर रोक लगाने के लिए चलाए जा रहे ऑपरेशन प्रहार 2.0 के तहत अमहिया थाना पुलिस को बड़ी सफलता मिली है। पुलिस ने एक युवक को नशीला कफ सिरप के साथ गिरफ्तार किया है, जो पानी के जार में शीशियां छिपाकर शहर में घूम-घूमकर उनकी बिक्री कर रहा था।
पुलिस को 30 जून को मुखबिर से सूचना मिली थी कि नरेंद्र नगर स्थित खमरिया हाउस के पास एक युवक पुलिया के निकट संदिग्ध गतिविधियों में लिप्त है और पानी के जार में छिपाकर नशीला कफ सिरप बेचने के लिए ग्राहकों का इंतजार कर रहा है। सूचना मिलते ही पुलिस टीम मौके पर पहुंची और घेराबंदी कर कार्रवाई शुरू की।
पुलिस को देखकर भागने लगा आरोपी, पीछा कर किया गिरफ्तार
पुलिस टीम को देखते ही संदिग्ध युवक मौके से भागने लगा, लेकिन पुलिसकर्मियों ने उसका पीछा कर उसे पकड़ लिया। पूछताछ में आरोपी ने अपनी पहचान मयंक मिश्रा उर्फ अमन गौतम (24) निवासी सुंदर नगर, बोदाबाग, थाना विश्वविद्यालय, जिला रीवा के रूप में बताई। तलाशी के दौरान रीवा पुलिस ने उसके कब्जे से पानी के जार में छिपाकर रखी गई बड़ी मात्रा में नशीला कफ सिरप बरामद की। बरामद सामग्री को जब्त कर पुलिस ने आरोपी के खिलाफ एनडीपीएस एक्ट और अन्य संबंधित धाराओं के तहत मामला दर्ज कर उसे गिरफ्तार कर लिया।
सप्लाई नेटवर्क की तलाश में जुटी पुलिस
गिरफ्तारी के बाद पुलिस अब आरोपी से गहन पूछताछ कर रही है। जांच एजेंसियां यह पता लगाने में जुटी हैं कि आरोपी नशीला कफ सिरप कहां से लाता था, इसके पीछे कौन-कौन लोग जुड़े हुए हैं और शहर में किन लोगों तक इसकी सप्लाई की जाती थी। पुलिस का मानना है कि पूछताछ से नशे के अवैध कारोबार से जुड़े अन्य लोगों के बारे में भी महत्वपूर्ण जानकारी मिल सकती है। अधिकारियों का कहना है कि जिले में नशे के खिलाफ अभियान लगातार जारी रहेगा और ऐसे कारोबार में शामिल किसी भी व्यक्ति को बख्शा नहीं जाएगा।
ऑपरेशन प्रहार 2.0 के तहत लगातार हो रही कार्रवाई
रीवा पुलिस ने स्पष्ट किया है कि जिले में नशीले पदार्थों की तस्करी और अवैध बिक्री पर प्रभावी अंकुश लगाने के लिए ऑपरेशन प्रहार 2.0 के तहत लगातार अभियान चलाया जा रहा है। इसी अभियान के तहत यह कार्रवाई की गई।
यह भी पढ़ें: इंदौर में लव जिहाद का भंडाफोड़, मुस्लिम युवक ने छिपाई पहचान खुद को बताया अश्विन शर्मा; हिंदू संगठन ने दबोचा
इस पूरी कार्रवाई में उपनिरीक्षक शिवा अग्रवाल, सहायक उपनिरीक्षक सुरेश शुक्ला, प्रधान आरक्षक अरुणकांत द्विवेदी तथा आरक्षक विकास तिवारी, दिवाकर तिवारी, कौशलेंद्र सिंह और आशीष पांडेय की महत्वपूर्ण भूमिका रही। अधिकारियों ने पूरी पुलिस टीम की सराहना करते हुए कहा कि भविष्य में भी नशे के अवैध कारोबार के खिलाफ इसी तरह सख्त कार्रवाई जारी रहेगी।

title: வாட்ஸ்ஆப் எண்ணுக்கு பதில் யூசர்நேம் எதற்கு? மெட்டாவுக்கு மத்திய அரசு கேள்வி
NASA inspector general suggests Boeing's Starliner will now be a decade late
description: Starliner's certification may be delayed to 2027, 10 years later than Boeing's original schedule.
content:
NASA's inspector general released an audit Tuesday of the agency's Commercial Crew Program, and it looks increasingly likely that Boeing's Starliner crew capsule won't be certified for operational flights to the International Space Station until next year.
That's just three years before NASA's official retirement date for the ISS in 2030, though lawmakers in Congress are seeking an extension until 2032. What's more, declaring Starliner ready for regular crew rotation flights next year would put the Boeing crew capsule a decade behind its original target of 2017.
The inspector general issued six recommendations. NASA officials agreed to all of them. The recommendations include developing a schedule for the next Starliner flight and future crew missions and making sure the schedule is updated to include sufficient time to ensure all of the problems from Starliner's first test flight with astronauts in 2024 are "resolved and documented."Read full article

title: Passing Out Parade ପ୍ରଶିକ୍ଷଣ ଶେଷ କଲେ ୧୨୨ ଅବକାରୀ ଉପଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଓ ଉପନିରୀକ୍ଷକ
అయోధ్య నిధులపై వివాదం.. మోదీ, అమిత్ షాలపై జగ్గారెడ్డి ఫైర్
description: Jaggareddy: అయోధ్య శ్రీరామ మందిరంలో భక్తులు కానుకలుగా సమర్పించిన హుండీ నిధుల దొంగతనం వ్యవహారంపై కాంగ్రెస్ సీనియర్ నాయకుడు, జగ్గారెడ్డి తీవ్రస్థాయిలో ధ్వజమెత్తారు. కేంద్రంలోనూ, ఉత్తరప్రదేశ్‌లోనూ అధికారంలో...
content:
Jaggareddy: అయోధ్య శ్రీరామ మందిరంలో భక్తులు కానుకలుగా సమర్పించిన హుండీ నిధుల దొంగతనం వ్యవహారంపై కాంగ్రెస్ సీనియర్ నాయకుడు,  జగ్గారెడ్డి తీవ్రస్థాయిలో ధ్వజమెత్తారు. కేంద్రంలోనూ, ఉత్తరప్రదేశ్‌లోనూ అధికారంలో ఉన్నది బీజేపీ ప్రభుత్వమేనని.. అలాగే రామాలయ ట్రస్ట్ కూడా వారి ప్రత్యక్ష పర్యవేక్షణలోనే నడుస్తోందని ఆయన గుర్తుచేశారు. ఇంత జరుగుతున్నా ఆలయంలో దొంగతనం జరగడం సిగ్గుచేటని మండిపడ్డారు.







Read also: Kavitha New Party objections: కవిత కొత్త పార్టీ ‘టీఆర్ఎస్’ పేరుపై సందిగ్ధత.. ఈసీకి భారీగా అభ్యంతరాలు!



బీజేపీపై జగ్గారెడ్డి తీవ్ర విమర్శలు



రాముడి గుడిలోనే దొంగతనం జరిగితే దేశ ప్రధాని నరేంద్ర మోదీ, కేంద్ర హోంమంత్రి అమిత్ షా కనీసం స్పందించకపోవడం దారుణమని జగ్గారెడ్డి విమర్శించారు. ఇన్నేళ్లుగా బీజేపీ నాయకులు శ్రీరాముడి పేరును కేవలం తమ రాజకీయ స్వార్థం కోసం, ఓటు బ్యాంక్ రాజకీయాల కోసమే వాడుకున్నారని ఆరోపించారు.



అయోధ్యలో జరిగిన ఈ నిధుల చోరీ ఘటనపై వాస్తవాలు తెలుసుకునేందుకు కాంగ్రెస్ అగ్రనేత రాహుల్ గాంధీ త్వరలోనే ఒక ఎంపీల బృందాన్ని అక్కడికి పంపించనున్నట్లు జగ్గారెడ్డి వెల్లడించారు. కాంగ్రెస్ పార్టీ అన్ని మతాలను సమానంగా గౌరవిస్తుందని చెప్తూ.. ఈ ఘోర వైఫల్యానికి బాధ్యత వహిస్తూ ప్రధాని మోదీ దేశ ప్రజలకు తక్షణమే క్షమాపణ చెప్పాలని ఆయన డిమాండ్ చేశారు.



Jaggareddy: కేటీఆర్ ట్వీట్లకు గట్టి కౌంటర్!



ఇదే సమయంలో తెలంగాణ కాంగ్రెస్ ప్రభుత్వంపై, సీఎం రేవంత్ రెడ్డిపై బీఆర్ఎస్ (BRS) వర్కింగ్ ప్రెసిడెంట్ కేటీఆర్ చేస్తున్న విమర్శలపై జగ్గారెడ్డి తనదైన శైలిలో స్పందించారు. అధికారంలో లేకపోవడంతో ప్రస్తుతం కేటీఆర్ పూర్తిగా ఖాళీగా ఉండి మాట్లాడుతున్నారని ఎద్దేవా చేశారు.



కానీ ముఖ్యమంత్రి రేవంత్ రెడ్డి మాత్రం గత బీఆర్ఎస్ ప్రభుత్వం చేసిన వేల కోట్ల అప్పులను తీరుస్తూనే.. మహిళలకు ఉచిత బస్సు ప్రయాణం, ఇందిరమ్మ ఇళ్లు, ఉచిత విద్యుత్ వంటి ఎన్నికల హామీలను క్షేత్రస్థాయిలో అమలు చేయడంలో బిజీగా ఉన్నారని జగ్గారెడ్డి స్పష్టం చేశారు. కేటీఆర్ ఎన్ని విమర్శలు చేసినా, ఎలాంటి కుట్రలు పన్నినా రేవంత్ రెడ్డే ఐదేళ్లు సీఎంగా కొనసాగుతారని ఆయన ధీమా వ్యక్తం చేశారు.
