title: अवैध घुसपैठियों पर शिकंजा कसने की तैयारी में मोदी सरकार, अमित शाह ने 9 जुलाई को बुलाई हाई लेवल मीटिंग
description: Modi Government: गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने 9 जुलाई को दिल्ली में सभी राज्यों के डीजीपी और केंद्रीय सुरक्षा एजेंसियों की बड़ी बैठक बुलाई है, जिसमें अवैध घुसपैठियों के खिलाफ रणनीति बनेगी।
content:
Amit Shah Calles DGP Meet: देश के गृह मंत्री अमित शाह ने 9 जुलाई को दिल्ली में एक बड़ी बैठक बुलाई है। इस बैठक में राज्यों के पुलिस महानिदेशकों ( DGP) और एजेंसियां शामिल होंगी। जानकारी के मुताबिक, देशभर से नक्सलवाद के खात्मे के बाद अब सरकार का अलगा कदम अवैध घुसपैठियों के खिलाफ होने वाला है। माना जा रहा है कि बैठक में अमित शाह राज्यों के DGP से इससे जुड़ी रणनीति पर चर्चा करेंगे।
सूत्रों से मिली जानकारी के मुताबिक, बैठक में सभी राज्यों के पुलिस महानिदेशकों के अलावा  इंटेलिजेंस ब्यूरो (IB), रिसर्च एंड एनालिसिस विंग (RAW), राष्ट्रीय जांच एजेंसी (NIA), सीमा सुरक्षा बल (BSF), सशस्त्र सीमा बल (SSB) समेत सभी प्रमुख केंद्रीय सुरक्षा और खुफिया एजेंसियों के प्रमुख भी शामिल होंगे।
अवैध घुसपैठियों पर होगा एक्शन
बैठक का मुख्य एजेंडा देशभर में अवैध घुसपैठियों की पहचान, उन्हें उनके देश वापस भेजने की प्रक्रिया में तेजी लाना और घुसपैठ से जुड़े पूरे नेटवर्क के खिलाफ मिलकर कार्रवाई की रणनीति तैयार करना है। अमित शाह कई मौकों पर इस मुद्दे को राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा से जुड़ा बताते हुए सख्त कार्रवाई की प्रतिबद्धता जता चुके हैं।
सरकार का मानना है कि चुनौती केवल अवैध तरीके से सीमा पार करने तक सीमित नहीं है, बल्कि घुसपैठियों को फर्जी दस्तावेज उपलब्ध कराने, उन्हें बसाने, रोजगार दिलाने और देश के विभिन्न हिस्सों तक पहुंचाने वाला एक संगठित नेटवर्क भी सक्रिय है। सूत्रों के अनुसार, बैठक में इस पूरे इको-सिस्टम को ध्वस्त करने के लिए ठोस रोडमैप तैयार करने पर विशेष जोर रहेगा।
पीएम मोदी ने जताई थी चिंता
पिछले साल 15 अगस्त को प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी ने लाल किले से अपने संबोधन में सीमावर्ती क्षेत्रों में हो रहे डेमोग्राफी बदवाल को राष्ट्रीय सुरक्षा के लिए गंभीर चुनौती बताया था। इसके बाद गृह मंत्रालय ने सेवानिवृत्त न्यायाधीश जस्टिस प्रकाश श्रीवास्तव की अध्यक्षता में एक हाई लेवल समिति का गठन किया, जो सीमावर्ती इलाकों के साथ-साथ महानगरों और औद्योगिक शहरों में भी इस विषय का अध्ययन कर रही है।
यह भी पढ़ें-  बिना PUC नहीं मिलेगा पेट्रोल और… सर्दियों से पहले दिल्ली में लागू होंंगे नए नियम, रेखा सरकार ने कसी कमर
सरकार का मानना है कि अलग-अलग राज्यों में बिखरे हुए प्रयासों के बजाय पूरे देश में एक साथ क्रमबद्ध अभियान चलाकर ही इस चुनौती का प्रभावी समाधान किया जा सकता है। माना जा रहा है कि 9 जुलाई की बैठक के बाद देशभर में अवैध घुसपैठियों की पहचान और उनके खिलाफ कार्रवाई को लेकर एक व्यापक राष्ट्रीय अभियान की रूपरेखा तय की जा सकती है।

title: Welcome To The Jungle Cast Fees: How Much Did Akshay Kumar, Raveena Tandon And Five Others Reportedly Earn
description: Welcome to the Jungle, directed by Ahmed Khan, was theatrically released on June 26. Here's how much Akshay Kumar and his six other co-stars reportedly earned for their roles in the comic caper.
content: Welcome to the Jungle, directed by Ahmed Khan, was theatrically released on June 26. Here's how much Akshay Kumar and his six other co-stars reportedly earned for their roles in the comic caper.Welcome To The Jungle12 years after Welcome Back, the makers arrived with the third installment titled, Welcome to the Jungle. Directed by Ahmed Khan, the film was theatrically released on June 26. Starring Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Suniel Shetty and others, the movie is doing well at the box office. Amid its success, the rumoured remuneration of the star cast has surfaced online. Here's how much the actors were reportedly paid.Akshay KumarMedia reports claimed that Bollywood actor Akshay Kumar apparently charged Rs 1.7 crore for his role in Welcome to the Jungle. However, at the trailer launch, the actor dismissed the speculation, saying, "Utna bhi nahi liya."Suniel ShettyAccording to BollywoodShaadis, Suniel Shetty reportedly received Rs 4 crore to play the role of Yeda Anna in the third installment of Welcome. The actor reunited with his Hera Pheri co-stars Akshay and Paresh Rawal in this project.Raveena TandonAs far as Raveena Tandon is concerned, the actress is rumoured to have earned Rs 2 crore. She played the role of Zoya in the comic-caper, which has earned over Rs 120 crore at the worldwide box office.Disha PataniDisha Patani essayed the character of heroine Nadia in the comic-caper. The actress is speculated to have received Rs 2.5 crore for her part in Welcome 3. However, there's no official confirmation about the same.Jacqueline FernandezJacqueline Fernandez essayed the character Jenny in Welcome to the Jungle. If media reports are to be believed, the Bollywood actress was apparently paid Rs 2.5 crore for her part.Arshad Warsi And Paresh RawalArshad Warsi is associated with Welcome to the Jungle as Romeo. On the other hand, Paresh Rawal played the character of a director in it. Both actors reportedly charged Rs 2 crore for this project.

title: Big Aadhaar Update: UIDAI launches new app, discontinues mAadhaar -  Face unlock, QR share, free email updates and more
description: Big Aadhaar Update: UIDAI has officially discontinued the mAadhaar app and migrated users to the new Aadhaar app. The upgraded platform offers improved functionality focused on privacy and secure sharing of Aadhaar details.
content: Aadhaar Update: The Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI) has launched a revamped Aadhaar mobile application, replacing the older mAdhaar app with advanced privacy controls and user-friendly features aimed at simplifying digital identity verification.The move is part of UIDAI’s ongoing efforts to strengthen data protection while enhancing ease of living under the Digital India initiative.mAadhaar Discontinued: Transition to New AppUIDAI has officially discontinued the mAadhaar app and migrated users to the new Aadhaar app. The upgraded platform offers improved functionality focused on privacy and secure sharing of Aadhaar details.“Enjoy a smoother concert entry experience with Aadhaar app,” UIDAI posted on X, encouraging users to download the new application.Key features of the New Aadhaar AppFace Authentication: Users can securely log in and verify their identity using facial recognition technology.QR Code-Based Sharing: Aadhaar details can now be shared instantly via scannable QR codes, reducing the need to display full information.Selective Data Sharing: Individuals can choose exactly which details (such as name, photo, or address) they wish to share, giving users greater control over their personal data.Aadhaar Lock/Unlock and Virtual ID: New options under the Security tab allow users to lock their Aadhaar to prevent misuse and generate Virtual IDs.Aadhaar Update History: A dedicated section in the Profile tab lets users track all past modifications to their Aadhaar records.Multi-Profile Support and Multilingual Interface: The app supports multiple Aadhaar profiles on one device and is available in several Indian languages.Also Read | EPFO introduces EPS scheme 2026: Replaces old plans, faster claims, same pension formula – What subscribers should knowFree email updates and otherStarting July 1, users can update their email ID through the app free of cost until December 31, 2026. This temporary waiver is expected to encourage residents to keep their records current.The app also allows seamless management of Aadhaar services, including downloading e-Aadhaar and handling verifications.How to download and get startedDownload the new Aadhaar App from Google Play Store (Android) or Apple App Store (iOS).Sign in using your Aadhaar-linked mobile number.Complete biometric verification.Set a 4-digit PIN for secure access.Once set up, users gain full access to all features.What is changing for users?The transition marks a significant upgrade from the previous mAadhaar app, with a stronger emphasis on privacy, security, and digital convenience. Features like biometric lock, selective sharing, and QR-based verification are expected to reduce risks of data misuse while making everyday tasks -- from event entry to service authentication -- faster and more secure.UIDAI has urged all users to download the new app and update their details at the earliest to enjoy uninterrupted services.Read More | HDFC Credit Card: Bank tightens SmartBuy rules; these cardholders face new reward cap from July 1 - All you need to know

title: Travel Influencer Isa Khan Calls Indonesia The Perfect Budget-Friendly International Getaway
description: In a recent Instagram reel, travel and lifestyle content creator Isa Khan suggests Indonesia as the ideal destination abroad for budget-conscious travellers, with close proximity to India too.
content: Some people never travel abroad because they are under the impression that trips like these take lakhs of rupees. The truth, in fact, is that while some places may be expensive, they are international places that are quite budget-friendly for tourists. A popular travel influencer, Isa Khan, backs up this statement in his recent reel where he claims that there is a country which is extremely money-friendly and in close proximity to India, where tourists can reach just by taking a 7.5 hour flight. This country is none other than Indonesia – a destination that offers awe-inspiring landscapes, amazing adventure, and cultural experiences, all without any need for extravagant money.   Volcanoes, Waterfalls and Rice Terraces: Nature at Its BestThe reason Isa highly recommends Indonesia is because it offers some of the most outstanding natural diversity. It has some of the most active volcanoes in the world, besides having amazing mountain ranges, emerald-green rice terraces and waterfalls that seem like they have come out of a picture book.  These include:Mount Bromo: For the spectacular view of the sun rising.Mount Ijen: For its unique blue fire and blue lake at the volcano crater.Tumpak Sewu waterfall: One of the most beautiful waterfalls in Indonesia.Sekumpul Waterfall: Located in the lush tropical forests of Bali Island.Tegalalang Rice Terraces: For the scenic view of emerald-green paddy fields.In a nutshell, these places prove the beauty of Indonesia and why it is considered one of the most visually appealing destinations in Southeast Asia.          View this post on Instagram            A post shared by Isa Khan | Photographer & Videographer (@khan.isa)  Underrated Villages Amidst the Lush Green Mountain PeaksBesides the well-known destinations, Isa mentions the hidden gem villages that are located in the middle of mountains in Indonesia. Such places provide tranquillity, picturesque landscapes, and an opportunity to get acquainted with the local culture.Whether you are walking around the rural villages in Bali or visiting mountain communities in Java, every trod leaves a positive impression due to the unique atmosphere of the entire country. Isa notes that every region feels different from the previous one, making every stop along the journey unique.   Sunrise and sunset – paintings in the skyLast but not least, an aspect of Isa's travels in Indonesia is the beautiful sky in the country. The reason for such a magnificent sky lies in the presence of volcanoes, coastal lands, and mountain heights, which creates breathtaking events during sunrise and sunset.Travellers will have an opportunity to witness the following:Rise of the sun above the volcano.Golden-hour scenes of the endless rice terraces.Colourful sunset on the coast of Indonesia.Mist-covered mountain landscapes in the early morning.Such a view eventually becomes the most precious and aesthetic moment of the entire travel experience.  A budget-friendly escape that keeps drawing you backAccording to Isa, he has already been to Indonesia thrice but still feels that he has explored very little of it. The fact that there are many islands in Indonesia along with a range of different landscapes such as volcanoes, waterfalls, mountains, and beaches makes this country a destination that can be explored again and again without repeating the places. For Indians who wish to travel somewhere else and see world-class nature at a budget-friendly rate, Indonesia provides a great example for the same. As suggested by Isa’s video reel, it is indeed the kind of place where you start planning your next visit while you’re still in the midst of your present visit."This article summarises a report by Isa Khan. While Times Now has verified the public data presented, the interpretations of 'intent' remain those of the creator. This content is for educational purposes and does not substitute professional medical/nutritional advice.”

Power supply in Kashmir parts to remain shut in coming days: KPDCL
description:
Srinagar, July 1: Kashmir Power Distribution Corporation Limited (KPDCL) on Wednesday said that due to unavoidable maintenance works, the power supply in several areas of the Kashmir division will remain shut in forthcoming days.
In a communication, Chief Engineer, Distribution, KPDCL informed that the shutdown of 33 KV Soura-SKIMS line will be observed due to which power supply to Upper Soura, 90 feet, Nowshera, Bohlachpora and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 02 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Habak Hazratbal line will be observed due to which power supply to Habak, Hazartabal, Mallabagh and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 05 July, 2026.
Likewise, shutdown of 33 KV Takenwari line will be observed due to which power supply to Sangam, Shanglipora and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 07 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Arampora Handwara hot & Kupwara old Line will be observed due to which power supply to Handwara Town, Chogal, Kulangam, Sagipora, Marathgam, Whole Lolab, Machil valley and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 02 July, 2026.
Further, shutdown of 33 KV Arampora Handwara old & Kupwara Old Line will be observed due to which power supply to Zachaldara, Rajwar, Hangah, Haril, Lach, Whole Lolab & Machil Valley and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 04 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Kupwara Old line will be observed due to which power supply to Whole Lolab,  Machil Valley and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 07 July, 2026.
Likewise, shutdown of 33 KV Hyhama Dolipora line will be observed due to which power supply to Trehgam, Hayan, Zurhama, Hyhama, Gushie, Deedikoot and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 02 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Kralpora Tarathpora Tap line will be observed due to which power supply to Kralpora, Gazriyal, Chowkibal, Shumnag Valley, Keran Valley, Kalmoona and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 03 July, 2026.
Further, shutdown of 33 KV Tangdar Tap line will be observed due to which power supply to Tangdar, Gabra, Taad, Kandi, MES Chiterkoot, Teetwal and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 06 & 09 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Keran Tap line will be observed due to which power supply to Whole Keran Valley and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 09 & 11 July, 2026.
Likewise, shutdown of 33 KV Wanpoh Qaimoh line will be observed due to which power supply to Qaimoh, Khudwani, Redwani, Matalhama and adjoining areas will be affected from 08 to 02 PM on 02 & 04 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Ahmadpora Arizal Tap line will be observed due to which power supply to Arizal, Reyar, Doodpathri, & adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 02 July, 2026.
Further, shutdown of 33 KV Ahmadpora Beerwah line will be observed due to which power supply to Sail, Gondipora, old Beerwah, Arwa, Najan, Chewdara, Beerwah town, Sonpah, Raiyar, Hospital Zanigam, Arizal, Doodhpathri, khag and  adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 04 & 07 July, 2026.
Likewise, shutdown of 33 KV Ahamadpora Magam line will be observed due to which power supply to Mazhama, Old Sanoor, Aripanthan, Magam, Weriahama, burden & adjoining areas will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 07 July, 2026.
Similarly, shutdown of 33 KV Badampora Army Madhwan Line will be observed due to which power supply to Hajin, Hakbara, Safapora, Shahgund, Boniyar,Sodnara and Chandergir will be affected from 08 AM to 02 PM on 02, 04 & 08 July, 2026.

title: Brooklyn Pickleball Builds Roadmap from Grassroots to Major League Pickleball
description: Adam Behnke, COO of the Brooklyn Pickleball Team, discussed the organisation’s vision for nurturing young talent in pickleball. He spoke on the importance of creating a pathway from grassroots to professional levels, highlighted by the introduction of Junior Major League Pickleball.
content: Brooklyn Pickleball Team Chief Operating Officer Adam Behnke has outlined the organisation's long-term vision for developing young talent, saying the goal is to build a complete pathway that takes players from grassroots programmes to the professional stage.Speaking on the Empower Pickleball podcast, Behnke said Junior Major League Pickleball was introduced to give young players an opportunity to compete in the same team environment that has made Major League Pickleball one of the fastest-growing professional leagues."We wanted to make sure we had a platform for our junior players to shine and experience what Major League Pickleball is all about. It's such an amazing environment and team atmosphere," Behnke said."A lot of the players joining these Junior MLP teams already compete on the PPA Junior Tour and are doing a fantastic job there. But because the PPA and MLP schedules are split across different parts of the year, we wanted to give juniors the opportunity to compete year-round if they choose to."Behnke revealed that the inaugural Junior MLP season is being run as a pilot programme."This is the first year of the programme, and it's serving as a pilot with around 10 teams participating.""We've got the Orlando Squeeze, Miami, New Jersey 5s and Palm Beach Slicers involved, among others. We're really excited about the teams that have come on board because they're helping us build another important layer in the pathway to becoming a professional player."According to Behnke, the long-term objective is to create a structured development system where every level naturally feeds into the next."When you look at the bigger picture, we started with the professional level. That's the pinnacle of the pyramid.""The question then became, how do we build the other layers underneath it to create long-term growth for the sport? What do we need to do to make that happen?""Over the last few years, that's exactly what's happened. Minor League Pickleball now sits directly below the professional level.""Junior Major League Pickleball sits below that, and then the pathway continues to grow from there."Behnke believes grassroots participation remains the foundation of that structure."From a Brooklyn Pickleball perspective, our Conquer Kids programme is the foundation of that entire pathway.""That's where it all begins. This year, we got involved because we saw young players like Ethan performing at such a high level, and we wanted to help create a clear route for the next generation to progress through the sport."The Brooklyn Pickleball Team has expanded beyond its professional roster in recent years through junior development programmes, school partnerships and community initiatives, with Behnke stressing on the Empower Pickleball podcast that sustainable growth begins by giving young players a clear route from grassroots pickleball to the professional game.

title: 5 വർഷം ജോലി ചെയ്തു, പെട്ടെന്നൊരു നിമിഷം പിരിച്ചുവിട്ടു, കേൾക്കേണ്ടി വന്നത് ആ ഒരൊറ്റ വാക്ക്!
description: അഞ്ച് വർഷത്തിലേറെ ജോലി ചെയ്ത കമ്പനിയിൽ നിന്ന് മുന്നറിയിപ്പില്ലാതെ പെട്ടെന്നൊരു ദിവസം പിരിച്ചുവിട്ട ഡെൽഹി സ്വദേശിനിയായ അനുകൃതിയുടെ അനുഭവമാണ് ഇപ്പോള്‍ വൈറലാവുന്നത്. ഇൻസ്റ്റഗ്രാം വീഡിയോയിലൂടെയാണ് തന്‍റെ അവസ്ഥയെ കുറിച്ച് അനുകൃതി വിശദീകരിച്ചത്.
content: <p>അഞ്ച് വർഷത്തിലേറെയായി ജോലി ചെയ്തിരുന്ന കമ്പനിയിൽ നിന്ന് പെട്ടെന്നൊരു ദിവസം പിരിച്ചുവിട്ടാലെന്തായിരിക്കും അവസ്ഥ? അത്തരം അനുഭവങ്ങളിലൂടെ കടന്നു പോകേണ്ടി വരുന്ന അനേകം മനുഷ്യരുണ്ടാവും. ഒരു കമ്പനിക്കും ഒരു ജീവനക്കാരനും പ്രധാനമല്ല എന്നതാണ് സത്യം. അതുപോലൊരു അനുഭവം പങ്കുവയ്ക്കുകയാണ് ഈ ഡെൽഹി സ്വദേശിനിയും. അനുകൃതി വിദ്യാർത്ഥി പങ്കുവെച്ച ഇൻസ്റ്റഗ്രാം വീഡിയോയാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിൽ വൈറലാകുന്നത്. തന്റെ റോൾ ഇപ്പോൾ കമ്പനിക്ക് ആവശ്യമില്ലാത്തതാണ് എന്ന് എച്ച് ആർ ടീമും മാനേജരും ഫോൺകോളിലൂടെ അറിയിക്കുകയായിരുന്നു എന്ന് അനുകൃതി വെളിപ്പെടുത്തി.</p><p>'എനിക്ക് ജോലി നഷ്ടപ്പെട്ടു. ഇന്ന് 2026 ജൂൺ 29 ആണ്. എച്ച് ആറും മാനേജരുമായുള്ള കോളിനിടയിലാണ് എന്റെ റോളിന്റെ ആവശ്യം ഇനി കമ്പനിക്കില്ലെന്നും ജോലിയിൽ നിന്ന് മാറണമെന്നും അവർ ആവശ്യപ്പെട്ടത്. ഏകദേശം അഞ്ചര വർഷത്തോളം ഞാൻ ജോലി ചെയ്ത കമ്പനിയാണിത്' അനുകൃതി വീഡിയോയിൽ പറഞ്ഞു. പെട്ടെന്നുണ്ടായ ഈ മാറ്റത്തിൽ എന്ത് ചെയ്യണമെന്നറിയാത്ത അവസ്ഥയിലാണ് അനുകൃതി. 'എനിക്കിപ്പോൾ എന്താണ് തോന്നുന്നതെന്ന് എനിക്കറിയില്ല. അടുത്തതായി എന്ത് ചെയ്യണമെന്നോ, എവിടെ നിന്ന് തുടങ്ങണമെന്നോ ഒരു ധാരണയുമില്ല. എല്ലാം പൂജ്യത്തിൽ നിന്ന് വീണ്ടും തുടങ്ങേണ്ടി വന്നിരിക്കുന്നു' അവർ കൂട്ടിച്ചേർത്തു.</p><p>സ്വന്തമായി എന്തെങ്കിലും തുടങ്ങണോ അതോ പുതിയ ജോലി കണ്ടെത്തണോ എന്ന കാര്യത്തിൽ വ്യക്തതയില്ലെങ്കിലും, ഈ മാറ്റം ഒരുപക്ഷേ നല്ലതിനായിരിക്കാം എന്നാണ് അനുകൃതി വിശ്വസിക്കുന്നത്. 'ഒരുപക്ഷേ ഇത് ദൈവത്തിന്റെ സൂചനയായിരിക്കാം. കാരണം, ഒരിക്കലും ഈ ജോലി ഞാനായി ഉപേക്ഷിക്കില്ലായിരുന്നു. അതുകൊണ്ട് ദൈവം തന്നെ പറഞ്ഞതാകാം, മതി, ഇനി ഇവിടെ നിന്ന് ഇറങ്ങിക്കോളൂ എന്ന്' എന്നാണ് അനുകൃതി പറയുന്നത്.</p><p>&nbsp;</p>&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;View this post on Instagram&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;<p>A post shared by Anukriti Vidyarthi (@anukritividyarthi)</p><p>&nbsp;</p><p></p><p>ഒരു നിശ്ചിത തുക മാസശമ്പളമായി ഇനി അക്കൗണ്ടിലേക്ക് വരില്ലല്ലോ എന്ന ആശങ്കയും അവർ പങ്കുവെച്ചു. 'ഇനി എല്ലാ മാസവും കൃത്യമായി ശമ്പളം വരില്ല. ഒരുപക്ഷേ ഞാൻ ഇതിനേക്കാൾ കുറച്ചായിരിക്കാം ഇനി സമ്പാദിക്കുക, അല്ലെങ്കിൽ ഇതിലും കൂടുതൽ. എനിക്കറിയില്ല' എന്ന് പറഞ്ഞുകൊണ്ടാണ് അനുകൃതി വീഡിയോ അവസാനിപ്പിക്കുന്നത്. 'ഓൺവേർഡ്സ് ആൻഡ് അപ്‌വേർഡ്സ്' എന്ന ക്യാപ്ഷനോടെയാണ് അവർ ഈ വീഡിയോ പങ്കുവെച്ചിരിക്കുന്നത്.</p><p>സമാനമായ അനുഭവങ്ങൾ പങ്കുവച്ചുകൊണ്ട് നിരവധിപ്പേരാണ് പോസ്റ്റിന് കമന്റുകൾ നൽകിയത്. അതുപോലെ, പുതിയൊരു ജോലി കണ്ടെത്തുക എന്നത് തുടക്കത്തിൽ പ്രയാസകരമാണെങ്കിലും അതിന് സാധിക്കുമെന്ന് ആശംസിച്ചവരും ഒരുപാടുണ്ട്.</p>

title: ବିଜେଡିରୁ ଭାଜପା, ପୁଣି ବିଜେଡିକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ଏବେ ହରଡ଼ଘଣାରେ ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା
description:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୧ା୭(ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ ସାମଲ): ବିଜେଡିରୁ ଭାଜପା ଓ ପୁଣି ବିଜେଡିକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ବୁଗୁଡା ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା କେ.ପ୍ରିୟଦର୍ଶିନୀ ଆଚାରୀ ଏବେ ହରଡ଼ଘଣାରେ ପଡ଼ିଯାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରକାର ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଲଦାଯାଇ ତାଙ୍କୁ କାରଣ ଦର୍ଶାଅ ନୋଟିସ୍‌ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ରାଜନୈତିକ ଆକ୍ରୋଶ ରଖି ମୋ’ ଉପରେ ମିଥ୍ୟା ଆରୋପ ଲଦାଯାଇଥିବା ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଗଣମାଧ୍ୟମ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ରଖିଛନ୍ତି। କ୍ଷମତାର ଅପବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବା ସହ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦୋଷ ଥିବା ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ ନିକଟକୁ କୌଣସି […]
The post ବିଜେଡିରୁ ଭାଜପା, ପୁଣି ବିଜେଡିକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ଏବେ ହରଡ଼ଘଣାରେ ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
ଛତ୍ରପୁର,୧ା୭(ଦିଲ୍ଲୀପ ସାମଲ): ବିଜେଡିରୁ ଭାଜପା ଓ ପୁଣି ବିଜେଡିକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲା ବୁଗୁଡା ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା କେ.ପ୍ରିୟଦର୍ଶିନୀ ଆଚାରୀ ଏବେ ହରଡ଼ଘଣାରେ ପଡ଼ିଯାଇଛନ୍ତି। ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ପ୍ରକାର ଅଭିଯୋଗ ଲଦାଯାଇ ତାଙ୍କୁ କାରଣ ଦର୍ଶାଅ ନୋଟିସ୍‌ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ରାଜନୈତିକ ଆକ୍ରୋଶ ରଖି ମୋ’ ଉପରେ ମିଥ୍ୟା ଆରୋପ ଲଦାଯାଇଥିବା ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଗଣମାଧ୍ୟମ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ପ୍ରତିକ୍ରିୟା ରଖିଛନ୍ତି। କ୍ଷମତାର ଅପବ୍ୟବହାର କରିବା ସହ ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦୋଷ ଥିବା ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷାଙ୍କ ନିକଟକୁ କୌଣସି ପତ୍ର ପ୍ରେରିତ ନ କରି କିଛି ଫାଇଲ ନ ପଠାଇ ମୋର ବିରୋଧରେ ଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କୁ ପତ୍ର ଲେଖାଯାଇଛି। ଏପରିକି ପ୍ରତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର ପାଇଁ ମୌଖିକ ଭାବେ ଦେଇଥିବା ସମସ୍ତ ଫାଇଲ ମଧ୍ୟ ଯୁଗ୍ମ ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର କରି କେବେଠାରୁ ନେଇ ସାରିଛନ୍ତି। ଇ-ଡିଜିଟାଲ ସାଇନ ସମ୍ବନ୍ଧରେ କୌଣସି ଲିଖିତ ଚିଠି ମଧ୍ୟ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିନାହାନ୍ତି। ଏହାସହ ବିଡିଓ ମୋ’ ସହ କୌଣସି ଆଲୋଚନା ନ କରି କେତେକ ଫାଇଲ ଅର୍ଥକୁ ଅନିୟମିତତା କରିଥିବାରୁ ମୋର ପାଖକୁ ନ ଆଣି ବାଇପାସ କରି ବିଲ୍‌ ନେଇଯିବାକୁ ଉଦ୍ୟମ କରୁଛନ୍ତି। ସେହିପିରି ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ସମିତି ବୈଠକ ଯେବେ କରିବାକୁ କୁହାଯାଉଛି ସେତେବେଳେ ଲୋକ ସଭା କିମ୍ବା ବିଧାନସଭା ଲାଗି ରହିଥାଉଛି। ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ମୁଁ ଅଫିସକୁ ଗଲେ ମୋର ରୁମ୍‌ରେ ପାଣି, ବିଜୁଳି କାଟି ଦିଆଯାଉଛି। ଅଫିସ ସମ୍ମୁଖରେ ମଇଳା ଅବର୍ଜନା ରଖାଯାଉଛି। ଏଭଳି ହଇରାଣ କରାଯାଉଥିବା ବେଳେ ଗଞ୍ଜାମ ଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କ ପକ୍ଷରୁ ଗତ ୨୯ ତାରିଖରେ ପତ୍ରସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୨୬୨ରେ ମୋ’ ଉପରେ ବିଭିନ୍ନ ଅଭିଯୋଗର କାରଣ ଦର୍ଶାଅ ନୋଟିସ ଜାରି କରାଯାଇଛି। ଏହାର ଉତ୍ତର ୭ଦିନ ମଧ୍ୟରେ ତୁରନ୍ତ ଦେବାକୁ ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ ରହିଛି।
ଅନ୍ୟପକ୍ଷରେ ସେହିଦିନ ହିଁ ପତ୍ର ସଂଖ୍ୟା ୧୨୬୦ରେ ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ଉପଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କୁ ବୁଗୁଡ଼ା ପଞ୍ଚାୟତ ପଞ୍ଚଦଶ କେନ୍ଦ୍ରୀୟ ଅର୍ଥ କମିଶନର ଗୃହୀତ ହୋଇଥିବା ପ୍ରକଳ୍ପଗୁଡ଼ିକର ମୋର ସ୍ଥାନରେ ପ୍ରତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର କରିବା ପାଇଁ ଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କ ଦସ୍ତଖତରେ ପତ୍ର ଲେଖାଯାଇଛି। ଏହା କେତେଦୂର ଯଥାର୍ଥତା ରହିଛି ତାହା ଜାଣିପାରୁଥିବେ। ଗୋଟିଏ ପଟେ ମୋ’ ଉପରେ ଲଦାଯାଇଥିବା ଅଭିଯୋଗର ନୋଟିସ୍‌ ଦିଆଯାଉଛି ଏବଂ ଅନ୍ୟପଟେ ମୋ’ ବଦଳରେ ଭଞ୍ଜନଗର ଉପଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କୁ ପ୍ରତି ସ୍ବାକ୍ଷର ପାଇଁ କୁହାଯାଉଛି। ଏହା ରାଜନୈତିକ ଆକ୍ରୋଶ ନୁହଁ ତ ଆଉ କ’ଣ ରହିଛି। ଆଜି ଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କ ନୋଟିସ୍‌ ଅନୁସାରେ ମୁଁ ଜିଲାପାଳଙ୍କୁ ସାକ୍ଷାତ କରି ବୁଗୁଡା ବ୍ଲକର ସବୁ ବିଷୟ ନେଇ ଆଲୋଚନା କରିଛି। ଜିଲାପାଳ ମୋତେ ଆଶ୍ୱସନା ଦେଇଛନ୍ତି। ଆପଣଙ୍କ ପଦର ମର୍ଯ୍ୟାଦା ସହ ବ୍ଲକର ବିକାଶରେ ସମସ୍ତେ ମିଳିମିଶି କାମ କରିବା। ଏହା ସତ୍ତ୍ୱେ ଯଦି କିଛି ନ ହୁଏ ତେବେ ମୁଁ ମୋର ନ୍ୟାୟ ପାଇଁ ମାନ୍ୟବର ଉଚ୍ଚନ୍ୟାୟ।ଳୟଙ୍କ ଦ୍ୱାରସ୍ଥ ହେବି ବୋଲି ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା ଶ୍ରୀମତୀ ଆଚାରୀ କହିଛନ୍ତି।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

The post ବିଜେଡିରୁ ଭାଜପା, ପୁଣି ବିଜେଡିକୁ ଆସିବା ପରେ ଏବେ ହରଡ଼ଘଣାରେ ବ୍ଲକ ଅଧ୍ୟକ୍ଷା appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.

title: TMC leader arrested | তোলাবাজি ও মারধরের অভিযোগ! গ্রেপ্তার পূর্ব বর্ধমান জেলা পরিষদের অধ্যক্ষ অপার্থিব ইসলাম
description:
বর্ধমান: তৃণমূলের ঘোষিত প্রার্থীর বিরোধিতা করে ২০২৬ বিধানসভা ভোটের লড়াই থেকে দূরে সরে থেকেও রেহাই মিলল না। তোলাবাজি, ভীতি প্রদর্শন ও মারধরের অভিযোগে অবশেষে গ্রেপ্তার হলেন পূর্ব বর্ধমান জেলা পরিষদের অধ্যক্ষ অপার্থিব ইসলাম ওরফে ফাগুন (TMC leader arrested)। মঙ্গলবার রাতে খণ্ডঘোষ থানার বাদুলিয়ার বাড়ি থেকে তাঁকে গ্রেপ্তার করে পুলিশ। বুধবার বর্ধমান সিজেএম আদালতে তোলা হলে […]
The post TMC leader arrested | তোলাবাজি ও মারধরের অভিযোগ! গ্রেপ্তার পূর্ব বর্ধমান জেলা পরিষদের অধ্যক্ষ অপার্থিব ইসলাম appeared first on Uttarbanga Sambad.
content:
বর্ধমান: তৃণমূলের ঘোষিত প্রার্থীর বিরোধিতা করে ২০২৬ বিধানসভা ভোটের লড়াই থেকে দূরে সরে থেকেও রেহাই মিলল না। তোলাবাজি, ভীতি প্রদর্শন ও মারধরের অভিযোগে অবশেষে গ্রেপ্তার হলেন পূর্ব বর্ধমান জেলা পরিষদের অধ্যক্ষ অপার্থিব ইসলাম ওরফে ফাগুন (TMC leader arrested)। মঙ্গলবার রাতে খণ্ডঘোষ থানার বাদুলিয়ার বাড়ি থেকে তাঁকে গ্রেপ্তার করে পুলিশ। বুধবার বর্ধমান সিজেএম আদালতে তোলা হলে আদালত তাঁকে ৩ দিনের পুলিশি হেফাজতে পাঠানোর নির্দেশ দেয়।
খণ্ডঘোষের জুবিলা গ্রামের বাসিন্দা উত্তম রুইদাস মঙ্গলবার দুপুরে অপার্থিব ইসলামের বিরুদ্ধে থানায় অভিযোগ দায়ের করেন। অভিযোগে বলা হয়েছে, গত ২৩ মার্চ রাত সাড়ে ৯টা নাগাদ তৎকালীন খণ্ডঘোষ ব্লক তৃণমূল সভাপতি অপার্থিব ইসলাম ও তাঁর দলবল লাঠি, রড নিয়ে উত্তমবাবুর বাড়িতে হামলা চালায়। তাঁর কাছে এক লক্ষ টাকা তোলা দাবি করা হয়। টাকা দিতে অস্বীকার করায় তাঁকে মারধর ও গলা টিপে হত্যার চেষ্টা করা হয়। পরিবারকে গ্রামছাড়া করারও হুমকি দেওয়া হয়। প্রাণ বাঁচাতে উত্তমবাবু তখন ৪০ হাজার টাকা দিতে বাধ্য হয়েছিলেন, বাকি টাকার জন্য ভোটের পর ফের হুমকি দেওয়া হয় বলে অভিযোগ।
তৃণমূল নেতা গ্রেপ্তার হতেই খণ্ডঘোষ থানার সামনে ভিড় করেন বিজেপি নেতা-কর্মীরা। বিজেপি নেতা কৌশিক আশ এবং অরূপ ভট্টাচার্যের দাবি, “সবে অপার্থিব গ্রেপ্তার হয়েছে। তৃণমূল রাজত্বের দুর্নীতিগ্রস্ত আরও অনেক নেতা খুব শীঘ্রই শ্রীঘরে যাবেন।” অন্যদিকে, পরিবারের সদস্যদের দাবি, রাজনৈতিক প্রতিহিংসা চরিতার্থ করতেই মিথ্যা অভিযোগে অপার্থিবকে ফাঁসানো হয়েছে।
পুলিশ এখন এই ঘটনায় জড়িত বাকিদের খোঁজ চালাচ্ছে।

description: नाशिक : प्रतिनिधी Nashik येवला येथील एका खासगी रुग्णालयात सिझेरियन प्रसूतीदरम्यान महिलेच्या पोटात शस्त्रक्रियेसाठी वापरण्यात येणारा ‘अॅब्डॉमिनल मॉप’ राहिल्याने तिला गंभीर शारीरिक त्रास सहन करावा लागला. या प्रकरणात वैद्यकीय निष्काळजीपणा सिद्ध झाल्याने जिल्हा ग्राहक तक्रार निवारण आयोग, नाशिक यांनी संबंधित रुग्णालय आणि डॉक्टरांना एकूण १२ लाख ६८ हजार रुपयांची भरपाई देण्याचे आदेश दिले आहेत. प्राजक्ता […]
content:
नाशिक : प्रतिनिधी Nashik



येवला येथील एका खासगी रुग्णालयात सिझेरियन प्रसूतीदरम्यान महिलेच्या पोटात शस्त्रक्रियेसाठी वापरण्यात येणारा ‘अॅब्डॉमिनल मॉप’ राहिल्याने तिला गंभीर शारीरिक त्रास सहन करावा लागला. या प्रकरणात वैद्यकीय निष्काळजीपणा सिद्ध झाल्याने जिल्हा ग्राहक तक्रार निवारण आयोग, नाशिक यांनी संबंधित रुग्णालय आणि डॉक्टरांना एकूण १२ लाख ६८ हजार रुपयांची भरपाई देण्याचे आदेश दिले आहेत.



प्राजक्ता गणेश दोंड (रा. निमगाव, ता. सिन्नर) यांनी दाखल केलेल्या तक्रारीनुसार, त्या मार्च २०२२ मध्ये बाळंतपणासाठी येवला येथे माहेरी आल्या होत्या. ६ मार्च २०२२ रोजी त्यांची सिझेरियन प्रसूती करण्यात आली. प्रसूतीनंतरही पोटात वेदना, उलट्या, ताप आणि त्रास होत असल्याची वारंवार तक्रार करूनही डॉक्टरांनी तो ‘वायूगोळा’ असल्याचे सांगत दुर्लक्ष केल्याचा आरोप तक्रारीत करण्यात आला आहे.



त्रास असह्य झाल्यानंतर २२ मार्च २०२२ रोजी दुसऱ्या रुग्णालयात सोनोग्राफी व सीटी स्कॅन केल्यानंतर पोटात परकीय वस्तू असल्याचे निदर्शनास आले. त्यानंतर नाशिक येथील सुयश हॉस्पिटलमध्ये तातडीने शस्त्रक्रिया करण्यात आली. या शस्त्रक्रियेत महिलेच्या पोटातून सुमारे दोन ते तीन लिटर पू आणि सिझेरियनवेळी राहिलेला ‘मॉप’ बाहेर काढण्यात आला.



सुनावणीदरम्यान सादर करण्यात आलेले सीटी स्कॅन अहवाल, शस्त्रक्रियेच्या नोंदी आणि उपचार करणाऱ्या डॉक्टरांची साक्ष यावरून पोटात मॉप राहिल्याचे स्पष्ट झाल्याचे आयोगाने नमूद केले. तसेच रुग्णाने वारंवार वेदनांची तक्रार करूनही आवश्यक तपासण्या न करता तिच्याकडे दुर्लक्ष करण्यात आल्याचे आयोगाच्या निदर्शनास आले. त्यामुळे संबंधित डॉक्टर व रुग्णालयाचा वैद्यकीय निष्काळजीपणा वादातीतपणे सिद्ध झाल्याचा निष्कर्ष आयोगाने नोंदविला.



आयोगाच्या अध्यक्ष शिल्पा डोल्हारकर तसेच सदस्य कविता चव्हाण आणि प्रेरणा लोणकर यांनी दिलेल्या आदेशानुसार, तक्रारदाराला सिझेरियन आणि त्यानंतरच्या शस्त्रक्रियेचा खर्च म्हणून २ लाख ६८ हजार रुपये तसेच शारीरिक व मानसिक त्रासापोटी १० लाख रुपयांची भरपाई देण्याचे आदेश संबंधित रुग्णालय आणि डॉक्टरांना देण्यात आले आहेत.



या निर्णयामुळे वैद्यकीय सेवांमधील निष्काळजीपणाविरोधात ग्राहकांना न्याय मिळू शकतो, असा महत्त्वपूर्ण संदेश या निकालातून गेला आहे.

title: पीलीभीत में शंकराचार्य अविमुक्तेश्वरानंद का गौ-रक्षा का आह्वान, बोले- ठोस कदम नहीं उठे तो होगा बड़ा आंदोलन
description: Avimukteshwaranand Pilibhit Visit: पीलीभीत में 81 दिवसीय गोप्रतिष्ठा यात्रा के दौरान जगद्गुरु शंकराचार्य स्वामी अविमुक्तेश्वरानंद सरस्वती ने गौ-रक्षा पर जोर देते हुए सरकार से ठोस कार्रवाई की मांग की।
content:
Shankaracharya Avimukteshwaranand Statement: उत्तर प्रदेश के पीलीभीत में 81 दिवसीय &#8216;गोप्रतिष्ठा (गौ-रक्षार्थ धर्मयुद्ध)&#8217; यात्रा के दौरान जगद्गुरु शंकराचार्य स्वामी अविमुक्तेश्वरानंद सरस्वती का भव्य स्वागत किया गया। जगह-जगह श्रद्धालुओं ने वैदिक मंत्र &#8220;अहं हनं वृत्रं गविष्ठौ&#8221; के साथ गौ-रक्षा का सामूहिक संकल्प लिया।
पीलीभीत का गौ-संस्कृति से विशेष संबंध
सभा को संबोधित करते हुए शंकराचार्य ने कहा कि पीलीभीत का गौ-संस्कृति से विशेष संबंध है। उन्होंने दावा किया कि महर्षि वशिष्ठ की प्रार्थना पर यहीं गोमती नदी का प्रादुर्भाव हुआ था। उन्होंने कहा कि शास्त्रों में वर्णित है कि जहां गौदान संभव न हो, वहां श्रद्धापूर्वक गोमती स्नान करने से गौदान के समान पुण्य प्राप्त होता है।
अपने संबोधन में शंकराचार्य ने कहा कि &#8220;गौ हत्या बंद हो&#8221; की आवाज को दबाना, गौ हत्या जारी रखने की मानसिकता को दर्शाता है। उन्होंने आरोप लगाया कि सरकारी दावों और जमीनी हकीकत में बड़ा अंतर है तथा गौ-सुरक्षा को लेकर प्रभावी कार्रवाई नहीं हो रही है।
यह भी पढ़ें- सिर्फ कब्जे से नहीं मिलता मालिकाना हक: इलाहाबाद हाईकोर्ट का बड़ा फैसला, अलीगढ़ नगर निगम का बेदखली नोटिस बरकरार
वैदिक संस्कृति का मूल आधार ही गौ-रक्षा है
उन्होंने शास्त्रार्थ की चुनौती स्वीकार करते हुए कहा कि यदि किसी शास्त्र में गौ हत्या का समर्थन लिखा हो तो उसे सामने लाया जाए। साथ ही उन्होंने दावा किया कि हिंदू परंपरा, गोत्र व्यवस्था और वैदिक संस्कृति का मूल आधार ही गौ-रक्षा है।
शंकराचार्य ने राजनीतिक दलों पर भी निशाना साधते हुए आरोप लगाया कि गौ-सुरक्षा के मुद्दे पर जनता के साथ छल किया गया है। उन्होंने उपस्थित लोगों से संकल्प दिलाया कि वे भविष्य में गौ-सुरक्षा को प्राथमिकता देने वाले प्रत्याशी के पक्ष में ही मतदान करेंगे।
उन्होंने बताया कि 3 मई से शुरू हुई यह यात्रा उत्तर प्रदेश की सभी 403 विधानसभा क्षेत्रों तक पहुंचेगी। यदि 24 जुलाई तक सरकार ने ठोस कदम नहीं उठाए, तो लखनऊ में दो लाख से अधिक धर्म सैनिकों के साथ अगले चरण के आंदोलन की घोषणा की जाएगी।

title: 'Hold Rollout, Furnish Details Within 3 Days': Govt Notice to Meta Over WhatsApp Username Feature
description: The Indian government has issued a notice to Meta regarding the new username feature on WhatsApp, demanding clarification within three days and halting its rollout until consultations are complete.
content: The Centre, on Wednesday, issued notice to Meta over the rollout of a new username feature on WhatsApp in India, sources said. The government directed Meta to furnish a detailed explanation on username feature within 3 days and asked the company not to roll out the feature until consultation on issue is over.The government is examining the legal framework and provisions in the law, as it scrutinises WhatsApp's proposed username feature, over fraud and impersonation concerns, according to sources.The notice to Meta has been sent to seek full details about the features, questioning its implications and the company's plans. Law enforcement agencies may also examine the issue, an official said.The government, as the statutory authority, will have to satisfy itself that the feature does not pose risks, given the legitimate concerns surrounding it, a source said, adding that the Meta-owned platform's latest announcement raises serious concerns.Sources said officials will examine whether there are legal provisions to restrict the feature.If WhatsApp's response is found to be unsatisfactory, the government may seek to prevent its rollout, they added."They cannot go ahead, unless they can assure and convince," the sources said, adding that WhatsApp, on its part, has indicated that this is a privacy tool.An email sent to WhatsApp did not elicit a response.   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QplM_hYZqewWhat Govt Fears Government sources said that the feature could allow users to adopt usernames resembling those of legitimate agencies, organisations or individuals, potentially enabling impersonation and fraud. This could, in turn, have adverse implications for public safety and society.The government will not compromise on national security or public safety, they asserted.What Is WhatsApp's New Username Feature Meta-owned messaging platform WhatsApp announced the introduction of usernames, a feature that will allow users to communicate without sharing their phone numbers.The company has started early reservations for usernames, which will be officially rolled out later this year. WhatsApp has around 500 million users in India, a significant market for the platform."Starting this week, you can reserve a username to use later this year when we launch this feature," WhatsApp said in a blog post.According to the messaging platform, the move is aimed at enhancing user privacy, particularly in group chats or when connecting with new acquaintances by eliminating the need to exchange phone numbers.However, several startup founders, cybersecurity professionals and technology experts have voiced concerns over the proposed feature on X, arguing that usernames resembling those of businesses, government agencies or public figures could be exploited for impersonation and financial scams if adequate safeguards are not put in place.Paytm founder and CEO Vijay Shekhar Sharma has warned that lookalike usernames could become a major vector for impersonation and scams if not properly protected."Soon you will have a verified username on WhatsApp, and then unverified similar-sounding usernames…. which in turn will…," he posted on X.Jasveer Singh, co-founder and CEO of KnotDating, also flagged risks and, in a social media post, wrote: "Privacy matters. So does accountability".On social media, people are raising questions on how the platform would verify identities and prevent misuse of prominent names.Experts believe that the feature may create confusion by making it easier for fraudsters or scamsters to appear legitimate, by grabbing usernames that closely resemble bona fide brands or institutions.Notably, WhatsApp recently got an Indian face at the helm, with tech giant Meta investing Rs 8,550 crore (about USD 900 million) in the Indian fintech firm CRED, and appointing founder Kunal Shah as the new global head of the popular messaging platform.With inputs from PTI

title: Ameer Log| ‘అమీర్‌ లోగ్‌’ టీంకు రానా దగ్గుబాటి సపోర్ట్‌.. హైప్‌ పెంచేస్తున్న నయా అప్‌డేట్‌..!
description: Ameer Log | టాలీవుడ్‌లో యూత్‌ఫుల్‌ కామెడీ ఎంటర్‌టైనర్‌గా వస్తున్నచిత్రం అమీర్ లోగ్‌. రమణారెడ్డి సోమ డైరెక్ట్‌ చేస్తున్న ఈ చిత్రంలో ఎంసీ హరి, మనోజ్‌, శశిధర్ లీడ్‌ రోల్స్‌లో నటిస్తున్నారు.
content:
Ameer Log | టాలీవుడ్‌లో యూత్‌పుల్‌ బ్యాక్‌డ్రాప్‌లో వచ్చే సినిమాలకు మంచి క్రేజ్‌ ఉంటుందని ప్రత్యేకించి చెప్పనవసరం లేదు. ఇదే జోనర్‌లో యూత్‌ఫుల్‌ కామెడీ ఎంటర్‌టైనర్‌గా వస్తున్నచిత్రం అమీర్ లోగ్‌. రమణారెడ్డి సోమ డైరెక్ట్‌ చేస్తున్న ఈ చిత్రంలో ఎంసీ హరి, మనోజ్‌, శశిధర్ లీడ్‌ రోల్స్‌లో నటిస్తున్నారు. వేదా జలంధర్‌, రావణ్‌ నిట్టూరు, విశ్వేందర్‌ రెడ్డి, సాయి యోగి కీలక పాత్రలు పోషిస్తున్నారు.
ఈ చిత్రానికి సంబంధించిన ఆసక్తికర వార్త సినిమాపై అంచనాలు పెంచేస్తుంది. అమీర్‌ లోగ్ తెలుగు రాష్ట్రాల పంపిణీ హక్కులను టాలీవుడ్ యాక్టర్ రానా నేతృత్వంలోని స్పిరిట్ మీడియా సొంతం చేసుకుంది. హైదరాబాద్‌ గల్లీ బ్యాక్‌డ్రాప్‌లో ముగ్గురు స్నేహితుల మధ్య కథ నేపథ్యంలో కామెడీతోపాటు కంటెంట్‌ను నమ్మి వస్తున్న సినిమా కావడం, రానా టీం విడుదల చేస్తుండటంతో హైప్ పెరిగిపోతుంది. ఈ మూవీని అవ్వల్‌ నంబర్‌ ప్రొడక్షన్స్ బ్యానర్‌పై మాధవి రెడ్డి సోమ తెరకెక్కిస్తున్నారు.
అమీర్‌ లోగ్‌ సినిమాలో రాహుల్ సిప్లిగంజ్‌ పాడిన అవ్వల్‌ దావత్‌ సాంగ్‌ యూట్యూబ్‌లో మిలియన్‌కు పైగా వ్యూస్‌తో ట్రెండింగ్‌లో నిలిచిందని తెలిసిందే. రాహుల్ సిప్లిగంజ్‌ మాసీ వాయిస్‌, మరోవైపు ఆనీ మాస్టర్‌ మాస్‌ డ్యాన్స్‌తో ఫ్లోర్ దద్దరిల్లిపోయేలా సాగుతున్న ఈ సాంగ్‌ను ఫుల్ ఎంజాయ్ చేస్తున్నారు మూవీ, మ్యూజిక్‌ లవర్స్‌. ఇప్పటికే లాంచ్ చేసిన అమీర్ లోగ్‌ ఫస్ట్‌ లుక్‌ పోస్టర్‌ నెట్టింట చక్కర్లు కొడుతోంది. ఈ మూవీకి స్మరణ్‌ సాయి సంగీతం అందిస్తున్నాడు.

title: A space history mystery: What happened to the Viking arm used 50 years ago?
description: A timely tale about a 50-year-old robotic arm...
content:
Michael Collins looked down at his watch.
The Apollo 11 astronaut had already beaten the original schedule for the opening of the National Air and Space Museum by three days, but no one would remember that if these final 36 minutes didn't go perfectly.
President Gerald Ford and Vice President Nelson Rockefeller took 35 seconds to find their seats on the red, white, and blue bunting-lined outdoor stage. The flyover by the Thunderbirds was quick enough. At any other event, it would have been the only time-dependent concern of the day.Read full article

title: LINK Spacecraft Set for Mission to Boost NASA’s Swift Observatory
description: A first-of-its-kind mission to raise the orbit of NASA’s Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory is poised for launch no earlier than Thursday, July 2, 5:09 a.m. EDT (9:09 p.m. UTC+12), from Kwajalein Atoll, part of the Republic of the Marshall Islands in the South Pacific Ocean. A robotic servicing spacecraft called LINK, built by Katalyst Space, will blast […]
content:
A Katalyst engineer runs tests on LINK while the satellite is inside the Pegasus XL rocket attached to the Stargazer aircraft at NASA’s Wallops Flight Facility.NASA/Ron Beard


A first-of-its-kind mission to raise the orbit of NASA’s Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory is poised for launch no earlier than Thursday, July 2, 5:09 a.m. EDT (9:09 p.m. UTC+12), from Kwajalein Atoll, part of the Republic of the Marshall Islands in the South Pacific Ocean. A robotic servicing spacecraft called LINK, built by Katalyst Space, will blast into orbit on a Northrop Grumman Pegasus XL rocket attached to the belly of the company’s Stargazer aircraft, shown here in this photograph from the evening of Tuesday, June 16, 2026. 



After launch, LINK will attempt to rendezvous with, grapple, and slowly raise Swift’s altitude over several months, preventing it from re-entering Earth’s atmosphere later this year. If this daring mission is successful, it will be the first time a commercial robotic mission has captured a NASA spacecraft that is both uncrewed and not originally designed to be serviced in space.



Follow the Swift blog to learn more about the mission.



Image credit: NASA/Ron Beard

title: ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला
description:
खेल डेस्क: भारत और इंग्लैंड के बीच टी20 सीरीज का पहला मुकाबला बुधवार को चेस्टर-ले-स्ट्रीट के रिवरसाइड ग्राउंड में खेला जाएगा। मैच से पहले सबसे बड़ी चर्चा भारतीय टीम की प्लेइंग इलेवन को लेकर हो रही है। इंग्लैंड ने अपनी टीम का ऐलान कर दिया है, जबकि भारत की अंतिम एकादश का फैसला कप्तान श्रेयस.
The post ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.
content:
खेल डेस्क: भारत और इंग्लैंड के बीच टी20 सीरीज का पहला मुकाबला बुधवार को चेस्टर-ले-स्ट्रीट के रिवरसाइड ग्राउंड में खेला जाएगा। मैच से पहले सबसे बड़ी चर्चा भारतीय टीम की प्लेइंग इलेवन को लेकर हो रही है। इंग्लैंड ने अपनी टीम का ऐलान कर दिया है, जबकि भारत की अंतिम एकादश का फैसला कप्तान श्रेयस अय्यर टॉस के समय करेंगे। इस बीच भारत के पूर्व कप्तान और 1983 विश्व कप विजेता कृष्णमाचारी श्रीकांत ने अपनी पसंदीदा प्लेइंग इलेवन चुनी है। उन्होंने साफ कहा कि वह युवा बल्लेबाज वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे।
श्रीकांत ने चुनी अपनी प्लेइंग इलेवन
श्रीकांत ने ओपनिंग के लिए अभिषेक शर्मा और संजू सैमसन को चुना है। तीसरे नंबर पर ईशान किशन, चौथे स्थान पर कप्तान श्रेयस अय्यर, जबकि तिलक वर्मा और शिवम दुबे को मध्यक्रम में जगह दी है। ऑलराउंडर के रूप में अक्षर पटेल को शामिल किया गया है। गेंदबाजी में वरुण चक्रवर्ती के साथ तेज गेंदबाज हर्षित राणा, प्रिंस यादव और अर्शदीप सिंह को मौका दिया गया है।
वैभव को आयरलैंड दौरे पर मिलना चाहिए था मौका
श्रीकांत का मानना है कि 15 वर्षीय वैभव सूर्यवंशी को आयरलैंड के खिलाफ टी20 सीरीज में डेब्यू का मौका मिलना चाहिए था। उन्होंने कहा कि पहले मैच में अभिषेक शर्मा ने शानदार अर्धशतक लगाया था, इसलिए दूसरे मैच में उन्हें आराम देकर वैभव को आजमाया जा सकता था।
उन्होंने कहा कि अभिषेक टीम के नियमित खिलाड़ी हैं और उनकी जगह सुरक्षित है। ऐसे में वैभव को मौका मिलता तो वह अंतरराष्ट्रीय क्रिकेट का अनुभव हासिल कर सकते थे। श्रीकांत ने यह भी कहा कि आईपीएल 2026 में वैभव ने कठिन परिस्थितियों में शानदार बल्लेबाजी की थी और वह आयरलैंड के खिलाफ टीम के लिए मैच जिताने की क्षमता रखते थे।
इंग्लैंड के खिलाफ बदलाव के पक्ष में नहीं
हालांकि, श्रीकांत का कहना है कि अब इंग्लैंड जैसी मजबूत टीम के खिलाफ पहले दो टी20 मैचों में ओपनिंग जोड़ी में बदलाव करना सही नहीं होगा। उनके अनुसार, जब वैभव को आयरलैंड के खिलाफ मौका नहीं मिला, तो अब सीरीज की शुरुआत में उन्हें खिलाना उचित नहीं होगा। उन्होंने कहा कि पहले दो मैचों में भारत को अभिषेक शर्मा और संजू सैमसन की ओपनिंग जोड़ी के साथ ही उतरना चाहिए। वैभव सूर्यवंशी को अपने अंतरराष्ट्रीय डेब्यू के लिए अभी थोड़ा और इंतजार करना पड़ सकता है
The post ‘वैभव सूर्यवंशी को पहले मैच में मौका नहीं देंगे’, पूर्व कप्तान का प्लेइंग 11 पर बड़ा फैसला appeared first on Dainik Savera Times.

title: Infants Put In Washing Machine, Sprayed With Toilet Jet; 5 Nannies Booked For Ab...
description: Five women have been booked in Bengaluru for allegedly physically abusing toddlers at a daycare centre, with disturbing videos purportedly showing children being intimidated, locked in bathrooms, and subjected to inhumane treatment.
content: Bengaluru: Five women have been booked for allegedly physically abusing toddlers at Society General Baby Daycare Centre in Bengaluru.The case was registered at the HAL Police Station after authorities received a complaint through the child helpline.Videos that have surfaced in connection with the case allegedly show children crying while being subjected to physical abuse and intimidation by the caregivers.According to the FIR, the toddlers, aged 2 and 3, were allegedly intimidated and forced to sit inside a loaded washing machine, made to sit on a Western-style toilet, and had water sprayed into their mouths using a toilet jet. They were also allegedly locked inside bathrooms and threatened into remaining silent.The five women have been booked under the Juvenile Justice Act and were taken into custody for questioning on Tuesday. Further investigation is underway.Two Boys Tied to School Window, Assaulted Over Cricket Ball IncidentIn a separate incident, a disturbing case of alleged assault on two minor boys emerged from Karnataka's Bagalkote district, where the children were reportedly tied to a school window and beaten after a cricket ball accidentally struck a woman.The incident occurred on June 21 at the Government Kannada Primary School in Narenur LT-01 village of Badami taluk, police said. As it was a holiday, a group of children had gathered on the school grounds to play cricket when a ball accidentally hit a woman living nearby.According to police, the woman allegedly reacted angrily, verbally abused the children, and is accused of inciting others to punish them.The accused allegedly tied the two boys, identified as Prajwal and Sushanth, to an iron grill on the school window with a rope before assaulting them with their hands and slippers. The children were eventually rescued after local residents intervened and untied them.

title: इंदौर में लव जिहाद का भंडाफोड़, मुस्लिम युवक ने छिपाई पहचान खुद को बताया अश्विन शर्मा; हिंदू संगठन ने दबोचा
description: Indore Identity Concealment Case: इंदौर के जावरा कंपाउंड में हंगामा, पहचान छिपाकर दोस्ती के आरोप में युवक पुलिस के हवाले, युवती ने शिकायत से किया इनकार, साक्ष्यों की कूट जांच जारी।
content:
Indore Love Jihad Case: इंदौर के संयोगितागंज थाना क्षेत्र में पहचान छिपाकर युवतियों से दोस्ती करने के आरोप में एक युवक को हिंदू संगठन के कार्यकर्ताओं ने पकड़कर पुलिस के हवाले कर दिया। यह मामला जावरा कंपाउंड क्षेत्र का है, जहां बुरहानपुर निवासी युवक को संगठन के सदस्यों ने रोका और पूछताछ के बाद पुलिस के सुपुर्द कर दिया।
घटना के बाद क्षेत्र में कुछ समय के लिए हलचल का माहौल बन गया। संगठन का आरोप है कि युवक फर्जी पहचान का इस्तेमाल कर युवतियों के संपर्क में आता था। वहीं पुलिस ने मामले की जांच शुरू कर दी है और सभी तथ्यों की पुष्टि की जा रही है।
संगठन का दावा- पहले बताया अश्विन शर्मा, बाद में निकला अरशद तड़वी
हिंदू संगठन के जिला संयोजक लक्की रघुवंशी के अनुसार, सूचना मिलने पर कार्यकर्ताओं ने युवक से पूछताछ की। उनका दावा है कि शुरुआत में युवक ने अपना नाम अश्विन शर्मा बताया लेकिन बाद में उसकी पहचान बुरहानपुर निवासी अरशद तड़वी के रूप में हुई। संगठन ने यह भी आरोप लगाया कि युवक के पास कई क्रेडिट कार्ड मिले हैं और उसके मोबाइल फोन में कई युवतियों के वीडियो मौजूद थे। संगठन ने इन तथ्यों के आधार पर पूरे मामले की निष्पक्ष जांच की मांग की है। हालांकि, इन आरोपों की आधिकारिक पुष्टि फिलहाल पुलिस जांच के बाद ही हो सकेगी।
युवती ने शिकायत से किया इनकार, पुलिस ने दर्ज नहीं किया मामला
घटना के दौरान युवक के साथ मौजूद युवती भी थाने पहुंची लेकिन उसने युवक के खिलाफ किसी भी प्रकार की शिकायत दर्ज कराने से इनकार कर दिया। पुलिस के अनुसार, महिला ने प्रारंभिक पूछताछ में छेड़छाड़, प्रताड़ना या किसी अन्य आपराधिक कृत्य के आरोपों का समर्थन नहीं किया। फिलहाल इस मामले में कोई महिला फरियादी सामने नहीं आई है। ऐसे में पुलिस ने अभी तक युवक के खिलाफ किसी विशेष अपराध का मामला दर्ज नहीं किया है।
यह भी पढ़ें: खंडवा में आमीन खान हत्याकांड में बड़ा अपडेट, पत्नी और आशिक को उम्रकैद; ADJ अनिल चौधरी की अदालत का महा-फैसला
पुलिस बोली- सभी आरोपों की वैधानिक जांच जारी
एसीपी तुषार सिंह ने बताया कि पुलिस पूरे मामले की निष्पक्ष जांच कर रही है। संगठन द्वारा लगाए गए आरोपों, युवक के मोबाइल फोन, दस्तावेजों और अन्य बरामद सामग्री की कानूनी प्रक्रिया के तहत जांच की जा रही है। उन्होंने स्पष्ट किया कि अभी तक किसी महिला की ओर से औपचारिक शिकायत नहीं मिली है, इसलिए जांच के निष्कर्ष सामने आने के बाद ही आगे की कानूनी कार्रवाई की जाएगी। पुलिस का कहना है कि बिना पर्याप्त साक्ष्यों के किसी भी निष्कर्ष पर पहुंचना उचित नहीं होगा और मामले की हर पहलू से जांच की जा रही है।

title: U.S. Polo Assn. CEO was told he wasn’t right for a promotion—so he ‘outworked’ anyone else who wanted the job for 6 months straight
description: U.S. Polo Assn. CEO J. Michael Prince grinded 90-hour weeks, sometimes pulling all-nighters to prove himself when Nike turned him down.
content:
Today, he hosts polo events with Prince William and runs a $2.7 billion empire—but J. Michael Prince’s first taste of leadership was a complete accident. Not only that, he was almost passed over entirely.



When the CFO role opened up at Converse in 2005—then freshly acquired by Nike—Prince had been on the payroll for barely half a year. The company made it plain he wasn’t in the running; he was simply there to keep the seat warm while they headhunted. But instead of feeling rejected, the now-CEO of U.S. Polo Assn. treated it as a deadline to prove them wrong.



“They literally told me, ‘You’re not our person, you’ve been at Nike for six months… you’re not really one of us, and we’re going to pull someone from the inside that’s been with us for a long time,’” Prince exclusively told Fortune. 



“You’re not going to get the opportunity, but we need you just to kind of keep the ship going until we figure out who’s going to be in that position,” he added. “And I thought, I’ve got six months to prove myself.”



“I’m going to outwork anybody they’ve ever seen in any of these roles, and I’m just going to make it happen on my own.”



That he did, grinding 90-hour weeks, sometimes pulling all-nighters to prove himself. 



“It was one of those where, when big opportunities and big challenges presented themselves, that’s when you say, I really have to step up and put in the extra time…. I’m going to take it on, I’m going to do it with a smile on my face, and I’m going to do my best to deliver excellence,” he recalled.



Many would have walked away from being told they’re not enough, feeling defeated. Prince saw it as a challenge. “When you’re in that position, it makes you want it that much more. It makes you work that much harder,” he said. “It’s a motivator—that little chip on your shoulder to prove everyone wrong.” 



It worked. Nike gave him the role, and that same relentless drive followed him to U.S. Polo Assn., where he joined as COO in 2017 and was promoted to CEO just eight months later.



The U.S. Polo Assn. CEO grew up in one of America’s poorest regions—here’s his career advice for Gen Z



That accidental CFO role turned out to be the foot in the door of an industry Prince admits is notoriously hard to crack from the outside. From Converse, he climbed to CFO of Nike Affiliates—overseeing a $4 billion portfolio including Cole Haan, Hurley, and Umbro—before crossing into luxury fashion as COO of Guess, then U.S. Polo Assn. Today, he oversees 1,200 retail stores spanning 190 countries, and co-hosts charity polo events at Windsor Castle alongside Prince William. 



And he did it from southeastern Oklahoma, one of the poorest corners of America, with a degree from a small regional university most hiring managers had never heard of. 



When asked what made him stand out amongst his peers, Prince doesn’t hesitate: “A great work ethic. Being respectful and considerate of others,” he said.



“Where I grew up, I had this personality where you try to find common ground with people, you try to get along. A lot of companies had people who were always challenging in a negative way—I just felt like I brought a positive energy.”



It’s why he recommends that Gen Z who want to emulate his success take on whatever challenge is thrown at them—with a smile on their faces, just like he did. 



“You’re going to get a handful of opportunities in life—both personally and professionally—always be looking forward and be thoughtful when you see those opportunities about how do I maximize that opportunity that’s in front of me? Because it may not be there six months from now,” he added.



According to CEOs, the secret to success is simple



CEOs consistently agree that being in the right place at the right time can open doors, but simple, good old-fashioned hard work is what ultimately determines success. As Prince said: “A lot of great stories have come from seeing that opportunity, jumping on it, and making the most of it. I feel fortunate that I was able to do that.”



Likewise, Kurt Geiger’s CEO got his big break while his manager was out of town. Neil Clifford pinned down the company’s chief to get career advice—and immediately took it, saying yes to moving to a whole new city for a promotion. But when he got there, the store was failing, and the staff was stealing merchandise. He swiftly climbed the ladder after leading the shop’s turnaround.



And then there’s L’Oréal U.S. CHRO Stephanie Kramer, who said that saying yes to every single opportunity thrown her way played a big role in her career to the corner office at the world’s largest beauty company.



Meanwhile, Doug McMillon scaled Walmart’s ranks, from unloading trailers for $6.50 an hour at 17 to becoming the company’s youngest CEO since its founder, Sam Walton. By the time he announced his retirement earlier this year, he was earning a $29.2 million salary. And it was all thanks to volunteering to cover his boss. 



“One of the reasons that I got the opportunities that I got was that I would raise my hand when my boss was out of town, and he or she was visiting stores or something,” McMillon once recalled in an interview with Stratechery.



He’d offer to step in for his boss in meetings and would put himself in leadership positions so consistently that he eventually became, in his own words, “a low-risk promotion”—because people had already seen him do the job.



But even when he was eyeing up a promotion, he kept his head down and made sure to prove himself in the role he was in. “The next job doesn’t come if you don’t do the one you’ve got well,” McMillon added.
This story was originally featured on Fortune.com

title: कानपुर देहात: कांग्रेस की स्वागत सभा में चले लात-घूंसे, पूर्व और वर्तमान जिलाध्यक्ष के समर्थक आपस में भिड़े
description: Kanpur Dehat Congress: कानपुर देहात में उत्तर प्रदेश कांग्रेस प्रभारी राजेंद्र पाल गौतम के स्वागत समारोह में कांग्रेस के दो गुटों के बीच जमकर मारपीट हो गई। जिसका वीडियो सोशल मीडिया पर वायरल हो रहा है।
content:
Kanpur Dehat Congress Worker Dispute: जनपद के सूर्या होटल में उस समय अफरा-तफरी मच गई, जब नवनियुक्त उत्तर प्रदेश प्रभारी व प्रदेश महासचिव राजेंद्र पाल गौतम के प्रथम आगमन पर आयोजित स्वागत समारोह अखाड़े में तब्दील हो गया। स्वागत करने को लेकर कांग्रेस के ही दो गुट आपस में भिड़ गए। देखते ही देखते विवाद इतना बढ़ गया कि दोनों पक्षों में जमकर लात-घूंसे चले, जिसका वीडियो अब सोशल मीडिया पर तेजी से वायरल हो रहा है।
​स्वागत को लेकर शुरू हुआ विवाद
​मिली जानकारी के अनुसार, प्रदेश महासचिव राजेंद्र पाल गौतम के कानपुर देहात आगमन पर उनके स्वागत सत्कार के लिए सूर्या होटल में कार्यक्रम रखा गया था। इसी दौरान पूर्व जिला अध्यक्ष व सिकंदरा विधानसभा से प्रत्याशी रहे नरेश कटियार और वर्तमान जिला अध्यक्ष अमित सिंह गौर के बीच किसी बात को लेकर कहासुनी शुरू हो गई। देखते ही देखते दोनों नेताओं के समर्थक भी आमने-सामने आ गए और विवाद हाथापाई में बदल गया।
यह भी पढ़ें- Cyber Fraud Case: IPS की फर्जी Facebook ID बनाकर ठगी की कोशिश, व्यापारी की सतर्कता से नाकाम हुई साइबर जालसाजी
​हाथापाई के बाद भड़का मामला
​बताया जा रहा है कि इस धक्का-मुक्की और हाथापाई के दौरान पूर्व जिला अध्यक्ष नरेश कटियार के बेटे को हाथ लग गया, जिसके बाद मामला और ज्यादा गरमा गया। इसके बाद माहौल इस कदर बिगड़ा कि महिला कांग्रेस कार्यकर्ता मनोरमा शंकर और नरेश कटियार के समर्थकों के बीच भी तीखी नोकझोंक शुरू हो गई। देखते ही देखते दोनों पक्षों के बीच जमकर मारपीट हुई।
​सोशल मीडिया पर वीडियो वायरल
​कांग्रेस की इस आपसी गुटबाजी और सिरफुटौव्वल का वीडियो वहां मौजूद किसी व्यक्ति ने अपने मोबाइल में कैद कर लिया, जो अब सोशल मीडिया पर जमकर वायरल हो रहा है। इस घटना ने एक बार फिर कांग्रेस की अंतर्कलह को सरेबाजार उजागर कर दिया है। जहाँ एक तरफ शीर्ष नेतृत्व संगठन को मजबूत करने की कोशिशों में जुटा है, वहीं जमीनी स्तर पर कांग्रेस नेताओं की आपसी रंजिश पार्टी की किरकिरी करा रही है।

title: WhatsApp | వాట్సాప్‌లో యూజర్‌నేమ్ ఫీచర్.. మెటాకు నోటీసులు జారీ చేసిన కేంద్రం
description: WhatsApp : వాట్సాప్ త్వరలో యూజర్‌నేమ్‌ ఫీచర్ ప్రవేశపెట్టబోతున్న సంగతి తెలిసిందే. ఈ ఏడాది చివరికల్లా ఈ ఫీచర్ తీసుకురావాలని వాట్సాప్ నిర్ణయించింది. అయితే, ఈ ఫీచర్‌పై కేంద్రం తీవ్రంగా స్పందించింది. ఈ ఫీచర్‌కు సంబంధించిన పూర్తి అంశాలతో వివరణ ఇవ్వాలని కోరుతూ వాట్సాప్ మాతృసంస్థ మెటాకు కేంద్రం నోటీసులు జారీ చేసింది.
content:
WhatsApp : వాట్సాప్ త్వరలో యూజర్‌నేమ్‌ ఫీచర్ ప్రవేశపెట్టబోతున్న సంగతి తెలిసిందే. ఈ ఏడాది చివరికల్లా ఈ ఫీచర్ తీసుకురావాలని వాట్సాప్ మాతృసంస్థ మెటా నిర్ణయించింది. అయితే, ఈ ఫీచర్‌పై కేంద్రం తీవ్రంగా స్పందించింది. ఈ ఫీచర్‌కు సంబంధించిన పూర్తి అంశాలతో వివరణ ఇవ్వాలని కోరుతూ వాట్సాప్ మాతృసంస్థ మెటాకు కేంద్రం నోటీసులు జారీ చేసింది. మూడు రోజుల్లోగా సమాధానం చెప్పాలని ఆదేశించింది. ఈ ఫీచర్ ఎలా పని చేస్తుంది, భద్రత ప్రమాణాలు వంటి అంశాలను వివరించాలని కోరింది.
అప్పటివరకు ఇండియన్స్‌కు ఈ ఫీచర్ అందుబాటులోకి తీసుకురాకూడదని ఆదేశించింది. ఈ ఫీచర్ విషయంలో కేంద్రానికి నివేదిక సమర్పించి, పూర్తి అనుమతులు పొందిన తర్వాతే ముందుకెళ్లాలని నోటీసుల్లో పేర్కొంది. యూజర్‌నేమ్ ఫీచర్ విషయంలో టెక్ నిపుణులు ఆందోళన వ్యక్తం చేస్తున్నారు. దీనివల్ల ఆన్‌లైన్‌ మోసాలు అధికంగా జరిగే అవకాశం ఉందని చెబుతున్నారు. యూజర్ నేమ్ వల్ల ఫోన్ నెంబర్ తెలియదని, దీంతో ప్రముఖుల పేర్లతో, ఇతరుల పేర్లతో మోసానికి పాల్పడే అవకాశాలు ఎక్కువగా ఉంటాయని నిపుణులు చెబుతున్నారు. వినియోగదారులకు అసలు అకౌంట్ ఎవరికి సంబంధించిందో తెలిసే అవకాశం ఉండదు. అందుకే ఈ ఫీచర్ విషయంలో ఆందోళన వ్యక్తమవుతోంది.
ప్రస్తుతం ఈ ఫీచర్ ప్రయోగాత్మక దశలో ఉంది. ఇండియాలో ఈ ఏడాది చివరి నుంచి ఈ ఫీచర్ అందుబాటులోకి రావొచ్చు. ఇప్పటికే యూజర్ నేమ్స్ రిజర్వ్ చేసుకోవాలని మెటా సంస్థ వాట్సాప్ యూజర్లకు సూచించింది. దీనికి సంబంధించి కొన్ని మార్గదర్శకాలను కూడా విడుదల చేసింది. అయితే, కేంద్రం అనుమతించిన తర్వాతే ఈ ఫీచర్ అందుబాటులోకి వచ్చే ఛాన్స్ ఉంది.

title: സാക്ഷികളില്ല, സിസിടിവി ദൃശ്യങ്ങളില്ല; കേദൻ വധക്കേസിൽ 'സോനം രഘുവംശിയുടെ കേസ്' ഉദാഹരണമാക്കി പോലീസ്
Sunil Bharti Mittal, Founder and Chairman of Bharti Enterprises, receives 2026 Leadership Award at USISPF Leadership Summit
description: USISPF conferred the 2026 Leadership Award on Bharti Enterprises Founder and Chairman Sunil Bharti Mittal in recognition of his contribution to transforming India's telecommunications sector and advancing economic ties between India and North America.
content: Bharti Enterprises Founder and Chairman Sunil Bharti Mittal was honoured with the 2026 Leadership Award at the IX Leadership Summit of the US-India Strategic Partnership Forum (USISPF). USISPF conferred the 2026 Leadership Award on Mittal in recognition of his contribution to transforming India's telecommunications sector and advancing economic ties between India and North America.The event celebrated the US-India commercial partnership ahead of America's 250th Independence Day, bringing together government officials and industry leaders from both countries.At the summit, Mittal expressed optimism over the ongoing India-US trade negotiations, saying he hopes the two countries will conclude a long-awaited trade agreement within the next few weeks.The forum honoured three global business leaders during its IX Leadership Summit for their contributions to strengthening the India-US commercial partnership.Besides Mittal, USISPF presented the 2026 Leadership Award to V. Prem Watsa, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Fairfax Financial, and Christopher T. Calio, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of RTX Corporation, for their leadership and contributions to strengthening the India-US economic corridor.In a video message played during the event, Mittal thanked USISPF for the recognition and stressed the growing strategic alignment between the two countries.Mittal directly addressed United States Secretary of Commerce Howard Lutnick and underscored the importance of the proposed trade pact for industry. "I'm hoping Secretary Lutnick that if not in days, but in a few weeks, that India and the US will have a trade deal that we in the industry have been looking forward to," Mittal said.Highlighting the broader strategic relationship between New Delhi and Washington, Mittal described the nearly five-million-strong Indian diaspora in the United States as a key pillar of bilateral cooperation."Indian diaspora of nearly five million people, largest anywhere in the world, has a beautiful bridge between India and US, helping the strategic relationship develop between the two nations, be that trade, defence, or indeed higher technologies," he said.Praising the forum's efforts in deepening economic engagement, Mittal also referred to the celebrations marking 250 years of American independence."How much I wish that I would have been amongst you today on this very special occasion of USISPF holding this very special day celebrating 250 years of US freedom," he said."I personally believe that the work that USISPF has been doing under Mukesh and John should be truly cherished and celebrated. Today they honor some of us with a very special leadership award. And I also take this occasion of congratulating Chris and Prem, who are my fellow awardees today," Mittal added.(With inputs from ANI)

Sony PlayStation To Phase Out Physical Video Game Discs By January 2028
description: Sony PlayStation said Wednesday it plans to end production of new video game discs – a feature of the media and entertainment landscape for three-plus decades – by January 2028. title: System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage”
description:
Israel’s Prime Minister said his country had “fulfilled a moral duty by recognising the historical truth, and rejecting attempts to deny” that the killings in WWI were a genocide
The post System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage” appeared first on NME.
content:
System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian has hit out at the Israeli government, accusing them of “using” Armenian history and their “genocide and pain” to their “political advantage”.

READ MORE: System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian: “We are not living in a just world” 

The frontman is of Armenian descent and all four of his grandparents were survivors of the 1915 genocide that took place during World War I, and led to the deaths of between 664,000 and 1.2 million Armenians, according to United States Holocaust Memorial Museum.
Tankian and the band have regularly shed light on the mass killings of Armenians under the Ottoman Empire between 1915 and 1916, and even thanked former President Joe Biden for officially recognising the genocide in 2021 – a move that other American leaders often shied away from over concerns about potentially of straining the nation’s ties with Turkey.
According to EuroNews, Israel has long resisted calls to recognise it as a genocide due to its relations to Turkey. Now, amid weakening relations with Turkey over the humanitarian crisis in Gaza, Israel’s Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has now officially recognised the killings WWI as a genocide, and said his country had “fulfilled a moral duty by recognising the historical truth, and rejecting attempts to deny it”.

ראש ממשלת ארמניה ניקול פשיניאן (@NikolPashinyan) עוקץ את ישראל על רקע הכרת הממשלה ברצח העם הארמני. "אנחנו סבורים כי לטובתה של רפובליקת ארמניה לא נכון להיות מעורבת בהפיכת סוגיית רצח העם הארמני לכלי פוליטי", אומר פשיניאן #Israel #Türkiye #Armenia pic.twitter.com/TvwAT3q2RY
— Dean Shmuel Elmas (@ElmasDean) June 30, 2026

The recognition has been met with hostility in Armenia, and Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan has distanced himself from Netanyahu’s comments – saying that he is wanting to avoid the “political weaponisation” of the subject.
“We believe that not entering into the issue of the weaponization of the Armenian Genocide is in the interests of the Republic of Armenia. Therefore, we do not see any need for a response,” he told reporters when asked about the Israeli decision (via The Times Of Israel).
Tankian also acknowledged the comments from Netanyahu, and criticised the Israeli Prime Minister as “using” the massacre to “their political advantage”.
“For many years, Israel’s government used AIPAC [American Israel Public Affairs Committee] to lobby the US Congress to not recognise the Armenian genocide, to prevent Congress from recognising the Armenian genocide, due to their relationship with Turkey, their intelligence sharing with Turkey, et cetera,” the singer alleged on Instagram stories.

BREAKING: System Of A Down's Serj Tankian blasts Netanyahu's government, saying "Fuck you!" for using the Armenian Genocide for political advantage. pic.twitter.com/XilFyFaBbA
— Kegham Balian (@kbalian90) June 29, 2026

“Today, the Netanyahu cabinet decided to recognise the Armenian genocide of 1915 — a genocide that led Hitler thinking that he could do what he could do to the Jews in the 1930s and 1940s,” he continued.
“The fact that this government is already committing genocide in Gaza and Lebanon decided to recognise the genocide of my grandparents is the worst fucking thing that they could have done to Armenians — by using our history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage,” Tankian said, before concluding: “Fuck you”.
Tankian has long strived to raise awareness for the genocide in Armenia during the First World War, and wrote about how that moment in history affected his family in his autobiography, Down With The System.
“I’ve inherited his legacy in a way,” he told NME, discussing the memoir in 2024. He also added that he wanted his grandfather – who was affected by the conflict – to know that his band were “spreading awareness about [his] story, the genocide, and the importance for proper recognition of history” in their music.
The metal icon also condemned Israel’s actions in Gaza in that NME interview too, weighing in on the movement to boycott companies with ties to Israel.

“It’s important for the youth to raise their voice, because we are not living in a just world,” Tankian said. “I think in some cases, pure activism is taken hostage by certain fringe elements of society, including in the US – certain anti-Semites who have gotten into that world. However, I think the majority of the activists and their intentions are pure, and I think what they’re doing is important.”
He continued: “In terms of the Hamas invasion of Israel, I want to say that was obviously a terrorist act and they are war criminals and deserve to be punished. But, the Netanyahu government’s response is also – as we can see with the number of civilians that have died – a war crime.”
System Of A Down bandmate Daron Malakian spoke to NME about whether he saw any “parallels between the Armenian genocide and the war in Gaza” . “When it comes to that, I don’t know,” he replied. “I don’t like to see Palestinians die, I don’t like to see Jews die, I don’t like to see Christians die. I don’t like to see anybody die.”
“I try not to get too preachy because there are always two sides to certain things,” he added. “I’m just a guy who lives a very comfortable life. I’m blessed, I play in one of the biggest bands in the world… I’m not going to sit here and tell people what is right and wrong while I sit on top of my house that is on top of a hill.”
System Of A Down are currently on their 2026 UK and European stadium tour with support from Queens Of The Stone Age, which kicked off in Sweden on Monday (June 29). They will be playing in France, Italy and Germany later this month, as well as two nights at Tottenham Hotspur stadium in London.
Ahead of the show in Sweden, System Of A Down confirmed that they would be launching pop-up shops with exclusive merch, and Tankian said he and his bandmates are currently “having the best time of [their] lives as a band”.
They dropped their first new music in 15 years back in 2020, after going on hiatus from 2006 to 2010. However, they are yet to record a full-length follow-up to their 2005 albums ‘Mezmerize’ and ‘Hypnotize’.
The post System Of A Down’s Serj Tankian says “fuck you” to Netanyahu regime for “using our [Armenian] history, our genocide, our pain to their political advantage” appeared first on NME.

title: ఎయిడ్స్ తో ప్రముఖ నటి మృతి…షాక్ లో చిత్రసీమ
description: Aids : హాలీవుడ్ చలనచిత్ర పరిశ్రమలో తీవ్ర విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. ప్రముఖ అమెరికన్ నటి, మాజీ చైల్డ్ ఆర్టిస్ట్ డేవీ చేస్ (35) లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్‌లోని ఒక...
content:
Aids : హాలీవుడ్ చలనచిత్ర పరిశ్రమలో తీవ్ర విషాదం చోటుచేసుకుంది. ప్రముఖ అమెరికన్ నటి, మాజీ చైల్డ్ ఆర్టిస్ట్ డేవీ చేస్ (35) లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్‌లోని ఒక ఆసుపత్రిలో కన్నుమూశారు. జూన్ 16న సంభవించిన ఆమె మరణానికి గల కారణాలను విశ్లేషిస్తూ లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్ కౌంటీ మెడికల్ ఎగ్జామినర్ తాజాగా విడుదల చేసిన నివేదిక పరిశ్రమ వర్గాలను తీవ్ర దిగ్భ్రాంతికి గురిచేసింది. డేవీ చేస్ ప్రమాదకరమైన ఎయిడ్స్ (AIDS) వ్యాధి బారిన పడి, దాని తీవ్రత వల్ల తలెత్తిన మెనింజైటిస్, బ్లడ్ ఇన్ఫెక్షన్ (సెప్సిస్) వంటి ఆరోగ్య సమస్యలతో మరణించినట్లు వైద్య నివేదికలో అధికారికంగా నిర్ధారించారు. కేవలం 35 ఏళ్ల ప్రాయంలోనే ఒకప్పటి స్టార్ నటి ఇలా అనారోగ్యంతో తనువు చాలించడం హాలీవుడ్‌ వ్యాప్తంగా తీవ్ర సంచలనంగా మారింది.



Read Also : కొడుకు మృతదేహంలో కీలక అవయవాలు లేవు.. వెనెజువెలాలో ఏం జరిగింది?











డ్రగ్స్ వ్యసనం మరియు హోమ్‌లెస్ జీవితం



ఏడేళ్ల చిన్న వయసులోనే బాలనటిగా హాలీవుడ్ ఇండస్ట్రీలోకి అడుగుపెట్టిన డేవీ చేస్.. 2002లో వచ్చిన ప్రపంచ ప్రసిద్ధ హర్రర్ చిత్రం ‘ది రింగ్’ (The Ring) లో సమారా మోర్గాన్ పాత్రతో అంతర్జాతీయంగా గుర్తింపు తెచ్చుకున్నారు. అలాగే డిస్నీ యానిమేటెడ్ చిత్రం ‘లిలో & స్టిట్చ్’ (Lilo & Stitch) లో లిలో పాత్రకు వాయిస్ ఓవర్ ఇచ్చి అవార్డులను గెలుచుకున్నారు. అయితే, చిన్ననాటి విజయాల తర్వాత ఆమె జీవితం క్రమంగా అంధకారంలోకి కూరుకుపోయింది. ఆమె తండ్రి తెలిపిన వివరాల ప్రకారం, డేవీ చేస్ తన 13 ఏళ్ల వయసులోనే డ్రగ్స్ మహమ్మారికి (Polysubstance use) బానిసయ్యారు. జీవితం చివరి దశలో కుటుంబానికి దూరమై, తీవ్రమైన పేదరికం, నిరాశ్రయత (Homelessness) అనుభవిస్తూ లాస్ ఏంజిల్స్ వీధుల్లో గడిపినట్లు సమాచారం. తొలుత ఆమె కేవలం బ్లడ్ ఇన్‌ఫెక్షన్‌తోనే చనిపోయిందని భావించినప్పటికీ, అంతర్లీనంగా ఉన్న ఎయిడ్స్ వ్యాధే ఆమె మరణానికి ప్రధాన కారణమని తేలడంతో చిత్రసీమ దిగ్భ్రాంతి వ్యక్తం చేస్తోంది.

title: 'Vagabond' Who Changed The World: Einstein's Journey From Failure To Fame
description: University records show that Einstein frequently skipped lectures. (Photo Credit: ETH)
content: Einstein enrolled at ETH Zurich in October 1896 at the age of just 17. Even then, he was different from his fellow students. Decades later, he reflected on his university years with remarkable honesty.

title: ୧୦ ଦଫା ଦାବି ନେଇ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଧର୍ମଘଟ, ସରକାର ଆମ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ କଲେ…
description:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୧ା୭(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ): ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଦିବସରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ମେଡିକାଲ ସର୍ଭିସ ଆସୋସିଏଶନର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ କ୍ରମେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୧୦ଦଫା ଦାବ ନେଇ ଧର୍ମଘଟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ୬ ମାସ ତଳେ କେବଳ ଦିନକୁ ୧ ଘଣ୍ଟା କାମବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରି ଥିବାରୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ତାଙ୍କର ୧୦ ଦଫା ନ୍ୟାଯ୍ୟ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ହୋଇ ନ ଥିଲା। ତେଣୁ ବୁଧବାର ପୁଣି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କଲମ ଛାଡ଼ […]
The post ୧୦ ଦଫା ଦାବି ନେଇ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ ଧର୍ମଘଟ, ସରକାର ଆମ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ କଲେ… appeared first on Dharitri Odia News.
content:
କେସିଙ୍ଗା,୧ା୭(ତୁମେଶ୍ୱର ସାହୁ): ଜୁଲାଇ ୧ରେ ଡାକ୍ତର ଦିବସରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ମେଡିକାଲ ସର୍ଭିସ ଆସୋସିଏଶନର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦେଶ କ୍ରମେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ର ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କ କାର୍ଯ୍ୟବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରାଯାଇଛି। ୧୦ଦଫା ଦାବ ନେଇ ଧର୍ମଘଟ ଆରମ୍ଭ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ୬ ମାସ ତଳେ କେବଳ ଦିନକୁ ୧ ଘଣ୍ଟା କାମବନ୍ଦ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରି ଥିବାରୁ ଡାକ୍ତର ତାଙ୍କର ୧୦ ଦଫା ନ୍ୟାଯ୍ୟ ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ହୋଇ ନ ଥିଲା। ତେଣୁ ବୁଧବାର ପୁଣି ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ କଲମ ଛାଡ଼ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ବାଧ୍ୟ ହୋଇ କରିଛନ୍ତି। ଗତ ଥର ଘଣ୍ଟାକ ପାଇଁ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରିଥିବାରୁ ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର ଡାକ୍ତରମାନଙ୍କୁ ୩ ମାସର ସମୟ ମାଗି ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନକୁ ସେହି ସମୟରେ ଆପୋଷ ବୁଝାମଣାରେ ବନ୍ଦ କରି ଦେଇଥିଲେ। କିନ୍ତୁ ଆଜିକୁ ୩ ମାସ ବଦଳରେ ୬ ମାସ ପରେ ମଧ୍ୟ ତାଙ୍କ ୧୦ ଦଫା
ଦାବି ପୂରଣ ନ ହେବାରୁ ପୁଣି ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନକୁ ଓହ୍ଲାଇଛନ୍ତି। ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ ମେଡିକାଲର ସମସ୍ତ ସେବା ବୁଧବାରଠାରୁ ଠପ୍‌ ହୋଇଯାଇଛି। ଗରିବ ଲୋକେ ହଇରାଣ ହେଉଛନ୍ତି। ଗରିବ ଲୋକଙ୍କ ଜରୁରୀକାଳୀନ ସେବା ପାଇଁ ବର୍ତ୍ତମାନ କେବଳ ବେସରକାରୀ ମେଡିକାଲ ହିଁ ସାହା ଭରସା। କେସିଙ୍ଗା ଗୋଷ୍ଠୀ ସ୍ବାସ୍ଥ୍ୟକେନ୍ଦ୍ରର ୭ ଜଣ ଡାକ୍ତର ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନରେ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇ ଭବାନୀପାଟଣା ଜିଲା ମୁଖ୍ୟାଳୟକୁ ଯାଇ ସରକାରଙ୍କ ବିରୋଧରେ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ ସାମିଲ ହୋଇଛନ୍ତି।
ଏ ସଂକ୍ରାନ୍ତରେ କେସିଙ୍ଗା ମେଡିକାଲର ଅଧୀକ୍ଷକ ଡା. ରବୀନ୍ଦ୍ରନାଥ ଖୁଣ୍ଟିଆଙ୍କୁ ପଚାରିବାରୁ ଆମର ୧୦ ଦାବି ରାଜ୍ୟ ସରକାର ପୂରଣ ନ କଲା ପର୍ଯ୍ୟନ୍ତ ଆନ୍ଦୋଳନ କରିବୁ। ଅତି ଜରୁରୀ ପାଇଁ ଚିକିତ୍ସା ପାଇଁ ଜଣେ ଡାକ୍ତରଙ୍କୁ ଦାୟିତ୍ୱ ଦିଆଯାଇଛି ବୋଲି ପ୍ରକାଶ କରିଥିଲେ।

Dharitri – Odisha’s No.1 Odia Daily

title: Bharti Airtel launches NBFC operations under Airtel Money after RBI nod
description: The launch follows the receipt of a formal Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), which was granted to the company earlier this year on February 13.
content: Bharti Airtel has officially stepped into the non-banking financial sector. The company announced that its arm, Airtel Money Limited, has commenced commercial operations as a Type-II Non-Deposit-accepting Non-Banking Financial Company (Investment and Credit Company).The telecom giant made the announcement through a regulatory exchange filing on Wednesday. The launch follows the receipt of a formal Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), which was granted to the company earlier this year on February 13.“…we are pleased to inform that Airtel Money Limited, a subsidiary of the Company, has commenced its commercial operations as a Type II Non-Deposit accepting Non-Banking Financial Company [Type II-NBFC-ND (ICC)] pursuant to its Certificate of Registration, issued by the Reserve Bank of India on February 13, 2026,” Bharti Airtel informed in an exchange filing.  Operating under the classification of a Type II-NBFC-ND (Investment and Credit Company), the transition permits Bharti Airtel's financial services arm to deliver structured financial services such as digital lending and credit solutions but is strictly barred from accepting public deposits.RBI nod to Bharti Airtel to oparate as Type II NBFC-NDEarlier in February this year, Bharti Airtel said that its subsidiary, Airtel Money, received a Certificate of Registration from the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) to operate as a Type II Non-Deposit Accepting Non-Banking Financial Company [Type II-NBFC-ND (ICC)].The certificate was issued under Section 45-IA of the RBI Act, 1934. With the RBI's approval, Airtel Money was authorised to start the business of a non-banking financial institution without accepting public deposits, subject to the conditions prescribed by the central bank.Bharti Airtel Share Price Shares of Bharti Airtel today ended at Rs 1870.80, up Rs 18.75 or 1.01 per cent from the previous close of Rs 1,852.05, on the BSE.Bharti Airtel is a global communications solutions provider with over 600 million customers in 15 countries across India and Africa.

title: From Peddi to Vaazha 2: Regional blockbusters that rewrote India's box office story in first half of 2026
description: Regional films have emerged as the biggest growth driver of India's Rs 5,373 crore box office in 2026, led by Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and Marathi blockbusters.
content: India's domestic box office hit Rs 5,373 crore in the first five months of 2026, up 12 percent from the same period last year. While Hindi cinema still commands the largest share at 43 percent, the story of the first half belongs squarely to regional films. Here is a full breakdown of the standout performers.Telugu Cinema: The Heavyweight AnchorTelugu films account for 17 percent of domestic collections in 2026, and two titles in particular have driven that number.Peddi (Ram Charan, released June 4) is the year's biggest Telugu earner so far, clocking Rs 238 crore net domestically by June and crossing Rs 400 crore worldwide. The sports-action drama defied even the high expectations attached to it and comfortably stands as the top Telugu grosser of 2026. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=noatJVfA22UMana Shankara Vara Prasad Garu (Chiranjeevi, Nayanthara, Venkatesh; released January 12) was the Sankranti centrepiece and became Chiranjeevi's highest-grossing film of all time. The film is now the second highest-grossing Telugu film of 2026 and ranks among the five highest-grossing Indian films of the year. Worldwide collections are reported between Rs 300 crore and Rs 310 crore. Maa Inti Bangaaram (Samantha Ruth Prabhu) emerged as the year's defining sleeper hit. The film grossed Rs 59.62 crore in India and Rs 83 crore worldwide against a budget of just Rs 20 crore, making it nearly four times its cost and the biggest women-led Telugu hit on record. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B9d-wISnm8sTamil Cinema: Karuppu Breaks RecordsTamil films hold a 13 percent share of the domestic box office in 2026, with Suriya's Karuppu as the headline act. The film's worldwide gross is reported between Rs 304 crore and Rs 340 crore depending on the source, quickly surpassing the lifetime collections of Tamil classics like Singam 2. Directed by RJ Balaji, the action-devotional drama also released in Telugu as Veerabhadrudu and emerged as May's single highest-grossing film across all languages. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JpVl_-1YgIoMalayalam Cinema: Vaazha 2 Makes HistoryMalayalam films account for 10 percent of domestic collections and have delivered two of the year's most remarkable stories.Vaazha 2: Biopic of a Billion Bros (released April 2) became a phenomenon by any measure. The film has grossed over Rs 124 crore in Kerala alone, making it the highest-grossing film of all time in the state, and is the second highest-grossing Malayalam film of 2026 overall. Its worldwide lifetime collection stands at more than Rs 235 crore, produced on a budget of just Rs 10 crore. By day nine, the film had registered profits of 514 percent, making it the most profitable Indian film of 2026 at that point. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0ESCE9ExwyADrishyam 3 (Mohanlal) crossed Rs 100 crore domestically and Rs 239.82 crore worldwide, becoming one of the biggest Malayalam releases of the year and the fourth highest-grossing Malayalam film of all time at the time of its run. WikipediaMarathi Cinema: A Historic TurnaroundPerhaps the most striking story of the year belongs to Marathi cinema. Its share of the domestic box office has risen to 4 percent in 2026, up from 1 to 2 percent over the previous three years. Marathi films have collectively grossed more than Rs 220 crore in five months, more than double the Rs 96 crore collected across the entirety of 2025.Raja Shivaji stands at Rs 96.39 crore net domestically and Rs 117.97 crore worldwide. Nearly 27 percent of its collections came from its Hindi-dubbed version. Together with Deool Band 2, the two May releases account for 77 percent of Marathi cinema's entire 2026 box office tally, and the industry is now on track to surpass its all-time record of Rs 268 crore, set in 2022. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Q3P8yYhGkgThe Bigger PictureThe top 10 highest-grossing Indian films of 2026 so far include three Hindi films, two Telugu, two Malayalam, and one each from Tamil, Marathi and international cinema. Six months in, regional cinema is no longer a supporting act. It is headlining.
